name: Courier Newsroom
subject: January 6th part 2?
body:
Right-wing bad actors are taking to social media to divide and organize. With your support, we can fight back.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1102%2E120351%2EJNuFbF)
In the wake of Donald Trump’s indictment, right-wing extremists are once again taking to social media to organize and spread violent rhetoric.
On Twitter, Arizona Congressman Andy Biggs told followers that the indictment was a “war phase.” Louisiana Rep. Clay Higgins used battle-planning rhetoric in a tweet where many heard echoes of the Proud Boys and their recruiting efforts in the run-up to the Capitol Insurrection.
**Peter, what we’re seeing right now from right-wing extremists on social media has dangerous parallels to January 6th and so far, Twitter is doing nothing to stop it.**
[**That’s what makes Courier’s work so important. Our journalists are working hard to call out this kind of dangerous, reckless misinformation and hold bad actors accountable in a way that social media platforms won’t, but they can’t do this alone. Will you chip in $5 now to power our work?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230612?refcode=em20230612&refcode2=1102_120351_JNuFbF&akid=1102%2E120351%2EJNuFbF)
In moments like today, where bad information is spreading quickly, the work of our online-focused local news teams is more important than ever.
Our reporters publish in the same online spaces where misinformation and bad actors thrive. That means we bring trustworthy, accessible information directly to the communities that need it most
**Peter, our work is fueled by grassroots donations from folks like you.** Your support allows us to hire and retain talented journalists and spread their work far and wide. We don’t use paywalls. That means our news is available to anyone who wants to read it.
[**Right now, our news teams have their work cut out for them and they need the resources to keep up as the charges against Trump play out. Will you chip in $5 to power our team?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230612?refcode=em20230612&refcode2=1102_120351_JNuFbF&akid=1102%2E120351%2EJNuFbF)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230612?refcode=em20230612&refcode2=1102_120351_JNuFbF&akid=1102%2E120351%2EJNuFbF)**
Thanks so much,
The Courier Newsroom Team
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=1102_120351_JNuFbF&akid=1102%2E120351%2EJNuFbF)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1102%2E120351%2EJNuFbF)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

Republicans thought they could silence their opposition by expelling Reps. Jones and Pearson from the legislature – we can come together _today_ and show them they can't stop our movement.

## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

Please use this to access the TV AD. | Why Chris Christie: Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America. | [PAID FOR BY TELL IT LIKE IT IS PAC. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

body:
| Friend, this is alarming:

**First,** _Politico_ reported our Democratic Senate majority could hinge on winning in Ohio.

**Then,** multiple outlets, including _FiveThirtyEight_ and _NBC News,_ ranked me as one of the most vulnerable incumbents on the ballot.

**Now,** _The Cook Political Report_ is calling this race a TOSS-UP – and I urgently need your grassroots support to protect this must-win seat.

**My midnight deadline is coming up, and I'm counting on your help to reach my $50,000 goal so I can prove the pundits wrong, win in Ohio and defend our Democratic Senate majority.** [Please, will you split $10 or more now between me and the Voter Protection Project?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47439?t=6&akid=8392%2E878179%2EMcmti5) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sherrod Brown and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47440?t=7&akid=8392%2E878179%2EMcmti5)

I've been in quite a few races, and I know we can win this one – but it's going to take all of us. Thank you for being on my team.

– Sherrod

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=8392%2E878179%2EMcmti5). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=8392%2E878179%2EMcmti5).**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Pride Month: Has The Rainbow Been Hijacked?
body:
Episode #11 of Unleashed with Heidi Ganahl is LIVE!
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alultlt-ttjjilthht-r/) Hi Peter, This month is PRIDE Month, and given all of the recent controversies on the topic, I wanted to dig in. I have some dear friends that are in the LGBTQ community, I love them and respect them. The funny thing is, it's always been a non-issue in our friendships. It's just one aspect of their lives, just like me being married to my husband is one aspect of who I am.All of that to say, this week's episode comes from a place of love and respect. To gently offer some thoughts about the month-long celebration of Pride -- from the history to the benefits, to the concern regarding our kids.

It was such an honor to have my friend Valdamar Arculeta with [Colorado Log Cabin Republicans](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alultlt-ttjjilthht-y/) as a guest to have a blunt and honest conversation about all from his unique perspective of being a gay Republican himself, one who was on the frontlines of the fight for gay rights years ago. Check out his recent op-ed [_Pride Month is Counterproductive_](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alultlt-ttjjilthht-j/)!
### **Episode #10 - PRIDE MONTH: HAS THE RAINBOW BEEN HIJACKED?**
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alultlt-ttjjilthht-t/) [WATCH ON YOUTUBE](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alultlt-ttjjilthht-i/) [WATCH ON RUMBLE](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alultlt-ttjjilthht-d/) [LISTEN HERE](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alultlt-ttjjilthht-h/) _Not into podcasts? I post transcripts of my monologues and full episode breakdowns every week on my Substack.[You can subscribe here!](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alultlt-ttjjilthht-k/)_
## **UNLEASHED AT WESTERN CONSERVATIVE SUMMIT!**
What an amazing weekend at the Western Conservative Summit! On Friday night, I had the great honor of introducing Eric Metaxas. If you haven't heard [Episode 4 (Back to Faith, Back to Winning)](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alultlt-ttjjilthht-b/), I talk at length about how he has changed my heart when it comes to my FAITH in politics. I encourage you to listen, and read his book _[Letter to the American Church](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alultlt-ttjjilthht-n/)_.We had so many people come by the booth to tell us how much you've been loving Unleashed, and recorded 20+ podcast episodes all day Saturday LIVE from the booth. I will be releasing them throughout the next couple of weeks and can't wait for you to hear them.I walk away full of hope for the future of Colorado and excited to stay in the fight! A huge thank you to Jeff Hunt, Centennial Institute, and Western Conservative Summit! [](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alultlt-ttjjilthht-p/)
## **GO NUGGETS!
Let's bring home our FIRST EVER Championship win!**
If you've been liking the podcast so far, [here are the ways you can help us grow](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alultlt-ttjjilthht-x/)!Have a great week!Heidi [](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alultlt-ttjjilthht-m/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alultlt-ttjjilthht-c/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alultlt-ttjjilthht-q/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alultlt-ttjjilthht-a/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alultlt-ttjjilthht-f/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alultlt-ttjjilthht-z/) | Heidi GanahlLone Tree, CO [Preferences](https://heidi4gov.updatemyprofile.com/i-alultlt-E8C3E4FD-ttjjilthht-v) | [Unsubscribe](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-u-alultlt-ttjjilthht-e/)
---

Col. Allen West_** have joined our movement to call for an Article V convention. [**Just click here to add your name to this national petition. And then PLEASE forward this email to every single person you know.**](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTY0LWJlYzA0ODU3OTQ2ZDRiYmNiNmQyMTE0MzQ2MWZkODI5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvN201c3drN2s0dz9zcmM9U1BPMzk5MjUifQ/rJr95-6Qzl0IRKFZ5K121g)
---
[**Sign The Petition**](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTY0LWJlYzA0ODU3OTQ2ZDRiYmNiNmQyMTE0MzQ2MWZkODI5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvN201c3drN2s0dz9zcmM9U1BPMzk5MjUifQ/OjRjqvDhAZlGMt7TTd5DJQ)
---
Our nation is spiraling out of control. Debt threatens to cripple our economy. Federal spending has never been higher -- nor has our deficit. And our leaders in Washington won't do anything to save us. _In fact, most of them are part of the problem!_ An Article V convention is our only hope. You see, our Founding Fathers were brilliant men. They left an emergency clause in the Constitution in case the federal government got too big and out-of-control. **Article V of the Constitution allows the states to bypass Congress and the President to call a convention to propose amendments to our Constitution that will rein in the federal government.** Well, conservative leaders all across the country - along with over **_FIVE MILLION_** grassroots patriots - believe it is time to invoke Article V and call a convention for the express, _limited_ purpose of imposing fiscal restraints and term limits on Congress and limiting the power, scope, and jurisdiction of the federal government. And I hope you do, too. With the socialists in control in Washington, it's time to take action before it's too late! It's time for "We the People" to use the most powerful weapon in our arsenal - the Constitution - to fight back against Washington's overreach. [**Please sign the National Petition for an Article V convention right now, and please ask everyone you know to do the same.**](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTY0LWJlYzA0ODU3OTQ2ZDRiYmNiNmQyMTE0MzQ2MWZkODI5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjQiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvN201c3drN2s0dz9zcmM9U1BPMzk5MjUifQ/6Gr69kuZ1IDpRjZ1UVzKMA) Here at Convention of States Action, we are working overtime to convince the required 34 state legislatures to call for an Article V convention to place limits on the power and jurisdiction of the federal government. **We have already passed in 19 of those states - bringing us over HALFWAY to calling a Convention of States and taking the power back from the "ruling class" in Washington!** In 2022, we saw huge victories in Wisconsin, Nebraska, West Virginia, and South Carolina all passing the Convention of States (COS) Resolution. The legislative sessions in many states have started for this year and our grassroots army has been right there, pushing our Resolution through in this General Assembly! NOW is our window of opportunity to double down and secure the needed victories to cross the finish line! We have a citizen activist army operating in all 50 states, working tirelessly on the front lines to urge their state legislators to act in accordance with the will of the people and demand that they pass this critically important Resolution. **An Article V convention is our only chance to pass important and long overdue measures like a balanced budget amendment, term limits on Congress and the Supreme Court, and limits on the scope and jurisdiction of the federal government.** The politicians in Washington wouldn't dare limit their own power. Therefore, we the people need to do it! But in order for that to happen, we need millions and millions of patriotic Americans like you to sign this important national petition. We need to show the members of the state legislatures that the American people are ready for a constitutional solution as big as our nation's problems, an Article V convention. [**Simply click here to sign and we'll deliver it directly to your state legislators, free of charge. This is our best chance to save America from an out-of-control federal government.**](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTY0LWJlYzA0ODU3OTQ2ZDRiYmNiNmQyMTE0MzQ2MWZkODI5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjUiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvN201c3drN2s0dz9zcmM9U1BPMzk5MjUifQ/xZzttUkArR1oQ_GuHGi_xA) Washington won't fix itself. The federal government is too big, and our leaders are too invested in its growth. We the People must take control through our state legislatures. [**Please join the fight to call an Article V convention. Sign the petition today, and urge every freedom-loving American to do the same.**](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTY0LWJlYzA0ODU3OTQ2ZDRiYmNiNmQyMTE0MzQ2MWZkODI5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjYiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvN201c3drN2s0dz9zcmM9U1BPMzk5MjUifQ/sPJtzjayaYgYOOKqaV4ISQ)

[**Sign The Petition**](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTY0LWJlYzA0ODU3OTQ2ZDRiYmNiNmQyMTE0MzQ2MWZkODI5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjciLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvN201c3drN2s0dz9zcmM9U1BPMzk5MjUifQ/o6cNKWPosZszF50RY6jc2Q)

subject: Can you help out on Election Day?

body:
We need volunteers
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015ZOuX6tIsGBkN3QDdq1QixBJjcX6D98Z6YF6aicvOiProtasZf2icAGiKuTryKWLnd75-HtBxBTugZJa9L0_4tdknHoQ7ApNEtbl7_yKoCYlm6XwXEeoE00cBwgdSueCEU9leI4ATN1LfkJuY5lwi00pXg0h-3eklxdPMi-OxSQ=&c=zrt1glkMLZLz080uxpA39Eu93YGtV3Ti1X2QXH5XTRdDng0ErpUHxQ==&ch=7eCbpfTA6U9o6dWcAH6ZN1RW7I4awEfimpFeu7QUSx4JAtej69GUlQ==)
---
| CAN YOU VOLUNTEER ON ELECTION DAY? Tuesday, June 20 1 WEEK AWAY HOW CAN YOU HELP?
---
|
---
---
| |
---
| How can I help Amanda?
---
| Is there anything you can do today to help us win this June 20 Primary?

---
| | [DONATE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015ZOuX6tIsGBkN3QDdq1QixBJjcX6D98Z6YF6aicvOiProtasZf2icIEDMXpIudmquD-lvxWC0IGA_xZBo7s6HKmrZVpNEW0kcAQCkuXmyQ_FPtvccVDo4-Eo0JLNTydBj-61LAZ8UAbuEFpJZpDuhowtAusrm4lz7vZDRlKpYOF_LAhVA31AFN2d9SH-8Sd1Kcvwfkeyvuz9ch_mZxt_bA==&c=zrt1glkMLZLz080uxpA39Eu93YGtV3Ti1X2QXH5XTRdDng0ErpUHxQ==&ch=7eCbpfTA6U9o6dWcAH6ZN1RW7I4awEfimpFeu7QUSx4JAtej69GUlQ==)
---
| How much do you value your freedom? Most candidates are bought for and paid for by political action committees and lobbyists. Not me. I rely on the generous donations from you. So please answer this call for help. Anyone can donate and you don't have to live in the district to give. You may not be able to vote for me but I can still vote for you.
Successful campaigns are expensive unfortunately. Many people are surprised to find out that we have to raise our own money to run for public office. I've heard people express that they didn't know about a campaign and I know it was because the candidate didn't raise enough money to get the word out.
---
| | [VOLUNTEER TO WORK YOUR POLLING LOCATION](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015ZOuX6tIsGBkN3QDdq1QixBJjcX6D98Z6YF6aicvOiProtasZf2icDy_qBJ1rHBlg7Om7g4vCQIMOigPhl8D4Ps_uDxAA_lpOBBCfED5p1Er6mJNKsWH_z957ClOVwtvupDYSAD9jL2pO530w09vGZpS2McofDWzhkzll8cgrAI=&c=zrt1glkMLZLz080uxpA39Eu93YGtV3Ti1X2QXH5XTRdDng0ErpUHxQ==&ch=7eCbpfTA6U9o6dWcAH6ZN1RW7I4awEfimpFeu7QUSx4JAtej69GUlQ==)
---
| We need volunteers willing to work inside the polls as poll watchers and outside the polls handing our our election day flyer. You may bring a tent for shade or a chair to sit during slow times. It's very important to dress comfortably and come prepared for the weather.
---
| Amanda, Where Do You Need Me?
---
| You don't have to live in the district to help
---
| Senate District 12 is below and in Purple. This is where we need the help. If you can help out on Election Day we have needs for:
1. Volunteers to put up signs before the polls open at 6am.
2. Volunteers to work a 3 hour shift between 6am and 7pm.
3. Volunteers to take down the signs when the polls close at 7pm
4. Volunteers willing to stay after the polls close at 7pm to watch the count take place inside the precinct.
5. Volunteers to work in our office on Lucks Lane which will be open from 6am to 7pm.

---
|
---
| | [For a Closer Look Click Here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015ZOuX6tIsGBkN3QDdq1QixBJjcX6D98Z6YF6aicvOiProtasZf2icJ0zAHXCW_SKlr1KDRz5pW3ke0DdMjEdOyjpnnNlaBI4coU1fHq_11aKAbG6MV5MGAezepGizRfZY5qR-SovWkdRQKzLYxh5woiRbswTqbCtVMzL4pcrUgeOLmwe2JUAcR248BEnmYAxetlX3rDJRpYeZTxDhLl-jsHaPvvkwS7VZvR9bI7tsEPb6V2oWiSGOD-YpcXyX7yy&c=zrt1glkMLZLz080uxpA39Eu93YGtV3Ti1X2QXH5XTRdDng0ErpUHxQ==&ch=7eCbpfTA6U9o6dWcAH6ZN1RW7I4awEfimpFeu7QUSx4JAtej69GUlQ==)
---
| WHERE IS THE 12th SENATE DISTRICT?
---
| The 12th Senatorial District includes most of Chesterfield and all of Colonial Heights.
In the 12th Senatorial District, there are 51 voting precincts in Chesterfield and 5 voting precincts in Colonial Heights. Click on the link below to see a map of each Chesterfield precinct within SD 12.
---
| | [12th Senate District Map by Precinct](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015ZOuX6tIsGBkN3QDdq1QixBJjcX6D98Z6YF6aicvOiProtasZf2icFolaEfCapScpiqQ2Hc-Hn2sJul0TwNTHxL8HggPNG26WVa4nG8ON36aXMJxz5kz1QrgZ-OtCr9dsItMBcNR_3pIl4XKAK6OPF8Jw0YSt6hGqobLyykfPKN1Vwrj8uBi9nJhiSazg4ndQcXcZAMisWsh70XJjTxQ6SfvgVS6WLFJJhSQ19dGWb3fLArGTpvwd8rmoaSrJGTL&c=zrt1glkMLZLz080uxpA39Eu93YGtV3Ti1X2QXH5XTRdDng0ErpUHxQ==&ch=7eCbpfTA6U9o6dWcAH6ZN1RW7I4awEfimpFeu7QUSx4JAtej69GUlQ==)

| List of 51 Chesterfield Precincts in SD12 (Where we need help manning the polls)
---
| BERMUDA DISTRICT [111 Ironbridge Precinct](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015ZOuX6tIsGBkN3QDdq1QixBJjcX6D98Z6YF6aicvOiProtasZf2icJ0zAHXCW_SKeh3EAZ20BGKSfI2AW9DFS__i1J-ps42D53PN2rAj6HYK-ESVYsfxfAt37p88aRaquKqyMaIM745hhWkMI562UzBH2M92T7vnBpvzqCnBjHU1CjUo4ID1JoBx9_4La7HurGZ-QDo73u79u-xCwaNOb7XdXKGR2hHW9HIUqHf1_rvmFF6IaJf2Dg==&c=zrt1glkMLZLz080uxpA39Eu93YGtV3Ti1X2QXH5XTRdDng0ErpUHxQ==&ch=7eCbpfTA6U9o6dWcAH6ZN1RW7I4awEfimpFeu7QUSx4JAtej69GUlQ==) at Carver College and Career Academy at 12400 Branders Bridge Rd

clean_body: We need volunteers | | | | == | CAN YOU VOLUNTEER ON ELECTION DAY? Tuesday, June 20 1 WEEK AWAY HOW CAN YOU HELP? | | | | How can I help Amanda? | Is there anything you can do today to help us win this June 20 Primary? | | == | How much do you value your freedom? Most candidates are bought for and paid for by political action committees and lobbyists. Not me. I rely on the generous donations from you. So please answer this call for help. Anyone can donate and you don't have to live in the district to give. You may not be able to vote for me but I can still vote for you. Successful campaigns are expensive unfortunately. Many people are surprised to find out that we have to raise our own money to run for public office. I've heard people express that they didn't know about a campaign and I know it was because the candidate didn't raise enough money to get the word out. | | == | We need volunteers willing to work inside the polls as poll watchers and outside the polls handing our our election day flyer. You may bring a tent for shade or a chair to sit during slow times. It's very important to dress comfortably and come prepared for the weather. | Amanda, Where Do You Need Me? | You don't have to live in the district to help | Senate District 12 is below and in Purple. This is where we need the help. If you can help out on Election Day we have needs for: 1. Volunteers to put up signs before the polls open at 6am. 2. Volunteers to work a 3 hour shift between 6am and 7pm. 3. Volunteers to take down the signs when the polls close at 7pm 4. Volunteers willing to stay after the polls close at 7pm to watch the count take place inside the precinct. 5. Volunteers to work in our office on Lucks Lane which will be open from 6am to 7pm. | | | == | WHERE IS THE 12th SENATE DISTRICT? | The 12th Senatorial District includes most of Chesterfield and all of Colonial Heights. Fellow American,

**I am hosting a live telephone town hall to update and talk with my best supporters TONIGHT!**

**I would like to invite you to join me TONIGHT, June 13 th at 7:30 pm ET to discuss what we are doing to Secure the Senate majority next year and how you can help. To join this live conversation with me, please call 866-495-1092 at 7:30 pm ET this evening.**

Fellow American, we have witnessed how far the Radical Left is willing to go to push their liberal agenda this year. It's truly unbelievable.

While the Democrats are taking us down the path to Socialism, the truth is that we are only TWO SEATS away from winning back Republican control of the Senate next year. This election cycle, we have one of the best Senate maps for Republicans in recent history - but if we don't start the hard work now, we will lose again.

Fellow American, I will be talking about these topics and many more this evening, so I hope to speak directly with you and answer your questions.

To participate, all you need to do is call 866-495-1092 at 7:30 pm tonight (Tuesday, June 13th).

**I appreciate your continued support and look forward to talking with you on our telephone town hall.**

Thank you,

## Covid Scams: Greatest Grift in US History
Thieves of all stripes stole hundreds of billions of dollars in Covid relief funds over the past three years, arguably the greatest grift in U.S. history, a [new AP investigation](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uwyAURp_G3oguv4aBoUu2dO1oXcwlocLGMiRR375y546fPuno6Hzd5hvmkrf7J67ke6ozLj2_aAbDuGRCzmKMPhEJkiN5bqwx2gDA-PBKcuFcsGhw4sFZAA1kVYrOIek4jdkLEBIMlxyAC3tZgl60RDuB1aQSHxRQzL0el--at_6gVH7qi47LUtex-EfvexvkxyCug7jivtG7ndc5jp6XQoO47rhFWvPC0oHPyN7YOrGQS8l1a6ytWAoLz5Y3ao0VDPVgKfDo0FEQyuqJUiBlOJdKSc6RJjsePu7vE9HMNCi4r5jLn1P_P9FvAAAA__9UGGca) reveals.

The analysis found the fraudsters ranged from small businesses to outright criminal gangs and were the [result of lax oversight ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L-O4yAQgPGnwR3W8MfEKSjuCne55oorLQwz9pyIiYBNlLdf7dZbf82n37_beguc-dz_hDv6TmUNsfMTV3BSGanNqofkCVGjGdArNzs3OQAYDu8sbRTJOuMm2hxdtYmWtEob2RQQB_YatAGnjAJQeh7jNsXJhPkC84SWlLCAiXup4__CZz-Q8rs8sY6x3Ifsj94fTZhfQi9CL2GLJ77auJevLPTy-6Pxia0Jvby44t9e6lvoZa8YutwrU5f94HNvMpYnJ6musmJmJBk4ydZLxlMqAABztXaoPj1enDM3dxEW9nvg_D3Sf3b5DAAA__8KrGTU)from a government anxious to spend trillions with few restrictions.

More than $280 billion was potentially stolen, and another $123 billion was wasted or misspent, representing 10 percent of the total $4.2 trillion the government has so far spent in Covid relief.
## Trans Athletes Not Wanted in Women's Sports
Nearly 70 percent of Americans think birth gender should dictate sports participation, according to a [new Gallup Poll](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0D1uxCAQQOHT4M7WMPiHhiKNu02b0sIw2BOxBgHZzd4-SurUr3jS93HbbpYjX8e7vZNpIW3WNX7QBnMvVY9qw86bQISkOjJy1vM8zQDQnWYKqFD7BUYIoPXuF-fUHqS2Vvt9kh0bBFQwSyUBJOrB7ZOblNUL6InGIMUI5LmlMnwmvtpJIb7Sg8rg0r2L5mwtV6HeBK4C14uedThsjF_5twtcc4pR4DrBAqgErtW--p1LO_uDLk-l9-yabdTXnEqrfbalseNsG6drsDV_d8X4_OQYuc6LGOG4W45_9_Y_xk8AAAD___W7YVc).

That percentage is up from 2021, largely because of trans athletes such as Austin Killips, a male who easily came in first in a [women's cycling event](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFvwyAQRn8N3oiOAxNnYOjClq4dLYKP5FqMLUMS-d9X7tz5-_T09L6u4zVw5nL_DDO5lpYxxMYvGsFKpSXqEbvJJSIk3ZFTdrC2twDQPZwJ56SmRGEgE40ZyCYF00Smv1ziDaFjh4AarNIKQOFwirc-9joMZxh6MkkJAzRxW7bT98KlPSjlfXnRdorL3GX3aG2tQn8I9AJ92deltmMS6A-wQA9WoFco0LctlCrjHjPXJsOzNi7yh3Pmtco3lypLlFuIJG-77OXM5dmoCvTd5qb1fRyrPQsD9zlw_hNo__f4DQAA___YIWDC) this weekend, winning by an enormous five minutes.

Though Democrats are significantly more in favor of letting trans athletes play based on their current identity, even they are split evenly on the issue. A large majority of Republicans and Independents are opposed.
## Denver Nuggets Win First NBA Championship
The Denver Nuggets beat the Miami Heat 94-89 Monday night to win [their first NBA Championship](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uhDAQhJ_GdIv8AxwpKNLQXdqUyNhr2MjYCO-B8vYRSZtmpJE-jUbf53N6WoqUlg-74cAhT9YxnTjJDpQBbSZd-SEgajQVDqrru67tpJTVOsy-Vyb0Xr5Jr5TzDepG6xkf6DwG5SoatNRGdsooKZXuaze3rjW2f8i-xSYo0Uj0xPmovzIlXjHE73ziUbu8VXFYmfcizLvQo9DjdV21m0vZ88HlJoQe02zvxKv8FQiUbCwQ6UR47d4yFkivZUEucBZY0TIUlw8Ej-nEA_KLoy1cYCO7EXCGixIEOgoD3oBb7bZTTmWlXejxXhZ6rI7B7xfFSKV7iEYum6X4e5v_t_gTAAD__9Ovd-o), 47 years after becoming an NBA team. Today marks the 40th anniversary of one of mankind's greatest feats of exploration: Pioneer 10 became the first outer-planetary probe to leave the solar system on its way to the far reaches of space. Today, we're talking about how thieves stole hundreds of billions from Covid relief funds, the Senate opening an investigation into the PGA-LIV merger, and a new ranking of the most welcoming cities in the world. Have thoughts on what we can do better? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover** and let us know. We read every email and value your ideas! If this is your first time reading The Flyover, and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying the Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, | Covid Scams: Greatest Grift in US History Thieves of all stripes stole hundreds of billions of dollars in Covid relief funds over the past three years, arguably the greatest grift in U.S. history, a reveals. The analysis found the fraudsters ranged from small businesses to outright criminal gangs and were the a government anxious to spend trillions with few restrictions. More than $280 billion was potentially stolen, and another $123 billion was wasted or misspent, representing 10 percent of the total $4.2 trillion the government has so far spent in Covid relief. Trans Athletes Not Wanted in Women's Sports Nearly 70 percent of Americans think birth gender should dictate sports participation, according to a . That percentage is up from 2021, largely because of trans athletes such as Austin Killips, a male who easily came in first in a this weekend, winning by an enormous five minutes. Though Democrats are significantly more in favor of letting trans athletes play based on their current identity, even they are split evenly on the issue. A large majority of Republicans and Independents are opposed. Denver Nuggets Win First NBA Championship The Denver Nuggets beat the Miami Heat 94-89 Monday night to win , 47 years after becoming an NBA team. Nuggets center Nikola Jokic dominated the entire series, setting several . He was voted the 2023 NBA Finals MVP. Denver began the game by missing 20 of their first 22 three-point attempts, but they overcame the slow start and made critical plays down the stretch to seal the victory. ➤ Fox News sent a cease-and-desist letter to Tucker Carlson following his two Twitter reports that drew nearly 170 million views. body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWHMm8MDKN

Doug Burgum has announced his candidacy for President of the
United States

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWHMm8MDKN

Friend,

This won't take long.

We are reaching out to you today with an urgent request.

Doug Burgum announced his candidacy for President of the
United States, and we could really use your support.

Doug is a visionary leader, a successful business leader,
and a proven conservative governor. Throughout his tenure as
governor, he has demonstrated an unwavering commitment to
fostering economic growth, implementing innovation over
regulation, and putting the needs of the PEOPLE first.

Now, Doug is ready to take his transformative leadership
to the national stage.

Yet here's the thing: Doug can't do it alone. We need to
know YOU are on the team, Friend. We are gathering signatures
from patriotic Americans, like YOU, who are ready to commit their
support to Doug Burgum.

We have a goal of reaching another 10,000 signatures by
the end of the day, and we won't get there without YOU.

Please add your signature to our Official Petition to
support Doug Burgum for President RIGHT NOW to publicly stand
with us. >>

This is a crucial moment in our nation's history, and we
have an opportunity to shape the future together. Doug Burgum can
and will build a stronger, more prosperous America for all.

Remember, we need another 10,000 signatures TONIGHT. Can
we count on your support?

Sign your name IMMEDIATELY to our Official Petition to
support Doug Burgum for President.

Thank you,

Doug Burgum for America

name: Bill Spadea
subject: Is the American Dream dead?
body:
Peter, Most Americans rely heavily on active income. The kind of income that's earned by putting in time and hard work and u
|
---
| Peter, Most Americans rely heavily on active income. The kind of income that's earned by putting in time and hard work and used to cover everyday essentials like groceries, utilities, and a well-deserved vacation every now and then. _This is society's game plan, and on its own,_it usually sets you up for failure.__ When you’re about to retire, you’ll probably have spent most of your working life saving to fund your investments, such as your 401k and your IRAs... Because that’s what society told you to do. Everyone’s doing it. The return on investment in these vehicles is __not big enough for you__ to gain financial and time freedom. __So much for the American Dream!__ My good friend and Financial Expert, Rob Gill is going LIVE on Thursday, June 29th at at 8PM EDT for a Critical Meeting on **“How To Achieve Your American Dream Through The Best Wealth Building Strategies In Today's Market".** Rob has agreed to let our network in on this meeting FOR FREE.
---
| | [CLICK HERE TO SAVE YOUR SPOT FOR THE LIVE MEETING NOW](https://xtz223.keap-link007.com/v2/click/6b34cf7e44704f31cb4b735ccdec13b2/eJyNkMsKwkAMRf8l62JttQu7E5FSWl2IrmWYRg3WaZiJ1gf9d8cHrhTcJifncnMDQaOM5BWkcJZrHA8gAIuamNDIpDGi9HMbJ8NoEAVQk9lntjkypLevxx_gMY6i_igAuTB6ZLkYT4p8nq3LfF54kpX1GX95RnHy0Uxn47yErvvpxQPJ9OTVDlKxR3wUqsiXkpWtPb8TYZeGYdu2PWTSG_LpmlTtxCrBLaHr6eYQOlYVKi9UzGiq9zMKvLy03R05smkC)
---
| If the name Rob Gill sounds familiar to you, it's because he is a fellow New Jersey resident and recurring special guest on my live show, Common Ground. When he comes on and reveals financial golden nuggets, the feedback from my audience is incredible.
---
|
---
|
---
# Rob wants you to know that the American Dream is alive and well. All you need are strategies for building your wealth that have worked for so many people, including me.
# [Click here to register for the LIVE meeting now.](https://xtz223.keap-link007.com/v2/click/19fa14635b1cd863c1e007c113686692/eJyNkMsKwkAMRf8l62JttYjdiYiUVheiaxmmUYN1Gmai9UH_3fGBKwW3ycm53NxA0CgjWQkpnOUaxz0IwKImJjQyro0o_dzGST_qRQFUZPZTWx8Z0tvX4w_wGEdRdxCAXBg9slyMxnk2n66LbJ57kpX1GX95hnHy0Uxmo6yAtv3pxQPJ5OTVDlKxR3wUKsmXkpWtPL8TYZeGYdM0HWTSG_LpmlTlxCrBLaHr6PoQOlYlKi9UzGjK9zNyvLy07R03_mkA)

---
|
---
| **The government doesn't want you to know how to escape the rat race.**
In fact, it's constantly looking for ways to keep people trapped in society's broken game plan, and I'm sick of seeing our fellow citizens get taken advantage of by government bureaucrats. For this reason, I've set out on a personal mission to use my voice to help spread the word of financial education. **If you'd like to learn the most effective ways to build your wealth in today's market so that you can turn your American Dream into a reality,** **[click here to register for the meeting now.](https://xtz223.keap-link007.com/v2/click/37aec423e817a16aa290b90fedf8199a/eJyNkMsKwkAMRf8l62JttQu7ExEpVReiaxmmUYN1GmZS64P-u-MD3Si4TU7O5eYKgkYZyQpI4SSXOO5BABY1MaGRUWVE6cc2TvpRLwqgJLOf2KpmSK9fj9_AfRxF3SQAOTN6ZLkYjvJsPllPs3nuSVbWZ_zlGcQfzXg2zKbQtj-9eCAZH73aQSq2xnuhgnwpWdnS8zsRdmkYNk3TQSa9IZ-uSZVOrBLcErqOrg6hY1Wg8kLFjKZ4PSPH81Pb3gA2Smj-)** To Your Success, Bill
---
| It’s time for Common Sense ideas and policies to dominate the landscape instead of the vicious and totally counter-productive partisan attacks that only serve to embolden the elite power brokers.You’re a part of the Common Sense Club because you know that we need RESULTS from our government, NOT RHETORIC. Many arrogant, elitist elected officials crushed our way of life during the misguided, unnecessary and deadly lockdowns. Now it’s time to hold them accountable for their actions, ignorance and negligence. The tide is turning, and today is only STEP ONE!

This year’s elections provide a can’t-miss opportunity to support small businesses and families with fiscally responsible policies, restore an education system that puts students and parents over the radical agenda of the NJEA elites, and protect and preserve our civil, economic, and medical liberty.
We believe that our government should serve the people and provide the expected services that we’re paying for! It’s time for government to function as a public service, not a propaganda tool for radicals.
We believe in REDUCING tax burdens on working families AND empowering the skilled trades and small businesses.
We believe our schools should reject Critical Race Theory and the sexualized curricula. It’s time to empower parents and stop the NJEA once and for all.
I hope you’ll join me TODAY as we discuss the results of this year’s critical elections.
If you want to stand with me against the out-of-touch career politicians who are taking New Jersey down the wrong path and help restore Common Sense, you’re in the right place!Please join me during my show tonight, call in to share your thoughts, and watch the results of this year’s elections live as they come in!
Together, we can keep working to restore Common Sense and save New Jersey and America.
Thank you,Bill Spadea
---
|
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://xtz223.infusionsoft.com/app/optOut/0/4fd6eb57577aacb0/9701069/9bf2781bde603e80) Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: Mass masking again
body:
It's happening | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen/masking-again?e=9828080a05)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

Wouldn’t it be nice to have authorities who actually know what they’re talking about? Why are they talking about masking AGAIN as a one-size-fits-all prevention technique? We have to continue to stay vigilant during these times, as government power seems to consolidate with big tech and big pharma.

Please [watch this critical video](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=d2a1c7b465&e=9828080a05) and share it with friends and family by clicking the thumbnail below:
---
| [ ](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=e607f256db&e=9828080a05 "Mass Masking Again in the USA?")
---
| It still seems like science is being pushed by the wayside in favor of political science and narratives of control. In the same way "health emergencies" are weaponized, other such "emergencies" may become the next tool of control. It's important to continue to call leaders out and share information - even as tech giants try to silence dissenting voices.

I found it fascinating that in the past week Facebook founder [Mark Zuckerberg](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=b1ced0a1f2&e=9828080a05) admitted the government pressured Facebook to censor TRUE Covid information AND former Twitter CEO Jack Dorsey admitted he didn't realize how much [engagement Twitter had with the government](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=eabced51cc&e=9828080a05) before Elon Musk took it over.

This is so critical. Big Tech, Big Pharma, and Big Government continue to form a formidable [Triad of Tyranny](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=33928f273e&e=9828080a05). That's why I [wrote the book](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=4dd935798f&e=9828080a05) and that's why I won't stay silent.

The fight must continue. Learn more about our [lawsuit against Keith Ellison and members of the Board of Medical Practice.](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=dead9f2488&e=9828080a05)

And don't forget to pray for our country and our leaders!

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Minnesota Family Doctor
---
|
---

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Did you see this wolf news Friend?
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend,** | **Protect wolf pups from vicious trophy hunting and our planet from Big Industry attacks. Donate $27 to help us reach our $4,500 goal before any more wolves die and it’s too late for our ecosystems.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1820046?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1820047?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1820048?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1820049?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Blood splattered on blooming flowers. A mother wolf and her pups sprawled on the ground. Lifeless.
As you read this, bloodthirsty trophy hunters are GUNNING DOWN innocent wolves and their babies with no remorse. And in some states, gray wolves have __**no federal protections**__ to keep them safe. The second they set their paws in unprotected areas, they don’t stand a chance. [**Help protect vulnerable wolves and their pups from trophy hunters, and donate $27 today to help us reach our $4,500 goal for wolves and the planet!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1820050?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
Trophy hunters are tracking down and targeting wolves across the U.S. This puts them more at risk each day. Mama wolves are being torn apart by bullets. This outright massacre leaves their babies to starve, freeze, or fall prey to other species. But private interests are working to kill more wolves and take over the lands they call home -- **all to turn a profit.**
That’s why wolves need your help urgently, Friend. With members like you in this fight, we can make real change happen. Change that can help protect wolves, their habitats, and the planet. But trophy hunters and Big Oil lobbies are actively fighting back against protections for these precious creatures. Wolves need you now more than ever. Will you join the fight?
**Help us work quickly to protect wolves and our planet before the loss is too great and donate $27 today to help us reach our $4,500 goal!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1820046?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1820047?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1820048?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1820049?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The news is eye-opening: **only 6,000 wolves remain in the lower 48 states.** But the slaughter shows no signs of stopping. But it’s not enough for trophy hunters to simply kill vulnerable wolves. Right now, wolves are enduring some of the most vicious hunting practices we’ve seen.
Montana, Idaho, and Wyoming allow some of the most _horrific_ hunting practices. _**Choking wolves to death in snares. Running them over with snowmobiles. And even dynamiting nursing wolf mothers and pups in their dens!**_ Baby wolf pups who manage to survive longer than their mothers are left orphaned. All alone in the world, they have no other option but to suffer from starvation, hypothermia, and predation. **Friend, no wolf pup should be fighting for their life when it has barely begun.**
Some states offer protections for wolves, but these precious canines aren’t bound by state lines. They often roam into neighboring states like Wyoming, where it’s legal to hunt them at any time _even without a permit._ Wolves in Yellowstone aren’t safe from the slaughter either -- the park recently lost a record high of 25 wolves, leaving only 89.
What’s worse -- trophy hunters are actively pushing against protections for these helpless creatures! Montana and Idaho have passed laws legalizing helicopter chases. **The Biden Administration has gone so far as to file an appeal to remove some critical protection for wolves. The appeal could push this vulnerable species closer to _extinction_.** Friend, how long will we let this pattern continue?
**These vicious hunting practices can’t continue. Rush your $27 donation and help us reach our $4,500 goal by midnight tonight and protect wolves and our planet!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1820046?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---

---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1820048?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1820049?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Wolves are intelligent creatures that are vital to their ecosystems. They help keep elk and deer populations in check, allowing other plant and animal species to flourish. The remains of their kill redistribute nutrients and feed scavengers. They truly are a keystone species, and the reckless murder of wolves will have ripple effects throughout their ecosystems.
Trophy hunters and Big Polluters are pushing against protections for these precious animals and many others. They know the Endangered Species Act stands in the way of the polluters harming communities, driving climate chaos, and destroying biodiversity across the country. That’s why they’re working so hard to roll back the protections the law affords. These special interests want to kill wildlife for fun and take over their lands to drill, mine, frack, log, and operate factory farms.
**We don’t have much time to protect America’s wolves before they disappear forever -- with consequences for the entire ecosystems they support.** Friend, your membership gift today can help save wolves from these vicious attacks and protect the future of our planet. But we are facing pushback from private trophy-hunting interests and Big Polluters. We need to step up our efforts before it’s too late. Will you donate $27 or more before private interests wipe out wolves and destroy our planet?
**Protect wolves, the ecosystems they rely on, and the planet: Donate $27 or more and help us reach our $4,500 goal today!**

subject: Just Real News; No Bull SH**
body:
No Clickbait - No woke Agenda - No Wasting Time

| [ No Clickbait - No woke Agenda - No Wasting Time](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668230%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8wOaBoEerZ5w4501if8q2g&sysid=1)

**JUST** REAL **NEWS**

---

The corporate news media wants your attention, and they'll do unscrupulous things to get it.

We don't work for them. We work for you (for free*).

^ more on that in a minute

**First, Ask yourself:**
1. | Wouldn't it be nice to trust the news I'm reading?
---|---
2. | Wouldn't it be even better if trustworthy news came straight to me instead of sifting the internet for a nugget or two of un-biased information??
3. | How much time have I wasted digging through an avalanche of stories across the Internet to figure out what's true and important?

[There is a better way!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668232%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fwmWPKzBuvFAQATS%2fvIRuA&sysid=1)

Instead of being a Fake News victim -- sign up today for a **FREE** newsletter called [_The Flyover_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668233%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2X3nh78Hr5zCLLeDyhZmpw&sysid=1). Without the hidden agenda, slant, or bias, our talented team of editors dig through hundreds of sources and pull out the most important news of the day - so you don't have to. Get informed on breaking news, politics, business, sports, world affairs, science, technology, and many other topics with a single email - a 5-minute read, once-a-day - delivered directly to your email inbox.

You know it's bad when half of the American people decided national news organizations simply want to mislead, misinform, and push biased opinions on the American public.

This massive shift happening in the American Media is a good thing. The corporate elite news media has lost the trust of the American people.

Don't don't get left behind & miss this EXCLUSIVE opportunity to sign up for FREE today.

# Hello !
We’re 7 days away from election day! Here are a few updates about our campaign.
| | | | | |
---
# Join me this Thursday!
Thursday, June 15th, 2023, at 6:00pm at 5535 Blue Valley Way, Delaplane, VA 20144.|
---
[RSVP Now](mailto:Events@quillforvirginia.com)
---
| | | | | |
---
|
## Did you get the latest mailer?
The latest mailer compares me to my opponent. Who do you think has what it takes to beat the democrat (Josh Thomas) in November?|
---
[Meet Josh](https://quillforvirginia.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4748996a05a433fd69cc0588e&id=cfcd1c98fe&e=8787be5d90)
---
| | | | | |
## I support congressional term limits.
“More than 80% of Americans have rejected the career politician model and want to replace it with citizen leadership. The way to achieve that goal is through a congressional term limits amendment. Josh knows this and is willing to work to make sure we reach our goal.”|
---
[Read More](https://quillforvirginia.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4748996a05a433fd69cc0588e&id=6da5b6324f&e=8787be5d90)
---
|
---
| | | | | |
---
|
## We need your help!
We have 5 days left of early voting and 7 days until election day. Join the team and help us spread the word.|
---
[Sign up](https://quillforvirginia.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4748996a05a433fd69cc0588e&id=b16982732f&e=8787be5d90)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Will we let Republicans keep criminalizing abortion in states around the country?? We have a chance to head them off in Virginia, coming up in this State Senate primary on June 20th.
body:
June 20th primary
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2a537452-5911-4edb-8ea3-c6b3a1a82be1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Will we let Republicans keep criminalizing abortion in states around the country?? **_Sure, we've had great victories in Michigan & Minnesota. _Yet, recently, as The Guardian pointed out:
> _Nebraska's state legislature passed a 12-week ban.., days after another 12-week ban cleared its final hurdle in North Carolina._
Recently South Carolina was added to this list with an even more cruel six-week ban. _We must stop them from adding Virginia to that list!_ [**We have only a one vote pro-choice majority in the VA State Senate, as _one "Democratic" Senator, Joe Morrissey, is anti-choice. But, we can replace him in 7 days _****_with progressive champion, Laschrecse Aird!_ **](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb028004f-7804-44d1-b86e-5a4883c41992/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Aird has specifically labeled her campaign "Roe not Joe" _(as in Morrissey)**. She has the support of every female VA State Senate Democrat, Congresswoman Abigail Spanberger and many male VA State House & State Senate members. _Again, we have **only one week until an election **that may **determine whether millions of VA women retain their right to choose, or a "Democrat" joins Gov. Youngkin and a GOP State House to pass a full ban.**_ [**_Will you please join Blue Amp Action's own "Roe Not Joe," campaign by giving Lashrecse Aird $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can, so she can replace Morrissey as a critical vote to protect abortion rights in Virginia?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2dfe5a49-aab4-42e8-9a44-1cf401f9da8a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for fighting for all women in Virginia and around the country. Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T52b5974b-e8f7-4479-9206-97afbda32a01/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:
The 'Digital Dollar' is now a reality.

|

# **Financial Freedom in America**
# **will soon be gone!**

**The 'Digital Dollar' is now a reality.** On November 15th, 2022, the Federal Reserve announced they are now testing the **'digital dollar'.** They'll be joined by major banks like Citigroup, HSBC, Mastercard, and Wells Fargo. **And you should be scared!** The 'digital dollar' puts all your money in the hands of the government. They'll be able to....
* **Know what's in your accounts and what you buy**
* **Limit what you purchase and the causes you support**
* **Take everything away with the click of a button**

name: Joe Sweeney
subject: Celebrating a Budget That Puts NH Families First
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman
body:
Unpacking our historic budget: Putting NH families first, bolstering our economy, and how you can help!

| | | | | [](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fexpand-majorities/1/01000188b4a2ab8b-2fb77258-c340-4262-9c76-ee92fe8c3f8f-000000/ekh1K26WKALtUsyWV3s-u7NnuiY=326)
---
| | Derek,

If you have been following the news recently, you'll know we have had a momentous week in New Hampshire politics. Speaker of the House Sherm Packard and Senate President Jeb Bradley have outlined the profound impact of our recently passed state budget in a powerful op-ed. [I'd like to take a moment to share their insights and underscore why this budget is so crucial to our state's future.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.unionleader.com%2Fopinion%2Fop-eds%2Fsen-jeb-bradley-rep-sherman-packard-a-budget-that-puts-nh-families-first%2Farticle_5afd2bf2-336c-5576-869b-f68a867242b4.html/1/01000188b4a2ab8b-2fb77258-c340-4262-9c76-ee92fe8c3f8f-000000/WPAc91Oc6qPlAkKzSLujEq3P9O4=326)

---
[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.unionleader.com%2Fopinion%2Fop-eds%2Fsen-jeb-bradley-rep-sherman-packard-a-budget-that-puts-nh-families-first%2Farticle_5afd2bf2-336c-5576-869b-f68a867242b4.html/2/01000188b4a2ab8b-2fb77258-c340-4262-9c76-ee92fe8c3f8f-000000/3Cmz2GOmvs_23t1BOf_tXLZj-jA=326)
---
Our Speaker and Senate President affirm that the state budget was crafted with one guiding principle: putting New Hampshire families first. We have created a plan that carefully balances the needs of our communities with fiscal responsibility. This budget does not introduce new taxes or increase existing ones. It is a testament to conservative governance that respects the hard-earned income of Granite Staters. **And, by January 1st, 2025 it will make New Hampshire truly Income Tax Free when the Interest & Dividends Tax hits 0%.**

This budget goes even further by providing unprecedented local property tax relief. We're sending $245 million in Rooms and Meals Revenue Sharing back to our communities. This move significantly eases the tax burden on our families, strengthening our communities for the future.

In education, we've ensured that state aid will benefit the towns and students with the greatest financial need. Moreover, we're investing in higher education, increasing state aid to both the University System and the Community College System of New Hampshire, which will help freeze tuition for New Hampshire students.

[I encourage you to read the full op-ed to learn more about the additional efforts we've made in mental health, substance abuse, safety, and affordable housing.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.unionleader.com%2Fopinion%2Fop-eds%2Fsen-jeb-bradley-rep-sherman-packard-a-budget-that-puts-nh-families-first%2Farticle_5afd2bf2-336c-5576-869b-f68a867242b4.html/3/01000188b4a2ab8b-2fb77258-c340-4262-9c76-ee92fe8c3f8f-000000/Wut4ytvpbp6uspGqERtday4wz6A=326)[
](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.unionleader.com%2Fopinion%2Fop-eds%2Fsen-jeb-bradley-rep-sherman-packard-a-budget-that-puts-nh-families-first%2Farticle_5afd2bf2-336c-5576-869b-f68a867242b4.html/4/01000188b4a2ab8b-2fb77258-c340-4262-9c76-ee92fe8c3f8f-000000/P6fLOQh5Z3lb1o6FYeJYnCWbVc0=326)
Now more than ever, we need to continue the work of fiscal responsibility and putting our families first. To do so, we need to ensure that we can win a larger majority for conservatives and Republicans in the upcoming 2024 elections. This is where Granite Solutions steps in.

Granite Solutions is dedicated to electing fiscal conservatives who will continue the work started by this current state budget. To ensure our mission's success, we rely on your generosity. [Please consider donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today to help us reach our goal.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.granitesolutions.org%2Fdonate/1/01000188b4a2ab8b-2fb77258-c340-4262-9c76-ee92fe8c3f8f-000000/GfiNhG2GRpLJNnsPeZULN189jzI=326)

Thank you for your continued support. Together, we can preserve the New Hampshire Advantage for generations to come.

Best regards,

Rep. Joe Sweeney
Founder and Chair, Granite Solutions

---
| | [Donate to Granite Solutions](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.granitesolutions.org%2Fdonate/2/01000188b4a2ab8b-2fb77258-c340-4262-9c76-ee92fe8c3f8f-000000/opOHxl4LLIoKdwmghUCX7fSaJdo=326 "Donate to Granite Solutions")
---
_P.S. We cannot afford to be bystanders as New Hampshire's future unfolds. Let's take a stand and expand our fiscally conservative majorities._[_Your generous contribution of $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today will empower our efforts, ensuring that we can continue to advocate for fiscal conservatism at all levels of government._](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.granitesolutions.org%2Fdonate/3/01000188b4a2ab8b-2fb77258-c340-4262-9c76-ee92fe8c3f8f-000000/QZt9u0zh6wzgN3AXGZmXac2Kl5c=326)__

---

| Please ask Hanover, Louisa, and Henrico friends to vote to re-elect my friend and fellow Republican, Delegate Buddy Fowler in the District 59 primary June 20. The new district 59 is within the boundaries of Senate District 10. I am super excited Governor Glenn Youngkin joined me in endorsing Delegate Buddy Fowler. Please vote in this primary on Tuesday, June 20th. You can vote early now through this Saturday, June 17. Please tell your friends. [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KMbrmEuwXHeb9GiqCMt8Xxcrf5q3NbVQ8db2_od0zQHDvO5LwsPKHrwskMTcYzus_Igr2Dift8Edtu_PhGGyoeFoL5czPMoPuurteSAAyODy_EtOwjywVyT104QGSTiu7Z5Nm2JmUyKWqZMEorpO_u9EUbWOZtSsFQD_VXdkGIm4z_dq2lIqUQdo0EppanksSUaLP7TmRu_SWY0UZ642mm925nHxbJmybzbM3Q4ieWXLozBLwHhVPhp9DGDEALgBhPHQCXb3n5E=&c=8VDmGHrXRpz2iCMnLmnd4KkGuppgFSmfmjp6DDdT4RGC6acF3Vkeyw==&ch=Ab3CIHvYSU9C2zAjgp0gfipJYUrh3ZjbgCai34YDQinJVVyKwAnpiw==)

| Life, Liberty, & the Pursuit of Happiness
---
|
---
| We all want to live, work, and raise our family in peace. Unfortunately, due to radical leftist policies, "We the People" are less free and less safe at the local, state, and federal level. As your State Senator, I will continue focusing on protecting and preserving our God given rights, Life, Liberty, and the Pursuit of Happiness. We live in the greatest country in history. Unfortunately, Democrat policies are destroying our American way of life. There is a major effort by the Left to eliminate God, mock women, and put our children last. Trust in our American institutions is being eroded.
In addition to a serious national fentanyl problem, violent crime is on the rise in Virginia, and I am being told crime statistics are being underreported.
RICHMOND, Va. (WRIC) -- "Crime is increasing in almost every sector, according to a comprehensive report released by Virginia State Police on Friday, June 9." | After the Virginia Republican House of Delegates caucus retreat, my wife, Tracy, and I stopped by Bedford, VA for the National D-Day Memorial ceremony. We honored and remembered our heroes who freed Europe in World War 2. Bedford had the largest loss of life per capita than any other locality in United States on D-Day. Governor Glen Youngkin and General Williams laid a wreath at the monument to honor and remember our fallen. We enjoyed speaking with World War 2 veterans in attendance.

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Re-elect Delegate Buddy Fowler | == | Please ask Hanover, Louisa, and Henrico friends to vote to re-elect my friend and fellow Republican, Delegate Buddy Fowler in the District 59 primary June 20. The new district 59 is within the boundaries of Senate District 10. I am super excited Governor Glenn Youngkin joined me in endorsing Delegate Buddy Fowler. Please vote in this primary on Tuesday, June 20th. You can vote early now through this Saturday, June 17. Please tell your friends. == | Life, Liberty, & the Pursuit of Happiness | | We all want to live, work, and raise our family in peace. Unfortunately, due to radical leftist policies, "We the People" are less free and less safe at the local, state, and federal level. As your State Senator, I will continue focusing on protecting and preserving our God given rights, Life, Liberty, and the Pursuit of Happiness. We live in the greatest country in history. Unfortunately, Democrat policies are destroying our American way of life. There is a major effort by the Left to eliminate God, mock women, and put our children last. Trust in our American institutions is being eroded. In addition to a serious national fentanyl problem, violent crime is on the rise in Virginia, and I am being told crime statistics are being underreported. RICHMOND, Va. (WRIC) -- "Crime is increasing in almost every sector, according to a comprehensive report released by Virginia State Police on Friday, June 9." == "Children should be taught how to think, not what to think." Our schools have children last policies that are hurting our kids. It is anti-American and ridiculous to put boys in girls sports/ bathrooms, to have sexually explicit books in schools, and to push other divisive ideologies like CRT. The Democrats locked our children out of schools during the pandemic, ignored science, and looked the other way when sexual abuse happened in Louden County. They do not believe parents should have a say in how your child is educated. It is no surprise homeschool students score 80% above the national average for reading, writing, and arithmetic. To see how the plandemic affected children: == Democrats let violent criminals out on the street with earned sentence credits. Let's face it, soft on crime hard on taxpayer Democrats are the reason our streets are less safe and our wallets are empty. Big Democrat Whoppers: We knew all along Democrats lied about the Russian dossier, Russian collusion, and Trump's phone call to Ukraine. The Durham report came out and says the Trump Russia scandal was a big hoax. == We have major problems in our country. Democrats have weaponized the FBI and lied about the Wuhan lab, masks, vaccines, FBI and big tech censorship, the hunter Biden lap top, the Fed's involvement in January 6, open borders, and more. They expect us to believe the 2020 election was the most secure election in history, even though they changed election law across our nation under the guise of the pandemic. Good News: We have Republican Governor Glenn Youngkin working hard to retain the house majority and also gain the senate majority. The American people may be waking up. For example: Several teachers fired in Rhode Island for not taking the experimental vaccine now have their jobs back and with back pay. == Trust must be restored. We are working with Governor Glenn Youngkin and other fellow Republicans to improve Virginia, rebuild trust, and make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family! | Anti-Woke Commercial | == | "When I grow up I want to work for a woke company." In this new satirical commercial, they mock the ridiculous nature of today's woke workplace. Because the truth is, no one dreams of growing up and working for a company that censors their speech, tells them how to think, and judges them by their skin color or gender. == | Trump to Appear in Federal Court Today | | More rules for thee not for me. Donald Trump, front-runner for the 2024 Republican Presidential nomination, was charged with 37 felony counts for retaining classified documents, including nuclear secrets, at his Florida home, and blocking the government's efforts to retrieve them. Did you notice no one cares to discuss the classified documents Vice President Joe Biden had in his garage and other places? Are we now a Banana Republic? Going after Trump is election interference at the highest level. == | What Kind of Heart do You Have? | | A harsh tongue equals an angry heart. A negative tongue equals a fearful heart. A overreactive tongue equals an unsettled heart. A boasting tongue equals an insecure heart. A critical tongue equals a bitter heart. A filthy tongue equals an impure heart. A encouraging tongue equals a graceful heart. A speaks truthfully tongue equals an honest heart. A gentle tongue equals a loving heart. | Re-elect Angela Allen School Board | == | I am a six-year member of the Virginia House of Delegates Education Committee, a father of five, and I support Angela Allen, Goochland School Board member, District 2. School boards must be transparent with the communities they represent. The censure of reprimand against Angela Allen is an attempt to silence conservative voices, and it is wrong. It is wrong to put boys in girls bathrooms and it is wrong to hide this from parents. Join me in encouraging Angela to continue to speak up for the people she serves. == | Goochland High School Graduation | | | | | | | | | | | I had the honor of attending the Goochland High School graduation. thank you parents, teachers, and staff for preparing our young people for life! | D-DAY June 6, 1944 | | | | Goochland County was well represented in Bedford, VA at the D-Day Memorial. | Governor Glenn Youngkin and the outgoing Adjutant General Timothy Williams. | | | | | We ran into fellow veteran, a Ranger, and a SD10 constituent Jim Wilson. | | My wife, Tracy, and I, the outgoing Adjutant General Timothy Williams and his wife, Cheryl, also a veteran. | | April Cheek-Messier invited me to this D-Day event almost a year ago. I am glad we made it! | General Patton's grandson Pat, Senator Edwards, Delegate Walker, and myself. | You can never have enough Marines around. | | Our World War II veterans are a national treasure and unfortunately less are around each day. Thank you! | After the Virginia Republican House of Delegates caucus retreat, my wife, Tracy, and I stopped by Bedford, VA for the National D-Day Memorial ceremony. We honored and remembered our heroes who freed Europe in World War 2. Bedford had the largest loss of life per capita than any other locality in United States on D-Day. Governor Glen Youngkin and General Williams laid a wreath at the monument to honor and remember our fallen. We enjoyed speaking with World War 2 veterans in attendance. | HEAV | | | | | I attended the 40th annual homeschool convention of HEAV (Home Educators Association of Virginia) at the Greater Richmond Convention Center. Homeschool students perform 80% above the national average in reading writing and arithmetic. It's been an honor working with HEAV President Yvonne Bunn legislation to improve homeschooling and Virginia. To learn more == | Appomattox County | | On our way home, we met up with a couple of Appomattox County supporters for lunch. | Middle Resolution Education Panel | | | | Angela Allen, school board member of Goochland County, and Vicki Hurt, school board member of Powhatan County, did a great job on the education panel. | Misc Photos | | | | | | | We are making friends all over the district. We look forward to seeing you soon! | | My Final GOP Delegate Retreat | | | | | | | | | | | It was bittersweet attending my final Virginia House of Delegates caucus retreat. I made many friends and learned a lot from these folks over the last six years. I'm looking forward to continuing service in the State Senate. | Appomattox GOP Party | | | | | | I attended the Appomattox GOP committee party to celebrate their Republican nominees for the House of Delegates and State Senate. We gave out signs and made new friends. Thank you for the donations and the kind congratulations. Now we must lock arms, work together, and win and November! | Song of the Day MercyMe - I Can Only Imagine (Video) | | For a little inspiration, == to listen to MercyMe - I Can Only Imagine (Video) | == | I'm running for State Senate so we can un-California Virginia. It starts with election integrity. For a better future, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and stop the madness. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. I am committed, as your Representative, to adhering to the principal duties of government, as stated in our Declaration of Independence, i.e., the protection of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. Thank you, once again, for allowing me to serve you in the Virginia House of Delegates. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district! | 70 Plus Endorsement List == | == == You can donate == or by mail. If you'd like to donate by mail, please make a check out to "Friends of John McGuire" and send to: Friends of John McGuire P.O. Box 168 Manakin-Sabot, VA 23103 | | | | | | | God Bless America, Delegate John McGuire Running for == in 2023 Jesus is my Savior John 3:16 Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner Pro-Life == Pro-Gun America 1st The Spirit of Virginia Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 == NFIB 100 Endorsement List == == == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA Email: john@mcguireforvirginia.com | | == | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | Friends of John McGuire | Friends of John McGuire, PO Box 168, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

# [Add your name: Don't Give Trump Special Treatment When He's Arrested - Handcuff, Mugshot and Fingerprint Him!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdfa846e1-346b-4376-bc3a-8ce6527ebbea/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | Donald Trump is about to be formally charged with a range of crimes by Federal authorities, a process that will start with his official arrest. Typically, this involves being handcuffed, fingerprinted, and getting a mugshot, but Trump reportedly will not have to go through all of these steps, given his status as a former president. This is a terrible idea. If no one is above the law, then Trump should be treated like every other prisoner, starting with the first step. So handcuff him, take a mugshot, get fingerprints, and go through all the usual steps. [**Add Your Name: Don't Give Trump Special Treatment When He's Arrested.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2fe9b7cf-788e-4273-8628-1fe79d3577f7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

body:
\- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGL2zAQhX-NfLOxR8ooOfjQrchhw5aFFrbtJcijSTJbSza2vGH_fXFI9vq9x_A-xsexl9Nnq-yTArhImBWA0t8UwME8_f6Bh7eDK_tn_lM63JjrmsJ3BZA_R_6q3q9UHL30K7WuCC3QFogKbhvcImINTVNcWtzogB2R3aEl5MbU281OY8ccjO1OVEgLNegaG92A0Y2pGG2nvSWqtbeNMcrUV0lVGJLvw3ueljhWNMSiby85j_Nt0l7BfmZaJq6ukiYOa2Nl_oNLH3kS8uX7ICmXpyWFycss6VzSEKPkzKxg322b3cmitdqQr7ug9H7J8Rg5yBKVdndZXOE8LBOx0o7k6O-MfBy9nJPS7iH0SIaUOWWl3U6DVYDH1EtQ2v16e0mcn19fft7g7R3awfg6XTb__n4UUxvGq_S9zGiVqc_rglXsfwAAAP__soyMog)
---
Friend,
Please say a prayer for America today. Because our justice system is DEAD.
At about 3 P.M., the Biden Department of Justice will have its leading opponent (_me_) ARRAIGNED at a federal courthouse in Miami despite having committed NO CRIME.
I want to take this moment to THANK YOU for all of your support.
**I am blown away by all of your donations, your support, and your prayers.**
