body:
|
---

Team, with Republicans lawmakers passing extreme laws attacking voting rights, eliminating reproductive freedom, undermining gun safety, and more, it’s easy to get weighed down by bad news.

**That’s why we needed to make sure you saw this good news** ⬇️⬇️ | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64742445/411117301/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230613_FR_6M_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImViMzBmMjRhLWVjMDktZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=p92JzrdgUGGiUyLCqtIhxQSG0BYWVbTTdILeugBH5Ug=)
---
[**_Help the NDRC keep fighting for fairness nationwide: Donate now >>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64742446/411117302/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230613_FR_6M_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImViMzBmMjRhLWVjMDktZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=p92JzrdgUGGiUyLCqtIhxQSG0BYWVbTTdILeugBH5Ug=)
Last November, our efforts to secure fair maps, protect voting rights, and elect Democracy Defenders helped Democrats take full control of states like Maryland, Michigan, and Minnesota for the first time in _years_. Now, those Democrats are passing legislation to advance key progressive priorities.
**Our hard work is paying off, team – and it couldn’t have happened without supporters like you.**
A.G. Holder said, **“When the people are able to participate in the democratic process, they have the power to protect democracy and deliver real change.”** That’s _exactly_ what we’re seeing in states like Maryland, Michigan, and Minnesota.

But now, Republicans are doubling down on their efforts to use anti-democratic tactics like gerrymandering and voter suppression to hold on to power – because they know that when voters are able to make their voices heard, they’ll reject the extreme GOP agenda.
**The NDRC will keep fighting until the process is fair and the voters’ voices are heard in every state. Will you pitch in now to help us replicate our successful strategy across the country?**

They’ve got targets on their backs and the only way to stop the Democrats’ attacks is to make sure their campaign war chests are fully funded. They’re working hard to deliver for the American people and they need us working just as hard to support them. name: American Defense News
subject: Take the National Survey on Socialism
body:
Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country.

This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zh7iipjidd3iv2oipg45r01ij705anbhb7ra7fp0_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdjmeob1cjh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zg0vllg7l2p3bdah7kc7qvv836k8scos75rho4m0_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdjmeob1cjh2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9ps1nkmbpavno01m03j9grtd5bqr4tq1oi757t8_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdjmeob1cjh2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

American Defense News
---

name: Ruben Gallego for AZ
subject: not great.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
There’s some good news... and some bad news.
#

**First the good news:**

Ruben Gallego's campaign for Senate in Arizona is funded by a record number of contributions made by people of all backgrounds from all communities -- almost all small dollar donations in pursuit of big change.

We're very proud of that fact and you should be too. It's a great contrast from the way Senator Sinema funds her campaign.

**Now, the bad news:**

Last quarter, our average donation was around $30. This quarter, it's significantly less -- about $20 this month. That is a big part of the reason we're well short of where we need to be toward our fundraising goals. Which is... not great... to say the least.

So what that means is we either need A LOT more contributions before Thursday's mid-month fundraising drive or we need people who have given before to chip-in a bit more than they did previously.

Peter, normally we ask people who have yet to make an online contribution to give just $1 or $3 to get started. But we need to ask you to do a bit more today. $10 would go a very long way toward helping us reach our goals.

So what do you say?

[**Can you PLEASE use this link to contribute $10 to Ruben Gallego's campaign for Senate in Arizona today? It will all add up FAST if everyone is chipping-in. We would not ask if it was not so important.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june23.4TsbMb&refcode=em230613-1-f&t=1&akid=702%2E734936%2EdjE2Ql)

_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $10](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-june23.btIcr7&amount=10&refcode=em230613-1-f&t=2&akid=702%2E734936%2EdjE2Ql)**
---
****

---
Thank you in advance for your help today. It means everything to our chances.

\- Ruben for Arizona

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=702%2E734936%2EdjE2Ql). name: Sean Themea
subject: I thought this was America!
body:
Arizona State University (ASU) tried banning the Constitution from campus!

[](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c70719%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6r0k4SqM6dqAIR2Bmq92Pw&sysid=1)

Friend,

Arizona State University (ASU) tried banning the Constitution from campus!

_**A public university not only censored the student handing out Constitutions. They worked with the city to convict the student of trespassing.**_

YAL activist Tim Tizon set up a table to distribute pocket Constitutions at ASU. But school officials tried removing Tim from the area, citing he had to get permission to set up. And after he refused to stop passing out pocket Constitutions, he received a conviction.

_ASU has used its speech and assembly restrictions to harass activists such as Tim for years._

**But this story has a happy ending ... please continue on.**

This is just one example of the censorship students face on college campuses from radical left-wing administrators. Our universities have been hijacked by radical activists who routinely use any excuse to undermine the freedom of their students.

I am Sean Themea, the Chief Operating Officer at Young Americans for Liberty (YAL). YAL is the nation’s largest, most active, and most effective youth liberty organization on campus and in American electoral politics.

My goal is to raise $50,000 before the end of the month to help us win free speech victories on college campuses. We’re targeting 10 more campuses next fall, and you can play a critical role.
[Your urgent donation of $10, $35, $50, or even $100 today helps thousands of students fight for liberty in their schools. Please click here to show your support >>>](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c70710%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VEHAUPdoa0XtVqOwBFrBbw&sysid=1)

What happened to Tim?

After a year of wrongful prosecution, the courts acknowledged that Tim’s rights outweighed the school’s desire to prosecute a student for trying to share the Constitution with his classmates.

**Arizona dropped the charges, relieving Tizon of the conviction and sentence, which included a fine and community service.**

This is just _one more win for YAL student activists_ in the fight for their freedom, but our work is far from over.

College campuses have gotten so bad that Yeonmi Park, a defector from North Korea, was shocked by the level of censorship.

“I expected that I was paying this fortune, all this time and energy, to learn how to think. But they are forcing you to think the way they want you to think. I realized, ‘Wow, this is insane. I thought America was different, but I saw so many similarities to what I saw in North Korea that I started worrying.’”
Young Americans for Liberty is leading the fight for free speech on college campuses. And last year was our best year yet!

In 2022, Young Americans for Liberty:
* **Abolished COVID mandates, pepper spray, and free speech bans on college campuses across the country,**
* Trained over 1,000 young activists in one weekend, and
* Signed up tens of thousands of new students across the country.

Our victories on campus are important. Conservatives and libertarians can not concede universities to the radical Left.

If we’re going to win, then we must defeat them on their own grounds.

But we need to reach even more students if we’re going to have a real impact nationwide. That’s where you come in.

[All you have to do is click here to join the fight for liberty >>>](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c70711%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3nhkAWE5lD7CXz8v%2foN37g&sysid=1)

Young Americans for Liberty students make huge strides toward liberty on their campuses every year.

We help students engage with politics and policies on a deeper level with our in-depth programming and outreach. YAL works diligently to bring a meaningful pro-liberty message through student-led events and activities.

And with your support, we can reach even more students in 2023!

You can set up YAL for another successful year of helping students get informed and find their place in the fight for liberty!
[Donate $10](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c70712%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=h7g2kfIAIz03qqhSwRJn0w&sysid=1)
[Donate $35
Donate $50](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c70713%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=f8ctQVtKURlQcrsNFn%2bLjQ&sysid=1)
[Donate $100](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c70714%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7i9kDfuubMO9RvuG6fuEaQ&sysid=1)
[Donate $250](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c70725%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KfnLOSLspH%2bCjFdyBz92BA&sysid=1)
[Donate $500](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c70726%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PSh2bLdQN6WpdDZXTAn%2fyA&sysid=1)
[Donate $1,000](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c70727%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ShnslDf2pOzlemcDv2nwTg&sysid=1)
[Donate $2,500](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c70728%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EloB1d1ApOiPRu5NI%2ffMIg&sysid=1)
[Donate Any Amount](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c70729%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZzMUaEJ1rfCTyj0fPFOaeA&sysid=1)
Sincerely,

Sean Themea
Chief Operating Officer
Young Americans for Liberty

Contributions or gifts to Young Americans for Liberty, Inc. are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. No goods or services are given in exchange for any contribution._

name: American Action News
subject: IRS loophole allows ANYONE to collect up to $28,544 before September 10
body:
Thanks to a little-known IRS loophole...

| **“Amazon Loophole” could hand you $28,544 in “royalty” payouts** [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv56sgbdvnmktn4dktj4897kgr1e9vvnl3a8at2o_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdjm9oj2clh2bs) Thanks to a little-known IRS loophole... Regular Americans can **collect up to $28,544 (or more)** in payouts from what Brad Thomas calls the “Amazon secret royalty program...” And the best part is, there are:
* NO age or income requirements... (It’s available to anyone 18+ or older)
* NO employment requirements... (You can be working part-time, full-time, or even be retired)
* And you NEVER have to shop or sell a single product on Amazon... (It only takes 5 minutes to set up!)

See how to collect the next payout before the strict cutoff deadline._ **[Watch short video now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqjje9058lel2idcvnfhoc83omrbm9l9b5ss9dpo_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdjm9oj2clh2bs)**

name: Team Cori
subject: RE: LGBTQ+ rights and the Equal Rights Amendment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Enshrining LGBTQ+ rights in the Constitution | |
---
Peter, Black trans women and gender expansive people have been at the forefront of Pride, the broader movement for LGBTQ+ rights, and the push for the Equal Rights Amendment to the Constitution. For example, Pauli Murray -- a Black transgender attorney, ordained clergy, and civil rights activist -- advocated for the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) as an important tool to eradicate racialized gender discrimination. Carrying on the legacy of trailblazers like Pauli, Cori Bush and Ayanna Pressley recently introduced pro-ERA legislation and launched the first-ever Congressional Caucus for the ERA. **The ERA is an important tool****to protect queer and trans people, and it’s especially needed as anti-trans attacks are on the rise.** [**Please sign if you agree: It’s time for Congress to affirm the ERA as the 28th Amendment to the Constitution, in order to protect people of marginalized genders.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkf3VLciM-Z8uNbg2tzVUP8s89jt0o9OVP4hgTTDj3AXY16LqBksuAykawZzMWn4vmuIA4NBlPqCWIbEMf5-LcrFYJlUhVC0Auz4BcrzC1AZePgBtrPVWnJ3hHf9QtLFrdBz0Smv5Y0_HaxxS_sp16s2gTzzGhnhoF6qYAOaiFMPRqzaGO1Di0L5PitgfHJmn9xGRyASkRLZabU47zs7SRBr1XZYX4CEPP-jyCEnQDbm5evyIZENWxDqvSVOC2ukQw4PvYOgre1HvwE27N8k7LPtm9J07WlddWTyjkPZiv_oEPmZ8caC7b8W8lpmJLjpP8ox88hSaA48bazT2LfREGBPZQfwAzeurt5bBdvNc7u2DhzyWms_y2tQ8ewk8Eetw1lmGAMI-ZzAq4HuFdA1QtsMNp-Obr-SMwxiKsAb9NTO-SWzeM297wxUu5oXTfcxpE/3x0/sBB4qlSDTtaeeV_1kwSwlQ/h0/LDMtMHinh-4dHTuxKL24ezzMcp-_ilGe8J2df4NJcx0) **[SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkf3VLciM-Z8uNbg2tzVUP8s89jt0o9OVP4hgTTDj3AXY16LqBksuAykawZzMWn4vmuIA4NBlPqCWIbEMf5-LcrFYJlUhVC0Auz4BcrzC1AZePgBtrPVWnJ3hHf9QtLFrdBz0Smv5Y0_HaxxS_sp16s2gTzzGhnhoF6qYAOaiFMPRqzaGO1Di0L5PitgfHJmn-_4-HPYI3Ju7d-a6XgT2IJFvfDA4Mtbl-_x_pxNfv9MDiVcgR8BkbMNQxfB-EHs3p0eZZ4CQ5AOnXjPYx8j9ttiw9ufbgqKhtlzXQvZZYql7IlwAlrYYowKPtXK9Dhs_NO-lwUYTL5OeNCNkobuL6he2J0MVld0sNovi_TIXVg48V2Z5PhghZuNTItCmc_4Nc4MEnFL7_p4Zguz3MkqwO5JrDQYvKBi0embcRGlM4CdwoIkKWL589XSHK0P69uBVk/3x0/sBB4qlSDTtaeeV_1kwSwlQ/h1/svWeiguaJraB4UiktF9cF4faY_JTcxUWjPMjcOfA4Jo) ** Our movement has met the requirements outlined in Article V of the Constitution to make the ERA the 28th Amendment: The ERA was passed by 2/3rds of Congress and it has now been ratified by 38 states. Now we just need a few more steps to make it official! We will keep you posted about this work, and in future emails we’ll explain more about how we can use the ERA to secure more rights like abortion access. In solidarity, Team Cori **[SUPPORT OUR MOVEMENT](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xlrM5M3VFujs4CvGRI-eTLhC_IqjPYQ6ex7rbOI8brMHUvA7KM12Phx4SyL7vLuByNDZrJgVD-VJ_HlY4txqNQEWwJNwWKPt9sTWjiBM2otMIwSZ0TzI2VyGjWMExinZklkf773YJ_pyYLnuXkPuwYmaea6DBuwTU-7mH0mN2iVb8u1ezTm9J0SNSW6l3HNFACS0dfI8CTycqDfn0PLLUzBjJugD1Q0cjEDa9ncUBZhwpIE8HUp5BiOzfgKCQs-33ZqicF2AWR-obqYECPlKsEVBVWLPzrzAGgZ_VyhhyXMi7CRTS7UvuZEZ_YtjVHlLv51y2ffH7tOcqMHLq11fBVxP3vfEZkvOMchgwH6dhmecKTPlWYbjfKQ30HZO0oX70/3x0/sBB4qlSDTtaeeV_1kwSwlQ/h2/msPX1k_ucFwP4fS6nQS1qiRpnxRRudZygP0FO-GJNUA) **

name: Joe Kent
subject: $125 Tickets for Matt Gaetz Gala!
body:
Dear Friend,
On Saturday, July 1st, my campaign is holding a gala in Lake Tapps, Washington State. My special guest for this event is Congressman Matt Gaetz. The event has a 1920s theme and will feature live music, an open bar, and great food, all at a beautiful estate.
You will not want to miss this amazing event!
You can now purchase a Gala Only ticket for $125 at [https://joekentforcongress.com/Gaetz](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/R5UiAyYgv2KRxNJSXoLDAg/iXjfOYD5qNxIPb9W9Ifm6g).
Additionally, an eight-person table can be purchased for $1000.
_The Great Gaetzby_ will be an evening like no other, so make sure to get your tickets before it's too late.
Respectfully,
Joe Kent
P.S. - We are selling tickets for the event at [https://joekentforcongress.com/Gaetz](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/R5UiAyYgv2KRxNJSXoLDAg/iXjfOYD5qNxIPb9W9Ifm6g).

clean_body: Today is a dark day for America. | | | Friend, The America that we all knew and loved is gone. In its place now stands the Democrat’s Third World tin-pot dictatorship that will ARRAIGN a completely INNOCENT man today. What was once a nation of , by , and for the people is now run by far-Left radicals and Deep State bureaucrats who are attempting to IMPRISON their leading political opponent NOT for committing a crime, but for putting YOU – the America People – FIRST. The Democrats believe theirunjust and un-American arraignment of President Trump today will finally be the end of the America First Movement. They couldn't be more wrong! The President knows it, you know it, and by this time tomorrow, our movement will be TWICE as strong and more united than ever before. Which is why we want to show him a list of ALL the patriots who stepped up to peacefully defend our incredible movement during this unprecedented and dark day. | Thank you for all of your support, Team Trump Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Well, you might want to start thinking about it. In case you didn’t see our note, one lucky supporter (and a guest!) are going to get to meet Joe and Jill -- and it could be you! Joe and Jill are really looking forward to this, Peter. Best of luck! Biden-Harris HQ \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Julie Chavez Rodriguez Date: Fri, June 9, 2023 Subject: Want to meet Joe and Jill? To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Hi there, Peter -- I’ve been working with President Biden for a long time. One thing I know for sure is that his absolute favorite part of being on the campaign trail is talking with folks like you one-on-one about the issues that matter to you -- what you're passionate about, what keeps you up at night, and what you want to change in your community. And now’s your chance to have your very own conversation with him! Today, we're launching a contest where one lucky supporter (and a guest) will get to meet Joe and Jill -- and the flight and hotel stay are on us! You’ll have a chance to chat with the President and Dr. Biden and even grab a photo. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: As a former CIA officer

body:
It is vitally important that anyone with access to classified information do everything required of them by law and by duty to keep that information safe.

| Peter,
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64757252/411151127/1394223873?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230613-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzljMzMzMDgtZjgwOS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wvO0XMj0VGQoyX8-K_RM78-7L0H_vB1LaeCloq78YyA=)
Yesterday, I went on MSNBC to discuss the former President’s disregard for our nation’s secrets and the grave risk his actions pose to our national security.

As a former CIA officer, I used to collect the information and write up the intelligence reports that the former President so cavalierly stored in boxes at his home. The precautions U.S. intelligence agencies take to safeguard America’s secrets are extraordinary — because this information is paramount to our national security and the lives of America’s servicemembers. The idea that these would be haphazardly strewn across the floors of Mar-a-Lago is unthinkable.

It is vitally important that anyone with access to classified information do everything required of them by law and by duty to keep that information safe. As outlined in this indictment, the former President of the United States did not do that.

When asked to return documents so that they could be kept safe and stored as intended, the President joined with others to hide those documents and lie to federal investigators. This callous disregard for our nation’s secrets was at the detriment of national security and the safety and security of our servicemembers whose lives are on the line if classified information gets out to the public.

This incident further cements my resolve as a member of the House Intelligence Committee to defend our nation’s secrets and our servicemembers. [__**If you support my work, I hope you will consider contributing to my campaign today so I can continue to protect our intelligence, our national security, and our servicemembers.**__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64757254/411151130/1394223873?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230613-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzljMzMzMDgtZjgwOS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wvO0XMj0VGQoyX8-K_RM78-7L0H_vB1LaeCloq78YyA=)

clean_body: It is vitally important that anyone with access to classified information do everything required of them by law and by duty to keep that information safe. | Peter, = Yesterday, I went on MSNBC to discuss the former President’s disregard for our nation’s secrets and the grave risk his actions pose to our national security. As a former CIA officer, I used to collect the information and write up the intelligence reports that the former President so cavalierly stored in boxes at his home. The precautions U.S. intelligence agencies take to safeguard America’s secrets are extraordinary — because this information is paramount to our national security and the lives of America’s servicemembers. The idea that these would be haphazardly strewn across the floors of Mar-a-Lago is unthinkable. It is vitally important that anyone with access to classified information do everything required of them by law and by duty to keep that information safe. As outlined in this indictment, the former President of the United States did not do that. When asked to return documents so that they could be kept safe and stored as intended, the President joined with others to hide those documents and lie to federal investigators. This callous disregard for our nation’s secrets was at the detriment of national security and the safety and security of our servicemembers whose lives are on the line if classified information gets out to the public. This incident further cements my resolve as a member of the House Intelligence Committee to defend our nation’s secrets and our servicemembers. = | = I am grateful for your support, Abigail * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. name: =?utf-8?Q?Tracey=20Mann?=
subject: Conservative Kansas Values: Family
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mann for Congress, Inc
body:
Faith, Family, Freedom, Personal Responsibility | | |
---
| |
---
| Dear Kansan,

Growing up in Kansas taught me that family forms the fundamental reality of life. It’s the bedrock of our existence as people, and the ties that bind us together in a loving family are stronger than any bonds on earth. I look at our country today, and I wonder what Washington Democrats could possibly be thinking when they advocate for some of the policies that they champion. Kansans, not the federal government, know what’s best for their own kids in terms of **_education_**. Kansans also know that **_inflation_** is crushing families in our communities.

I support the **_Parents Bill of Rights_** , which is built on five common sense principles:

**✓ ****Parents have the right to know what their children are being taught.**
**✓ ****Parents have the right to be heard.**
**✓ ****Parents have the right to see the school budget and spending.**
**✓ ****Parents have the right to protect their children’s privacy.**
**✓ ****Parents have the right to keep their children safe.**

I also voted for the **_REIN IN Inflation_** Act, which will force the Biden Administration to publish the inflationary impact of its executive orders before enacting them. From canceling the _Keystone XL Pipeline_ to pushing socialist “ _Green New Deal_ ” regulations on small businesses, President Biden must be held accountable for the harmful impact of his failed agenda, which continues to drive up the prices of goods, gas, and groceries.

_When President Biden took office, inflation was at 1.4%._

_Inflation hit 6.5% for the calendar year 2022._

The American family is hurting. Inflation is a tax on all Americans and people are afraid of what their children will be taught in American public schools. That’s not a picture of the America I know and love.

The **WOKE MADNESS** and the **WASTEFUL SPENDING** must stop now.

**_Please join me in the fight to protect our freedoms._** You can ([Click Here](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=93be855d67&e=a9d1410029)) or visit my website at [www.traceymann.com](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=96aabaac6b&e=a9d1410029) to learn more or contribute online.

In the Fight,
Tracey Mann

P.S. I stand for Kansas, and I always will. I promise that I will do everything within my power to ensure that our kids have a bright future. Please donate today and help take our country back.

clean_body: Faith, Family, Freedom, Personal Responsibility | | | | | | Dear Kansan, Growing up in Kansas taught me that family forms the fundamental reality of life. It’s the bedrock of our existence as people, and the ties that bind us together in a loving family are stronger than any bonds on earth. I look at our country today, and I wonder what Washington Democrats could possibly be thinking when they advocate for some of the policies that they champion. Kansans, not the federal government, know what’s best for their own kids in terms of education. Kansans also know that inflation is crushing families in our communities. I support the Parents Bill of Rights , which is built on five common sense principles: ✓ Parents have the right to know what their children are being taught. ✓ Parents have the right to be heard. ✓ Parents have the right to see the school budget and spending. ✓ Parents have the right to protect their children’s privacy. ✓ Parents have the right to keep their children safe. I also voted for the REIN IN Inflation Act, which will force the Biden Administration to publish the inflationary impact of its executive orders before enacting them. From canceling the Keystone XL Pipeline to pushing socialist “ Green New Deal ” regulations on small businesses, President Biden must be held accountable for the harmful impact of his failed agenda, which continues to drive up the prices of goods, gas, and groceries. When President Biden took office, inflation was at 1.4%. Inflation hit 6.5% for the calendar year 2022. The American family is hurting. Inflation is a tax on all Americans and people are afraid of what their children will be taught in American public schools. That’s not a picture of the America I know and love. The WOKE MADNESS and the WASTEFUL SPENDING must stop now. Please join me in the fight to protect our freedoms. You can () or visit my website at to learn more or contribute online. In the Fight, Tracey Mann P.S. I stand for Kansas, and I always will. I promise that I will do everything within my power to ensure that our kids have a bright future. name: Team Lizzie
subject: #TeamLizzie Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230613nl?refcode=folf230613nl [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230613nl?refcode=folf230613nl]
Lizzie and our team have been out and about at home lately, checking in with people across the district, and of course, celebrating Pride! On June 1, we kicked off Pride month at event with #TeamLizzie supporters.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230613nl?refcode=folf230613nl [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230613nl?refcode=folf230613nl]
And we’re excited to continue celebrating at Houston’s Pride Parade on June 24! Join us as we celebrate and show our support with Texas Rep. Ann Johnson! A limited number of spots remain — RSVP today to secure one!
RSVP HERE TO WALK IN THE PARADE [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScBl5dzfvQ-v2MVqWAdRNYbRMAqaL1X0jrzEtrXwnoU7Muvcw/viewform]
Limited spots remaining!
It was also great to see so many friends who work hard for Texas families at the Latino Labor Leadership Council and the Texas Gulf Coast Area Labor Federation Working Families Dinner recently.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230613nl?refcode=folf230613nl [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230613nl?refcode=folf230613nl]
We’re so excited for our Democracy Summer internship program, which kicks off this month. The newest additions to #TeamLizzie will learn how to organize and campaign, as well as about the history and dynamics of our country’s political landscape, while helping us get the word out about Lizzie’s re-election campaign and all that’s at stake in the 2024 elections. Since 2017 our interns and fellows have been an essential part of our team, and we can’t wait to get started!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230613nl?refcode=folf230613nl [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230613nl?refcode=folf230613nl]
We’re nearly halfway through the year, and 2024 will be here before we know it.
The next FEC reporting deadline is at the end of this month, so we are working to make sure we have the funds we need to enter the election year with our campaign in a strong place. Any amount you can contribute would help us get there. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230613nl?refcode=folf230613nl]
Thanks for being part of the team,
Team Lizzie
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230613nl?refcode=folf230613nl]

Lizzie Fletcher for Congress
3262 Westheimer Road, PMB 636
Houston, TX 77098

name: Rachel Patterson, Evergreen Action
subject: What wildfires have to do with truck emissions
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN COLLABORATIVE
body:
Today is your last chance to secure strong pollution standards
| | | | | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3139?t=2&akid=13398%2E53494%2Ex7jSg8)
---
| | Friend, Last week, Americans across the country were breathing in some of the most polluted air in the world due to climate change-fueled wildfires. **The same pollutant—particulate matter—that made it dangerous for New Yorkers and Michiganders to step outside their homes is also being spewed out of vehicle tailpipes every day.** By poisoning the air we breathe, transportation pollution is literally killing people—and disproportionately in low-income communities and communities of color.
**But, there's good news** : EPA can regulate this kind of pollution from some of the worst offenders: medium and heavy-duty trucks. [**Tell EPA to lock in the strongest possible standards now.**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-support-strong-clean-truck-standards_v2?source=ema_2023_06_13_HDV-rules&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=100clean&utm_source=email2023_06_13&t=3&akid=13398%2E53494%2Ex7jSg8)
---
[**SIGN ON NOW**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-support-strong-clean-truck-standards_v2?source=ema_2023_06_13_HDV-rules&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=100clean&utm_source=email2023_06_13&t=5&akid=13398%2E53494%2Ex7jSg8)
---
Today is the last day to get your comment to us, so we can deliver it directly to decision-makers. We all deserve clean air to breathe, and we need strong emission standards to fight climate pollution and protect public health. **This is our chance—let's take it. **
---
[LAST CHANCE: SIGN ON NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-support-strong-clean-truck-standards_v2?source=ema_2023_06_13_HDV-rules&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=100clean&utm_source=email2023_06_13&t=7&akid=13398%2E53494%2Ex7jSg8)
---
Sincerely, Rachel PattersonDeputy Policy Director Evergreen Collaborative

name: Aurora at United We Dream Action
subject: Not having DACA has made life an everyday struggle
body:
For millions like me, DACA is not enough. | | | Hi Peter, my name is Aurora. 👋 I applied for DACA in 2021 — **just as Judge Hanen’s first decision against DACA stopped new DACA applications like mine from being processed.** Not having DACA has made life an everyday struggle for me and my family. Everything from being able to find work or make ends meet, to accessing health care and higher education is affected by not having DACA. My two sisters support my parents thanks to their jobs. Both of my parents are undocumented like I am, so it’s difficult for them to find work. Without a work permit, I’m limited on job opportunities which makes it hard to pitch in with my own paycheck. My mom has a thyroid condition and my sister has Leukemia. Frequent visits to the doctor and pricey medication means it can be tough to make ends meet. Even my education is impacted, since college tuition can be extremely expensive and I’m shut out of scholarship and financial aid opportunities. I received an Associate's Degree, but now I want to go back for my Bachelor's. **For millions like me, DACA is not enough.** Whether we were blocked from the program by Judge Hanen or ineligible to begin with, only permanent protections will make us feel safe and give us opportunities to thrive. The possibilities are endless, but only if we secure more than temporary protections. Before the 11th Anniversary of DACA this Thursday, I’m joining United We Dream Action to fight for a pathway to citizenship — for ALL undocumented people, regardless of DACA status. **Peter, will you join me? Make a donation to join our fight for permanent protections on the eve of DACA’s anniversary.** | | [DONATE NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8mx_5ABkFHmeFViL7NEeBD_AogMf18kAB-piHwjkW8FGs_Q30q4jlM8VhOrnEZMvgQUu_IpGjqKFyvGqoN-CwAu0qJ0aTiRI4hjjO5BFefN9sJ_BJKDelPbqOWXUA4I7Gm8lYZ8mDd5GW0w2_99KP8KSicjBSda_n_0sA3Hzo5TnWMCU6161AjnaFlTQXefnfvpAVAhxVMDD0Cm-6RWTFspwWH3qPS3S0lNjXPfDsTNNolHCwebYAy2mH4TbO3x6cvhWqF6a3-A8TGJGH5TfYfg_L3XHn2ejSaRNwSh3RUilYtSPV5eAJW7quVr3ihk42D3zWzK2GNCKavYCuVFquMVEmBZBGLvBiDCIj-3ZD8jJn-39S9jDa4kMoazQIJJafxwt79lSCzc5Z8JjBgX6yruYpAU8fkgX720dmnRWk-Hg/3x0/3gCa9oB_STC4XPyBIuhO8A/h0/edVv_WVX-SpMQaE18atje7yNpeJVkOW8FLplJDc1g2s)
---
The 11th Anniversary of DACA coming up on June 15th is also a reminder of the power our community has to win real change. Activists and allies fought relentlessly to win DACA, and we’ll need to come together again to win permanent protections.
Permanent protections would mean I’m no longer in constant fear of being deported. I could continue my studies, help support my family, and not worry if there will be food on the table. I could do great things without the limitations of being undocumented and unprotected. 🧡
Thank you for letting me share my story and joining me in pursuit of a better future for all 11 million undocumented people.
Aurora, United We Dream Action

| **Before DACA's 11th Anniversary, UWDA is ramping up our fight for permanent protections. body:
| | | Peter, it's Rick Scott. Since day one in the Senate, I haven’t been afraid to stand up to the DC establishment.
It made me some enemies. In fact, some people call me the **_least popular man in Washington._**
But I don’t care what the DC establishment thinks of me. _**I answer ONLY to the people of Florida.**_
**[Right now, we have a critical deadline for our mission to RESCUE AMERICA, and I need your help.](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=257f5b6f9503455289ef0cb56fdf3027&_e=mMse11KGBJrQ_hdmbooJxjq9zi1apJxY8A5Jy6kHcOb9dNVrdu7TZkQ3_HLWFQ0XGtP9cJl9t-2pEg6f-di0gkiiZwER0rc3oq2NeR8rGI7UDI92NChYv_nQ-Kwg2h07CXh2XtEoCUeZNgOF9ycMzq0mlp1370KXWctToReXHQkoIEVs_Ac10GA2WpaJ0qjogYWbp_7ozZ83S3D-jTKp7yFjURi9aDhAAtMT1Vg59v5pVp4btwQrKtaFYT3WjYzdBzJKL38B3f5uQcoHoKm8bPUW8ApT2oI4unfLeEOz82A3Ktr28rCIxKzjpZ4gf8BcZekht7YNqGaUCmZE5TNY2Ua5bZbG2Mnpnp8cuaLfhtQ%3D) **

name: America First Legal
subject: Trump Indictment (Urgent Update)
body:
| |
---
Patriot, The Biden Administration has turned us into a banana republic. The indictment of former President Donald Trump is a despicable move done for vulgar political advantage by Joe Biden, Merrick Garland, and the Deep State apparatus that fears and hates Donald Trump and the patriotic Americans he speaks for. _**But we at America First Legal are vigorously fighting back in multiple ways right now! **_
| [**SUPPORT OUR WORK NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62818885:6TT7JYINt:m:1:3299561967:5529C3141E0E50ED847A94930E70B5B4:r)
---
**Remember** , earlier this year, America First Legal's investigation revealed that the **Biden White House** was involved with the partisan raid of Mar-a-Lago, and that the National Archives (NARA) misled Congress. It appears that the Biden White House and DOJ coordinated to obtain the Trump records and perhaps create a pretext for the law enforcement raid of Trump's home. America First Legal's lawsuit against NARA continues to reveal evidence of the Biden family's extensive use of Joe Biden's role as Vice President to gain special access and favors for their friends and family during the Obama Administration, and there's much more to come! _With your generous support, the America First Legal Team will continue to**aggressively** _expose the criminal misconduct and weaponization of the FBI, the DOJ, and the entire federal government_ by radical elements within the Biden Administration! _
| [**SUPPORT OUR FIGHT NOW >> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62818885:6TT7JYINt:m:1:3299561967:5529C3141E0E50ED847A94930E70B5B4:r)
---
As our **America First Legal VP,_Gene Hamilton_ , announced the night of the indictment: ** _" ...the Biden Administration's Department of Justice has completely and totally destroyed any semblance of its impartiality. More than that, it has caused significant societal harm that will unfold for years to come in ways we cannot currently imagine. On the heels of the Durham report--which revealed an unprecedented effort by the DOJ to take down a political opponent--they have once again taken a further step down a road of unparalleled action that appears intended to destroy a political opponent of the ruling regime..." _ America First Legal will continue to fight hard in court to expose the Deep State conspiracy to control our country. _With your critical support, we will be victorious and the Biden Administration will be finally be held accountable for its corruption_. _**Please support us now.**_
| [**DONATE NOW >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62818885:6TT7JYINt:m:1:3299561967:5529C3141E0E50ED847A94930E70B5B4:r)

name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: What is our purpose?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsC-6yMDpN

Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think
about God and to worship Him.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osC-6yMDpN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Fellow American,

I hope your day is going well. I'm writing to
let you know about something I think you'll find useful in your
learning.

Reason and speech are gifts from God that
enable us to think about God and to worship Him.

One of the chief aims of education at
Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as
well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to
understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as "theology,"
has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching
back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that's what
Hillsdale's "Theology 101" online course is about-the development
of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

"Theology 101" has been a popular course, so
I'm pleased to let you know that it is now available for you to
own on DVD. You can add it to your home library or give it as a
gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock,
though-and they go fast-so don't delay in getting your copy of
"Theology 101" on DVD. Secure yours right now at:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61916017:sC-6yMDpN:m:3:2532013465:05386A65A8C1467D37BF57DA738EE5CB:r

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: The Long Run PAC
subject: Big News from Mandela & The Long Run!
body:
Mandela and The Long Run are proud to endorse:

Senator Tammy Baldwin
Tammy Baldwin has been a trailblazer for women and the LGBTQ+ community and is running for re-election to keep a voice in the Senate for working Wisconsinites.

Colin Allred for United States Senate
Congressman Colin Allred is running to defeat Ted Cruz and give Texas a Senator they can count on.

Ruben Gallego for United States Senate
Congressman Ruben Gallego is running for Senate to deliver common sense solutions for Arizona families.

Congresswoman Yadira Caraveo
Dr. Yadira Caraveo is running for reelection in Colorado’s 8th district to continue fighting to, combat climate change and protect reproductive freedom.

Will Rollins for Congress
Will is running to unseat extremist Ken Calvert in California’s 41st district and to fight back against corruption in Washington.

Sarah Klee Hood for Congress
A veteran and working mom, Sarah is running to replace anti-choice, anti-social security, and MAGA incumbent Brandon WIlliams in New York's 22nd district.

Josh Riley for Congress
Josh is running for Congress in Upstate New York to change political and economic systems that have been rigged to benefit special interests at the expense of working folks.

Mandela and The Long Run are excited to endorse their first round of pro-democracy changemakers in critical races across the country.

These candidates are the key to maintaining and regaining the Senate and House Democratic majorities. And these endorsements are just the start of the change we can build together.

If you support our mission, please make a contribution to The Long Run to fuel our movement to elect and support changemaking candidates across the country.

CONTRIBUTE: https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/3272?akid=4520%2E196590%2EE9jxO1

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.mandelabarnes.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=4520%2E196590%2EE9jxO1

subject: The northeast was covered in intense smoke

body:
| | | If you'd like to unsubscribe,[click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GLNp5FjRArZ2gECnWf63UZWzcCuYR-Es9PjYmAXR4JxZbuH_t8O228MjZNOxN7Lm2WoL5eKG3lZx13kI8WltFNDqNiz5UYoPSR1XUBR8a5k2LwBPsqRSsu5JsgTo4BMmrRQcTD-SQF7-sifBeXOfSuQi_-ItmXEE2yXGlTztY66elZ4RZ-OkN3brCj1VP3iXTvxCd0jekDcQ4PAob39O0f0C3HGoTKThExgbL4XgvCqZr6sUmV9RrfYR9SXiau7n0XBGIaLJqZgBgmy9_8qmqIeh97GnkMWFJhOo94zlB9EYwx2YQJVzGIBBiyQFTj2rvbnCi1riZMZkDG5j1xUOkO6AKkrqQ46P_KPbe6s9uPIfuZ6RqTg2wsxon0VOAhYFsJien8eNxIDDHlstrJGh_deCKn5_4zcRJqGF7UnCko9xWCsz4dNfXmwU-g_XjydX1/3x0/oP_shQ_pQnClq09S0CRK1g/h0/_xPyOUmW7FdzfzlnBPhUlTVvOlmhrrYwmkXVa9pY0lM) | | You’ve seen the headlines: Last week, an intense level of smoke blanketed the northeast.

As a doctor, I know how dangerous poor air quality can be. It poses long-lasting damaging health effects for _everyone_. With climate change continuing at speeds faster than any scientist expected, we’re only going to experience deteriorating air quality.

Our children are going to be the ones who will have to deal with the impacts of the climate disaster we’re in right now. I want more for my three kids—and all kids—than that.

From flooding here in South Carolina to wildfires in the west, we need to take action now.

**_[We each must do our part to enact effective climate action. The threat is real, so will you sign my petition by midnight tomorrow to demand climate action from our leaders? I need 1,000 signatures to help make the point.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl-vRswUTt0wSRsVUTolC16k3c7m0ebim6BAyMLLIG9PkDoMcZnQSbx61b3fCv4WDPm94z0YeZQmmgaHDtpy6d50EGfvUcN9krYQMLIqIGYeLRau1wzdAoWDUGlvXVuNX_XAxytPqSKiKLozvOVHtYbzhbu1p1KrMdzrMf3F5vvgTlhI68IORLEhCB4g3_VrFKRGKYRx-NZFLUqlAYk2EsgV92e_PV1yC2JP6mQZFlXJC1VwVxHWE6Ewi_wY812gDPSkabSOCRmTgPFv_WVvLwQw_m9vfAAdnuoyafdUDhYJ_7hVPKlIPc6dX1cmrFZq5Vzb7JEJ8XfNI185qbDDtERpbdTKaj8NY0WoJfOLj1YSg/3x0/oP_shQ_pQnClq09S0CRK1g/h1/AuhFul8GVoT_NYX3raB9WsappdL71ia92aigDkjTfiA)_**

Our children deserve to be able to live, learn, and play without harmful environmental toxins surrounding them.

That’s why Their Future PAC’s climate action policy is clear:

✅ We stand for environmental justice. Climate action shouldn’t just be quick, it should be equitable.

✅ We believe in the need to remove environmental toxins like neurotoxic pesticides and mercury from areas kids spend time in and push for federal regulations controlling toxic substances.

✅ We believe that our children should have access to uncontaminated natural resources. We advocate for policies that reduce pollution in our waterways, in the atmosphere, and more.

✅ We support technological development as critical to climate change mitigation, from those that implement renewable energy sources, carbon sequestration technologies, and other yet-to-be-imagined technologies.

✅ We believe that our children deserve to inherit a stable environment. We acknowledge the unique role that carbon emissions play in climate change and support policies that reduce carbon emissions on a national and international level.

✅ We recognize the role of sustainable development in ensuring the health of our environment and communities, supporting policies that encourage sustainable development.

✅ We believe children have the right to live free from environmental threats. We support the Paris Climate Accord and advocate for policies that aim to limit global temperatures from rising above 2oC through market, technological, and legislative measures.

It is time to stop standing by and start helping in the fight for a better tomorrow. Our children deserve so much better than the planet we are passing down to them.

**_[Sign on to help create a better planet for our children.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl-vRswUTt0wSRsVUTolC16k3c7m0ebim6BAyMLLIG9PkDoMcZnQSbx61b3fCv4WDPm94z0YeZQmmgaHDtpy6d50EGfvUcN9krYQMLIqIGYeLRau1wzdAoWDUGlvXVuNX_XAxytPqSKiKLozvOVHtYbER9F93ktwYpoDaDAGihbszI4CLeRWlEnYjbaiqklyGJ1VAs7bgabZQ-BL3TJYkPwu3GWdCK3JXHjMlDCbDpe9r_FY5-itgfRh350rHPb6h-lXxqawLrl9YCzf1fi3VAYllzwksMLaHasvPxRztZsnaVOsac_jcSABasKWtspJwnfAxvxeDLyZZa7NHavuVZigw99bsO0wg9tHqS2bNjNtA/3x0/oP_shQ_pQnClq09S0CRK1g/h4/28a-ZaGGPx2YOgCFIuZtW3Xgv70QiBXGKwx7ACJJlRQ)_**

— Annie

clean_body: | = Last week, I talked with NPR about how fringe right-wing conspiracy theorists harmed a trusted organization that helps states fight voter fraud. It's a stark reminder of the threats we face in defending our democracy. The tactics used by these extremists are unfortunately all too familiar. First, they spread lies and disinformation targeting respected organizations and individuals. Then, their baseless narratives led to a pressure campaign for Secretaries of State to withdraw from the organization. Sadly, eight states were affected by this pressure and withdrew. This incident serves as a disturbing example of the influence extremists can have on our democracy. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = You have my word: I am committed to defending the integrity of our elections in Minnesota and across the nation, but I can't do it alone. As we approach the crucial 2024 elections, we have to stay focused and push back against these dangerous forces. Every step we take to protect our democratic processes matters. = | = | = | = Thank you, team. Steve | = | = With Steve’s leadership, Minnesota has led the nation in voter turnout for the past three out of four elections. His top priorities are defending our democracy, strengthening the freedom to vote for all eligible Minnesotans, pushing back against dangerous disinformation about our elections, providing support for small businesses, and enhancing security protections for our most vulnerable. = Prepared and paid for by Simon for Secretary of State Committee Simon for Secretary of State Committee P.O. Box 4217 Hopkins, MN 55343 United States **

body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64763010/411173481/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjE1ODk1MS0wMzBhLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rWAoO7REbYOZtcUcsy9KGSmomFL91Im1_OxSfQiK3Hc=&emci=83cfcf0d-6509-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=5b158951-030a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364)
---

| | Did you know your letters and packages could be under government surveillance? **The U.S. Postal Inspection Service has been tracking senders and recipients of tens of thousands of letters and packages** and handing that information over to law enforcement agencies without any court oversight. This surveillance is known as "mail covers." Mail covers don't provide information about what's inside letters or packages, but they can still reveal deeply personal information about Americans' political leanings, religious beliefs, or causes they support. And moreover, the USPIS is handing that information over to law enforcement agencies without first receiving a warrant. **This is a gross violation of your privacy and First Amendment rights.** You know I've been leading the charge in Congress to protect Americans' right to privacy from every angle, and this is no different. **That's why I'm now leading the effort demanding that the federal government stop collecting this private information and handing it over to law enforcement without a court order.** Americans should be free to live their lives without government intrusion. I won't rest until everyone's right to privacy is protected. More soon, _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: | | | | Did you know your letters and packages could be under government surveillance? The U.S. Postal Inspection Service has been tracking senders and recipients of tens of thousands of letters and packages and handing that information over to law enforcement agencies without any court oversight. This surveillance is known as "mail covers." Mail covers don't provide information about what's inside letters or packages, but they can still reveal deeply personal information about Americans' political leanings, religious beliefs, or causes they support. And moreover, the USPIS is handing that information over to law enforcement agencies without first receiving a warrant. This is a gross violation of your privacy and First Amendment rights. You know I've been leading the charge in Congress to protect Americans' right to privacy from every angle, and this is no different. That's why I'm now leading the effort demanding that the federal government stop collecting this private information and handing it over to law enforcement without a court order. Americans should be free to live their lives without government intrusion. I won't rest until everyone's right to privacy is protected. More soon, Ron | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. body:
Class of 2023 navigated a pandemic, 2 strikes, wild politics, long-overdue struggles for racial justice, and the proliferation of AI.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64763759/411175912/2045957508?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjFkM2U5MDgtMDQwYS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qr4l91YpvdArvAVWTJpTHXfk11fX8zArDKJC6gXO5z0=&emci=f6009e51-4e09-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=21d3e908-040a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=10481059)
---

| | Peter, This weekend, Nick spent time with Los Angeles Unified School District graduates, their families, faculty, and staff. **The snippet below from his commencement address stood out to us. What he tells the class of 2023 is exactly what we're trying to accomplish on this campaign for Congress.** _"A lot of graduation speakers are going to tell you to go out and change the world, and I'm one of them._**_But the world is rarely changed by grand, sweeping gestures, but rather by nearly invisible ones._**_Acts of kindness and inclusion and tolerance that start to change the way we treat one another. And what is the world if not just billions of people treating each other a certain way every day._ _The problems facing us are enormous, don't get me wrong. But what would it look like if we all just treated each other a little bit nicer; if we were a little more understanding, empathetic, slow to judgment. If rather than being "not mean," we were kind. If we got to know one another._ _I'll always remember when, 10 years ago, a US Senator changed his position to support gay marriage when his son came out to him. That Senator's change of positions is one of the things that led to, just a few months ago, the Senate codifying into law marriage equality, something that was unthinkable not even a decade earlier. And it came about because of one honest conversation. One mind changed._ **_That's how the world has changed._**_Yes, some of you will be known for more dramatic acts of success, in business and medicine and the arts and sports and science, and those will be great achievements, and we'll all be there to say we knew you when. But for most of us, our opportunities to leave this world a little better than we found it will come from these tiny acts whose effect we may not always see at the time. From being kinder than we had to be._ _And each act of kindness and compassion has a ripple effect. It's actually proven that when you smile at someone, your body releases endorphins that are literally contagious, in the best of ways._ **_As a result, there's really no such thing as a small act of kindness."_** Thanks for standing with us in both this campaign for small acts of kindness — and Nick's campaign for Congress. _Team Melvoin_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: Class of 2023 navigated a pandemic, 2 strikes, wild politics, long-overdue struggles for racial justice, and the proliferation of AI. | | | | Peter, This weekend, Nick spent time with Los Angeles Unified School District graduates, their families, faculty, and staff. The snippet below from his commencement address stood out to us. What he tells the class of 2023 is exactly what we're trying to accomplish on this campaign for Congress. "A lot of graduation speakers are going to tell you to go out and change the world, and I'm one of them.But the world is rarely changed by grand, sweeping gestures, but rather by nearly invisible ones.Acts of kindness and inclusion and tolerance that start to change the way we treat one another. And what is the world if not just billions of people treating each other a certain way every day. The problems facing us are enormous, don't get me wrong. But what would it look like if we all just treated each other a little bit nicer; if we were a little more understanding, empathetic, slow to judgment. If rather than being "not mean," we were kind. If we got to know one another. I'll always remember when, 10 years ago, a US Senator changed his position to support gay marriage when his son came out to him. That Senator's change of positions is one of the things that led to, just a few months ago, the Senate codifying into law marriage equality, something that was unthinkable not even a decade earlier. And it came about because of one honest conversation. One mind changed. That's how the world has changed.Yes, some of you will be known for more dramatic acts of success, in business and medicine and the arts and sports and science, and those will be great achievements, and we'll all be there to say we knew you when. But for most of us, our opportunities to leave this world a little better than we found it will come from these tiny acts whose effect we may not always see at the time. From being kinder than we had to be. And each act of kindness and compassion has a ripple effect. It's actually proven that when you smile at someone, your body releases endorphins that are literally contagious, in the best of ways. As a result, there's really no such thing as a small act of kindness." Thanks for standing with us in both this campaign for small acts of kindness — and Nick's campaign for Congress. Team Melvoin | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289 |

name: Katy Frisch
subject: 538 got this one wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
Hello,

In 2022, no one gave my husband Adam Frisch a chance against Lauren Boebert.

Everywhere you looked, the political pundits were calling Colorado’s 3rd Congressional District “Safe Republican” or “Solid R.”

Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight only gave Adam a 3% chance of defeating Boebert. They projected he’d lose by over 45,000 votes!
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64763944/411176500/-321553144?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2711-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIwZDNlOTA4LTA0MGEtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jj4g1JqC-Jc00Jn5_kPngzZPZACwxE_3OLvuQL949yM=)
In the end, though, the race went to a recount. **Lauren Boebert won by just 546 votes, and Adam lost the closest race in the entire country.**

Because here’s what their “models” and “forecasts” didn’t factor in: Adam put in the work. He traveled 24,000 miles in our red pickup truck to every corner of the district. He met thousands and thousands of voters – and he listened.

Now, my husband’s running again, and I’ll be honest: The first campaign was hard. But defeating Lauren Boebert is just too important to sit this out. **Adam’s all-in to finish the job in 2024. I’m all-in. Can we count on you?**
**[Please, if you can afford to, will you split a donation right now between Adam’s campaign and American Bridge PAC to help him defeat Lauren Boebert? We were outspent in 2022 and just barely lost. Whatever you can afford to give today will help us invest early and win.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64763945/411176501/-321553144?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2711-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIwZDNlOTA4LTA0MGEtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jj4g1JqC-Jc00Jn5_kPngzZPZACwxE_3OLvuQL949yM=)**

name: Charles Booker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
2022 was an incredible year for Democrats, Peter.

We held the Senate, minimized losses in the House, and made inroads in
places we didn’t expect. In Kentucky, we over performed 2020 margins in
over half of all counties.

And through the highs and lows, we built a movement together. We engaged
young people and shared hope for progress with millions. We built lasting
infrastructure for the progressive movement and created new voters engaged
in the Democratic process.

Despite our loss on Election Day, we can be proud of what we accomplished
together. And I am excited to see what’s next for this team.

But right now, I have to ask again for your help. In order to close out
the campaign and move on to the next chapter of our work together, we have
some campaign debt to take care of. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18969?t=1001&akid=3307%2E346206%2EMY7vpf ]If you’re able, could you make a
contribution today to help us?

Our campaign was uncompromising. When we were making spending decisions in
the final days, that meant we prioritized communicating with as many
Kentucky voters as possible. We ran a bold campaign and we made bold
decisions. And unfortunately for us, that means we have a bit of a hole in
our budget and hope you can help us.

Thank you for anything you can do. I’m looking forward to what’s next.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230613-3307-footer&t=1002&refcode2=3307_346206_MY7vpf&akid=3307%2E346206%2EMY7vpf

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3307%2E346206%2EMY7vpf

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Lori=20Chavez=2DDeRemer?=
subject: I’m on a list you don’t want to be on:
body:
I need to keep my focus on work, can you handle this one? | | | | | | | | | | I need to keep my focus on work, can you handle this one?
---
[](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=2a1368f896&e=84ee529f47)
---
Friend, A new list of the most vulnerable members of Congress was just published – and my name is on it.

As a freshman Congresswoman who won with just 51.1% of the vote, I have to say the fact I’m under attack doesn’t really surprise me.

The Democrats in Washington see my seat as an easy pickup to restore their majority.

_But this is about so much more than just a majority to me.
_
This is about serving you, giving you a better quality of life, and restoring beauty and peace to Oregon’s 5th district.

[_**Please make your best contribution to help me combat the attacks coming from the liberal establishment. >>**_](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=dab42df7aa&e=84ee529f47)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=0603c74afd&e=84ee529f47)
---
I think the majority of politicians forget that districts like mine aren’t just chess pieces in some game.

_They’re communities and homes filled with real people who are really impacted by the decisions made in Washington.
_
_But I haven’t forgotten that.
_
I haven’t forgotten that you elected me to fix our mounting crime and drug problem, fight for parental rights in schools, and prioritize American citizens by securing our border.

_And I’m working hard every day to get these things done for you, friend.
_
But that doesn’t leave me with a lot of time to fundraise or engage with these political attacks.

So I’m counting on you to help me get the fundraising out of the way so that I can keep my focus on delivering results for the people of Oregon.

[_**Please, make your best contribution to help me combat the attacks coming from the liberal establishment so that I can keep my focus on getting work done for you. >> **_](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=ddbe0211c1&e=84ee529f47)

That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American.

clean_body: I need to keep my focus on work, can you handle this one? | | | | | | | | | | I need to keep my focus on work, can you handle this one? Friend, A new list of the most vulnerable members of Congress was just published – and my name is on it. As a freshman Congresswoman who won with just 51.1% of the vote, I have to say the fact I’m under attack doesn’t really surprise me. The Democrats in Washington see my seat as an easy pickup to restore their majority. But this is about so much more than just a majority to me. This is about serving you, giving you a better quality of life, and restoring beauty and peace to Oregon’s 5th district. | I think the majority of politicians forget that districts like mine aren’t just chess pieces in some game. They’re communities and homes filled with real people who are really impacted by the decisions made in Washington. But I haven’t forgotten that. I haven’t forgotten that you elected me to fix our mounting crime and drug problem, fight for parental rights in schools, and prioritize American citizens by securing our border. And I’m working hard every day to get these things done for you, friend. But that doesn’t leave me with a lot of time to fundraise or engage with these political attacks. So I’m counting on you to help me get the fundraising out of the way so that I can keep my focus on delivering results for the people of Oregon. Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. body:
This headline says it all, Team.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64763986/411176792/395464674?refcode=email_061323_retirement&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDFmZWY3OC0wNDBhLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2SLpMPPlHLReC62xMszykHRMhN3iWmbx9OAXoKJkNWM=) Team — Despite their recent effort to rewrite history, anyone paying attention knows that my Republican colleagues in Congress have tried, again and again, to cut Social Security and Medicare. And make no mistake: _**they are still trying to gut these vital benefits that millions of Americans depend on for a dignified retirement.**_ In fact, Kevin McCarthy admitted that it was President Biden who prevented Republicans from making cuts to Social Security and Medicare during the recent debt ceiling crisis. **Team, McCarthy and his allies are so extreme that it’s a safe bet they will continue to try to cut Social Security and Medicare at the next opportunity. I’m going to do everything I can to stop them, but I can’t win this fight on my own. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Donald Trump was arrested today and Ted Cruz, perhaps his biggest suck-up in the Senate and embarrassment to us all, is still defending him by attacking our democracy, justice system & lying about President Biden. How much longer does our country have to put up with this?
body:
Cruz loves Trump more than the country
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8017c7ba-4d3f-48e0-a0d6-82547edde35b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Donald Trump was arrested today and Ted Cruz, perhaps his biggest suck-up in the Senate and embarrassment to us all, is still defending him by attacking our democracy, justice system & lying about President Biden.** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3a5f4051-ca72-4297-a4f7-19ced3584b05/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Cruz is pure slime. _Luckily, we have a terrific opportunity to replace Cruz with former NFL star, Obama Administration appointee & Texas Congressman, Colin Allred, who knocked out an incumbent GOP Representative to win a key swing seat in 2018._ **_I can't imagine a better resume to take on traitor, coward and all around awful "human being," Cruz. It's why the political prognosticators changed their rankings when Allred got in the race to call it competitive._** [**_As Cruz defends Trump, Allred defends democracy. Let's defend Allred by giving him $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to get a real Senator from TX._ **](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8e87fc68-8334-46b5-9839-0a4ad99935ea/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for fighting for the Senate. Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9eb5d24f-a7d7-4532-8c24-4ce256b56f30/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Casey HQ
subject: re: Peter's donation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=147%2E552475%2EisNLr-)
Peter, here are three facts about our race:
1. Our race could be the deciding factor in whether or not Democrats hold the Senate majority.
2. CNN says we’re one of the most likely seats to flip in 2024.
3. National Republicans are gearing up to make this one of the most expensive Senate races in the country.

All of this points to the importance of hitting our $20,000 goal by June 15 and ensuring we can submit a strong FEC report at the end of the month — our first finance report since Bob announced his re-election campaign.
**[Will you donate now to help re-elect Bob Casey and hold our Senate majority? No amount is too small to make a difference in our race.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230613-1?refcode=em20230613-1&refcode2=147_552475_isNLr-&akid=147%2E552475%2EisNLr-)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230613-1?refcode=em20230613-1&refcode2=147_552475_isNLr-&akid=147%2E552475%2EisNLr-)**
We’re serious when we say that every single contribution makes a difference. $3 might not sound like much — but if every person reading this email chipped in just $3, we’d easily reach our mid-month fundraising goal by tonight.
**[So if you’re willing to invest just a few dollars to ensure we keep Bob Casey — and a Democratic majority — fighting for us in the Senate, will you please make a donation right now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230613-1?refcode=em20230613-1&refcode2=147_552475_isNLr-&akid=147%2E552475%2EisNLr-)**
With gratitude,
Team Casey

clean_body: - Peter, here are three facts about our race: 1. Our race could be the deciding factor in whether or not Democrats hold the Senate majority. 2. CNN says we’re one of the most likely seats to flip in 2024. 3. National Republicans are gearing up to make this one of the most expensive Senate races in the country. All of this points to the importance of hitting our $20,000 goal by June 15 and ensuring we can submit a strong FEC report at the end of the month — our first finance report since Bob announced his re-election campaign. - - We’re serious when we say that every single contribution makes a difference. $3 might not sound like much — but if every person reading this email chipped in just $3, we’d easily reach our mid-month fundraising goal by tonight. - With gratitude, Team Casey

body:
I'll always have President Trump's back.
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62818941:6G8HPYINx:m:1:3299561967:94D7DE0C6DF72BC1E53AC2CA152DD79D:r)

Patriot,
---
The arraignment of President Trump is a political prosecution, nothing more, nothing less.
---
**That's why I just marched into a hornet's nest on CNN to defend him by completely DESTROYING the Left's narrative about this politically motivated indictment.**
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62818941:6G8HPYINx:m:1:3299561967:94D7DE0C6DF72BC1E53AC2CA152DD79D:r)

---

I was interrupted and talked over, but I still made my point: _**When our federal government turns a blind eye to Biden, Clinton, and many other Democrats but is hellbent on getting Trump, that's the very definition of a TWO-TIERED justice system.**_
---
[**Please watch me embarrass a liberal anchor on CNN, and then make a 1500% impact contribution to help me keep tearing apart the Left's narrative about President Trump's indictment.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62818941:6G8HPYINx:m:1:3299561967:94D7DE0C6DF72BC1E53AC2CA152DD79D:r)
