[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62818941:6G8HPYINx:m:1:3299561967:94D7DE0C6DF72BC1E53AC2CA152DD79D:r)
---

Right now, there's no such thing as equal justice for Republicans in Washington.
---
If you're a Democrat like Joe Biden or Hillary Clinton, you can commit crimes and get off with a slap on the wrist.
---
**But if you're a Republican who stands tough against the Left's radical agenda, the Department of Justice does everything they can to take you out.**
---
_Even when you're completely innocent!_
---
Remember: The FBI has possessed credible information about Biden's corruption since 2015.
---
Yet they've done NOTHING to investigate it.
---
_It reeks of hypocrisy when they will use phony Clinton information to push the Russian Collusion hoax but sit on this credible information for years and do NOTHING._
---
And then, they have the audacity to turn around and INDICT President Trump in another disgusting witch hunt to try and stop him from winning back the White House.
---
As I've said before, this is the kind of thing that happens in a third-world dictatorship.
---
Not the United States of America.
---

[HELP ME FIGHT BACK](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62818941:6G8HPYINx:m:1:3299561967:94D7DE0C6DF72BC1E53AC2CA152DD79D:r)
---

This indictment shows just how desperate the radical Left has become.
---
Every single witch hunt they've thrown at President Trump has FAILED.
---
_Now, as poll after poll shows him trouncing the Republican field and beating Biden in the general election, they've been forced to escalate their attacks._
---
It's been PROVEN that elements of the intelligence community have interfered in our past two presidential elections to sabotage President Trump, and they're on pace to interfere in a third.
---
_These radicals want to maintain their positions of power so they can keep making money through corrupt means, and they'll destroy anyone who stands in their way._
---
**To get away with this blatant election interference, the Left is banking on using their media allies to help them control the narrative.**
---
They're hoping that Republicans in Congress will cave to the media pressure instead of calling out this election interference and telling the American people what's really going on.
---
But I'm not going to let that happen.
---
With your support, we'll get the TRUTH out to the American people and take our country back!
---
[**So please, watch me embarrass a liberal anchor on CNN, and then make a 1500% impact contribution to help me keep tearing apart the Left's narrative about President Trump's indictment.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62818941:6G8HPYINx:m:1:3299561967:94D7DE0C6DF72BC1E53AC2CA152DD79D:r)
---
Thank you,
---

clean_body: Our first HUGE deadline is right around the corner, and we need to meet it with flying colors. | | | Peter, Our first HUGE deadline is right around the corner, and we need to make sure to meet it with flying colors. The end of this month will mark the end of the first fundraising quarter since we launched this campaign, with a big goal of raising $16,877 by June 30th. Peter, when looking at our End of Quarter fundraising goal, it can seem overwhelming. The reality is that this is a marathon, not a sprint. That means we must set smaller goals, build momentum, and stay the course until Election Day. This is why our goal of raising $5,000 over the next two days is so important — it will keep us on the right track and ensure that we have all the tools we need to reach the finish line. Talk to you soon, Kirby Chandler Campaign Manager | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress Michelle Vallejo for Congress PO Box 1265 Mission, TX 78573

subject: First Results: WSRP Presidential Preference Poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Support your candidate - add your vote to our poll!

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

Jon

clean_body: | | | Peter, From keeping our border wide open to criminals to pushing the woke agenda in every corner of our country, Joe Biden and the Democrats are on a mission to unleash disaster on Americans like you. Right now, we have a critical chance to stop them, so I need you to listen up: our mid-month deadline is in just two days, and we MUST meet this goal. As we get closer to 2024, every goal becomes more and more important, Peter. I can’t stress how important this is, Peter. My race is going to be one of the closest in the country, and Democrat money is already pouring into my opponent’s war chest. Democrats have their eyes right on Missouri, and they’ll do everything they can to take me out. But I know we won’t let that happen. Thank you, Josh Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

name: Marina
subject: Celebrating a landmark victory for fair maps…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
The significance of this victory cannot be overstated.
|
---

Team,
I am filled with an overwhelming sense of joy and gratitude about the recent momentous victory for fair maps and representation. The tireless, collective efforts of everyone involved in our movement for fair maps – from the legal teams to grassroots activists like yourself -- have yielded a resounding success in the fight against gerrymandering.
The Supreme Court has upheld Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act in our affiliate’s case _Allen v. Milligan_. In doing so, the Court affirmed the lower court’s holding that struck down the Alabama’s discriminatory congressional map as a likely violation of the VRA due to the state’s failure to provide Black Alabamians an equal opportunity to participate in the political process. **This triumph marks a significant milestone in our mission to uphold the principles of justice, democracy, and fair representation in our democratic processes.**
**This is a momentous win for communities of color who have been historically disenfranchised by unfair redistricting practices.**
---
**The significance of this victory cannot be overstated.** Black voters in Alabama have been denied fair representation _for decades_ — and the Supreme Court’s decision in favor of voters marks a landmark moment to move the needle in the right direction.

name: Team Burgum
subject: The first Republican Presidential Debate is coming up soon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Doug Burgum for America
body:
Here’s what we need >>> | It's hard to believe, yet the first Republican Presidential Debate is coming up soon.

Here’s what we need >>> | It's hard to believe, yet the first Republican Presidential Debate is coming up soon.
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9f7n7r3u0jhqk5835epg15r08m58bm3lih7reig_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdie0o32cth2bs)

Friend,

It's hard to believe, yet the first Republican Presidential Debate is coming up soon.

Unlike the other candidates - **Ron DeSantis, Larry Elder, Nikki Haley, Asa Hutchinson, Vivek Ramaswamy, Tim Scott, and Donald Trump,** _who have all had weeks, if not months, to professionally fundraise_ \- we are JUST getting this grassroots movement started.

Now, this isn't a bad thing; however, it does make it THAT much more difficult to qualify for the first debate. We don't want our race to be over before it even starts, so we're asking you to join the team with a generous donation of just $2 to our campaign, Doug Burgum for America.

[CONTRIBUTE $2 NOW »](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfsu0hmenq9b29s3ifqjdf6rc4f7430l0tnnr718_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdie0o32cth2bs)
---

Every other campaign is asking for $1, yet we can do better together.**If every patriot reading this email donates just $2,** we'll be well on our way to making it on the debate stage in Milwaukee in August. No candidate will work harder to earn your support, which is why we are counting on folks like you to get us to the debate stage so we can share our vision with America.

**[Please donate $2 or more RIGHT AWAY to help us qualify for the first Republican Presidential Debate.>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd20h0a0jhhql5ipjjlgmo5ithr4uqta788971dg_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdie0o32cth2bs)**

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgn1kdfip9ba3626j48mhpuf4ul0gdl1jffd48lg_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdie0o32cth2bs)

[CONTRIBUTE $2 NOW »](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvehhuh57dtv3u2ppjr5l55910qm0qptk2hlva90_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdie0o32cth2bs)
---

Our team is going to send around a list with the names of each supporter who gave $2 or more by the end of the day. We would be eternally grateful to see YOUR NAME on the list, Friend.

With gratitude,

Team Burgum

[CONTRIBUTE $2 NOW »](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zaojf5ne05rohqa6r9orfgomdl4ivm83j92tnusg_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdie0o32cth2bs)
---

Fargo, North Dakota 58103

subject: It’s coming up fast [UPDATE INSIDE]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
Fellow Conservative, Last month, we crushed our monthly grassroots fundraising goal. Patriots across the Lone Star State and our great nation stepped up to fuel our fight to Keep Texas Red in 2024.

I can’t thank everyone who pitched in enough. Your support means the world to me. **And now, our first End-of-Quarter deadline since Colin Allred announced his candidacy is coming up fast – i****t’ s so important that we post a strong showing, to show the media and the far-left Democrats that Team Cruz is _ALL-IN TO WIN_!**

It’s vital that we reach our mid-month goal this week to stay on track. [_**Pitch in here >>>**_](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
[](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
I’m the National Democrats' #1 target. For years now I’ve been leading the charge in Washington to expose how they’ve corrupted our justice system for political purposes and their depraved far-left insanity – and they CAN’T STAND IT.

They’ll say and do anything to defeat me. They’ll spend millions upon millions to flip Texas. _**We cannot afford to let them prevail on November 5, 2024!**_ [_**Let’s fight like hell to come out on top, take back the Senate from these radicals, and SAVE AMERICA. Your involvement is crucial to our efforts.**_](http://trk.tedcruz.-TyYSPxBFDrN1DU9tbxA) Thank you, as always, for standing with me.

For Liberty,

[](http://trk.tedcruz.-1sH9ZlhwQ2X4pBA)

Ted Cruz

subject: 🍷🍞Communion in the U.S. Capitol
body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=a6d59fe202224c10a68998c2f66d166c&_e=8gTep4Hwm-3hGGPEEjiKAZh5RjflVlfWoZ-PszWJ8cK1sBFhOtsgoDoF-MsIZXBiXN7mv77fdZICYxov9vZFtEbpnuCnj34YivmpKr9YD1Dggoc0wChZdTt8GGBWzHDPnXz-xEJa2ytqWHtT2BNtvhL1ga8XgpwSEh3kvg0KcF-DRngpUV5ZbAckTIiVjBpGvL9wo0bXW76y2wIohNhH7e0dDOZ5gITL-ORo1FJ5jHm4jdqXpmZLs2V9X_7ZOSHYKIs2Gb54EXKTN4-9Tt-l6V-Lo7E3xWaLMz6OEIMiKV3etO0oK4HggHuUB1yOlF8h)

Dear Friend,
---
When you hold THREE Kingdom to the Capitol revivals near Washington, D.C., you stop by the U.S. Capitol. And when Let Us Worship visits the Capitol, we bring the WORSHIP with us!!

Believers (and some members of Congress) prayed, worshiped, and then took COMMUNION in the rotunda of the Capitol. I'm not sure it's ever been done before, but Jesus deserves honor everywhere, ESPECIALLY at the heart of our nation's government! Watch the video below!!

Till All Hear, Sean Feucht P.S. — we are waiting on an estimate on bus repairs, but we know it's going to be expensive. We are still accepting donations to the bus repair fund. If you would like to contribute to that, please do so or at . | | | | | sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Let Us Worship

name: Republican Majority
subject: Former Home Depot CEO issues dire warning for Americans
body:
Something strange is happening in our financial system.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| Dear Reader, Something strange is happening in our financial system. According to analysts at UBS, more than 50,000 retail locations could shut their doors in the months ahead. Already, Walmart, Foot Locker, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Macy’s are cutting stores. And former Home Depot CEO Bob Nardelli recently issued a grim warning:
> "We’re going to see a lot of bankruptcies. [This is] different than anything I have seen in my 52 years..."
What does it all mean for your family and your money? Dr. Nomi Prins has dug deeper into the research, and she’s found something startling. Amid all the turmoil predicted by Nardeni and UBS, Prins has found a single firm that could be the canary in the coal mine foreshadowing the next major crisis in America. All it takes is one look at this troubling chart to see why - [](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkLFu8yAURp8GNltwLwE8MPzSryxVOlXqaBG4dqjAWJioyttXXjp3_T6dM5zP23zzKadtffeFXCtzO-ZW5kyrD6_hUQsNkfbaZxCAg9CDxBl5dHoCYyUnJ7XV2k4GFX84e0GjJCAsk0URYJFBRSuiiVoQkOHJnR6hJUojDdgxqotclgkthPsFJ8WUaLQ_7zkFvxX_VVvqr3GjzrN79L4fDP8xuDK4HhSejcZW1ydRqFstKRxjqOW88RpSZPj_9vZhEKwEBpp-F6XEpHhzcf9OOadDG6bEWnzKJ8_7Xzv8BAAA___lCmFk) Dr. Prins says:
> ** "This chart tells you everything you need to know about the next crisis in America. In short, what we’re about to see is a currency crisis - but not the kind of currency crisis most folks expect. This firm - along with many others - will almost certainly go bankrupt as a result." **
According to Dr. Prins, our money is about to change forever... and the overhaul is set to happen in just a few weeks. To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains all the details of what she calls a 'reset' to our financial system. In it, she lays out all the evidence of this currency crisis, and what you can do to prepare. [Click here now to see her full (and free) presentation.](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkLFu8yAURp8GNltwLwE8MPzSryxVOlXqaBG4dqjAWJioyttXXjp3_T6dM5zP23zzKadtffeFXCtzO-ZW5kyrD6_hUQsNkfbaZxCAg9CDxBl5dHoCYyUnJ7XV2k4GFX84e0GjJCAsk0URYJFBRSuiiVoQkOHJnR6hJUojDdgxqotclgkthPsFJ8WUaLQ_7zkFvxX_VVvqr3GjzrN79L4fDP8xuDK4HhSejcZW1ydRqFstKRxjqOW88RpSZPj_9vZhEKwEBpp-F6XEpHhzcf9OOadDG6bEWnzKJ8_7Xzv8BAAA___lCmFk) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar transformations to our money, folks who failed to prepare were blindsided. But those who moved their money beforehand had the opportunity to multiply their nest-egg as a result. [Click here to see why.](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkLFu8yAURp8GNltwLwE8MPzSryxVOlXqaBG4dqjAWJioyttXXjp3_T6dM5zP23zzKadtffeFXCtzO-ZW5kyrD6_hUQsNkfbaZxCAg9CDxBl5dHoCYyUnJ7XV2k4GFX84e0GjJCAsk0URYJFBRSuiiVoQkOHJnR6hJUojDdgxqotclgkthPsFJ8WUaLQ_7zkFvxX_VVvqr3GjzrN79L4fDP8xuDK4HhSejcZW1ydRqFstKRxjqOW88RpSZPj_9vZhEKwEBpp-F6XEpHhzcf9OOadDG6bEWnzKJ8_7Xzv8BAAA___lCmFk)

name: Katie Porter
subject: What if I wasn’t allowed to know the model of car I was buying? That’s how ridiculous banning ESG is
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=24702%2E3422442%2E5PVbAP)
The Congressional Oversight Committee recently had a hearing on ESG, one of Republicans’ hot topics of the year.
ESG stands for environment, social, and governance. It’s a measure used by investors that takes into account things like a company’s climate change strategy and workplace safety practices.
Americans value freedom and choice. **Banning ESG is just a way for Republicans to shield their corporate friends from being held accountable by consumers.**
Banning ESG is akin to this:
Let’s say I’m finally ready to trade in my minivan. I want something that’s more fuel efficient, and I want a new color (I’m told country blue isn’t cool anymore). **But there are these new rules that *won’t allow me* to see vital information about the cars available.** I can see the cost, and I can see the expected depreciation. But I’m not allowed to see the make or model. I can’t see if it’s a gas guzzler. I can’t find out if it was union-made in the U.S.
Whether these things matter to you _is up to you._ That's a principle of our capitalist economy.
It sounds ridiculous when you compare it to cars, but that’s what Republicans are trying to do here.
Congress has plenty of issues we need to tackle: gun violence, inflation, housing affordability...the list goes on. I hope the Republicans who lead our committee agendas will turn their attention to these real issues.
Onward,
Katie Porter
[**We need your help to send Katie Porter to the U.S. Senate. This is a tight race and every donation counts, especially because she's the only candidate to reject money from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists. Please chip in today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230613-1?refcode=EMAI13_1_ESG_20230613_V1_F&refcode2=24702_3422442_5PVbAP&akid=24702%2E3422442%2E5PVbAP)**

Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma.

name: Team DeSantis
subject: This is the straw that breaks our back.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Our team saw the news, and our jaws dropped.
---
| | | | | | | | | Please see a message from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, click **[here](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=fc1de734f51d4af19ca8b6f01d5746ea&_t=5_J_ZaQSQ7Dhl_V5RW69AbrGU98Nf-KhDSHDGwL7oNpNA_xNOvmHu7Gd8YIYKg94rz-AxLuEineOu9t745UeJMV1_lYVoUIQZztQ0PkOR2o%3D "here")**
---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=fc1de734f51d4af19ca8b6f01d5746ea&_e=65q8r7i2OQTrbninq1HmJDBpcdLBkYavGiYIDYGI3vBOXzh3knXi21WUGVWMgyBOA0VTGJV9VM8IP4T5pKih8hUSh4-e9aDci2NhCzD4NAXIWYct1Nuygq7HprPgK0VNHGGAu9IAdPI188bJXWRTkau95S4KJrW1E5G_jZAjvMt2oqpOXZQw58-CdkQePb5iQJqeMiC87od2Vq_45R3loJ7a1bYHHlTLyMQGQfSomV8aAU3SvSoY5Ml_gQiy1Vm-9wzgsgNJFJieZU6uC6NBX1qqIEmhJj8x4U2KhEjmyuOW0HyOW3dmEXThL9uBG27qy26DOoJoALLl7QDlNpQvYqBpG5a_pnW-DwGEu9gW70HSRBpIdlXGkA1-wBsppRPXJjDcGEuxFUr5WunQDNrRgA%3D%3D)
---
Peter, We can't believe this country's direction over the past decade. From sports superstars kneeling during the national anthem, to riots across America, to now the woke Olympics indoctrinating our schools and businesses with a DEI agenda, we can safely say that our country is on the wrong track. But the news we heard this week might be the straw that finally breaks the camel's back. **Now we've learned that President Biden thought it was appropriate to fly the Pride Flag from the White House and at embassies around the world**. **_Can you believe that? _** Peter--there should only be one flag hanging from the White House.** The American Flag**.
---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=fc1de734f51d4af19ca8b6f01d5746ea&_e=65q8r7i2OQTrbninq1HmJDBpcdLBkYavGiYIDYGI3vBOXzh3knXi21WUGVWMgyBOA0VTGJV9VM8IP4T5pKih8hUSh4-e9aDci2NhCzD4NAXIWYct1Nuygq7HprPgK0VNHGGAu9IAdPI188bJXWRTkau95S4KJrW1E5G_jZAjvMt2oqpOXZQw58-CdkQePb5iQJqeMiC87od2Vq_45R3loJ7a1bYHHlTLyMQGQfSomV8aAU3SvSoY5Ml_gQiy1Vm-01tfLI3aEwhiUcCwCsDjs8YFPD7RToo8e0yZthRSJUCURkbyA2yzG0zqgFpTQC_8D5zlKfg8NjJ_SNXYJN4Jq0ZyCqPeWHaepEKLyfGYSTUMoE2TbmCdp7Tq_h7CYGu_Nq72Mcb8x3hqXaV_t7KMSw%3D%3D)
---
But, Peter, it didn't end there. Joe Biden, the commander in chief of our armed services, stood on stage and referred to the assembled group of activists as "some of the bravest and most inspiring people he's ever known." We have to wonder if that was before or after several of them decided to dance topless on the White House lawn in what I'm sure the media will tell us was a family-friendly event. **The Biden administration is more concerned with what Tik Tok influencers think than what average Americans are experiencing on a daily basis.** Enough is enough.

It's time to end the age of virtue signaling, end the DEI agenda, and once and for all, end the woke Olympics in America. There is only one candidate in this race who has proven they can stand up for what's right and has what it takes to beat the Left. **_Donate today if you are ready to help Governor Ron DeSantis end this madness_**.
---

In Freedom,
Team DeSantis

---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=fc1de734f51d4af19ca8b6f01d5746ea&_e=65q8r7i2OQTrbninq1HmJDBpcdLBkYavGiYIDYGI3vBOXzh3knXi21WUGVWMgyBOA0VTGJV9VM8IP4T5pKih8hUSh4-e9aDci2NhCzD4NAXIWYct1Nuygq7HprPgK0VNHGGAu9IAdPI188bJXWRTkau95S4KJrW1E5G_jZAjvMt2oqpOXZQw58-CdkQePb5iQJqeMiC87od2Vq_45R3loJ7a1bYHHlTLyMQGQfSomV8aAU3SvSoY5Ml_gQiy1Vm-jqc-wRCCeo2_3HL3sOfsiKelzgbzQ0pXOLIoVXlzhjicnU6kVOC5QD3ICxzJ57jDlhSCrw-ae9wOjqYFmUcHNGM2jChmoNj2FbtHsT9np51qOv92Mfvx1eaEkm0KgY2f5ANTbYYcXQZKK8m8sakQuw%3D%3D)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
---

Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn't stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. # [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64769061/411195142/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWQyNDc0NC0xMDBhLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EtpDJHKZsQKac2nMOE3i3o7VA7iSswuK1cJedEC7e4M=)
37 felony counts. That is the number of charges Donald Trump is facing related to his holding of and refusal to return classified government documents after being subpoenaed and lying to the FBI.
This news is no surprise to us. Trump continues to make history, once as the first President to be impeached twice and now as the first President in U.S. history to face criminal charges.
But what is shocking is the response of some extremist lawmakers standing by him despite overwhelming evidence of his withholding and concealing possession of classified documents and false statements.
Just take Marjorie Taylor Greene: Instead of standing by our justice system, she continues to spread conspiracy theories about President Biden to distract from the charges and even went on the House Floor yesterday to call for defunding Special Counsel Jack Smith of the DOJ and the entire Trump investigation.
It’s no secret that I’ve fought against extremists like Marjorie Taylor Greene. I do not believe such dangerous rhetoric and actions can stand, and I won’t stop speaking truth to power now. As long as I serve in Congress, I will continue to stand up for justice and accountability of our lawmakers on the Oversight Committee and beyond — whether that be George Santos, Marjorie Taylor Greene, or Trump himself.
But that also means that I am a target for the far-right because I am not afraid to call them out. My team anticipates a flood of MAGA mega-donors coming after us this cycle, and I need your support to fight back.
[**So if you can, please contribute to my reelection campaign to help me continue to hold members of Congress accountable and fight against far-right attacks.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64769062/411195143/-1951629005?refcode2=b5d24744-100a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&refcode=em230613-1-t1a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWQyNDc0NC0xMDBhLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EtpDJHKZsQKac2nMOE3i3o7VA7iSswuK1cJedEC7e4M=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64769063/411195144/-1951629005?refcode2=b5d24744-100a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&refcode=em230613-1-t1a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWQyNDc0NC0xMDBhLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EtpDJHKZsQKac2nMOE3i3o7VA7iSswuK1cJedEC7e4M=)**

Peter, as the 2024 Presidential Election draws nearer, the stakes for our nation's future have never been higher.

Donald Trump spent four years nearly destroying our democracy, spreading hatred and division, and even inciting a deadly insurrection.

**And to top it off, he's now been indicted and is under investigation for multiple crimes in both federal and state courts.**

In short: Trump is too dangerous and unfit to serve as our commander-in-chief.

On the other hand, President Biden entered the oval office with a multitude of crises. The raging COVID pandemic, a broken economy, and our democracy in peril put our nation on edge by Trump’s extreme policies.

But that didn’t stop Joe from rolling up his sleeves to build America back.

His efforts have resulted in a stronger, more hopeful America today. And he’s delivering on his bold agenda. But all of this could be undone by a Trump re-election.

That’s why the potential 2024 rematch between Trump and President Biden won’t be just another election. It’s a historic fight for abortion rights, democracy, the freedom to vote, social security, healthcare benefits, and everything our country stands for.

It's time to ask ourselves: who do we want leading our country? Who will stand up for our values and protect the progress we've made?

clean_body: Don’t miss your chance to make your voice heard. | = URGENT: FLASH POLL FOR : Who will you vote for in 2024? | | ---|--- Peter, as the 2024 Presidential Election draws nearer, the stakes for our nation's future have never been higher. Donald Trump spent four years nearly destroying our democracy, spreading hatred and division, and even inciting a deadly insurrection. And to top it off, he's now been indicted and is under investigation for multiple crimes in both federal and state courts. In short: Trump is too dangerous and unfit to serve as our commander-in-chief. On the other hand, President Biden entered the oval office with a multitude of crises. The raging COVID pandemic, a broken economy, and our democracy in peril put our nation on edge by Trump’s extreme policies. But that didn’t stop Joe from rolling up his sleeves to build America back. His efforts have resulted in a stronger, more hopeful America today. And he’s delivering on his bold agenda. But all of this could be undone by a Trump re-election. That’s why the potential 2024 rematch between Trump and President Biden won’t be just another election. It’s a historic fight for abortion rights, democracy, the freedom to vote, social security, healthcare benefits, and everything our country stands for. It's time to ask ourselves: who do we want leading our country? Who will stand up for our values and protect the progress we've made? We must act now to show our support for President Biden and his bold agenda. That's why we're urgently polling voters in your area and counting on you to respond. Who will you vote for in 2024? | ---|--- We appreciate your input, Unite the Country | Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. After a resounding victory in 2020, we’ve been working around the clock to uplift President Biden’s message to the American electorate and elect Democrats who will continue to fight for his ambitious agenda. President Biden and the Democrats are fighting tooth-and-nail to move our country forward, but Republicans are threatening to derail everything. = | = = Follow along: | ---|--- | Paid for by Unite the Country, , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Andy Kim
subject: I still believe in America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64769766/411197314/1642521363?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTE1ZmM5YS0xMjBhLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sz7arPn7v8a5XCL6uJdux-W5CIa-hROm-ZOPM3nJjss=&emci=06e932bd-090a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=ee15fc9a-120a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=26261389)
---

| | Six years ago, when I told friends and family that I was going to run for Congress, I'm sure most of them thought it was crazy and wondered, _"Why would he ever want to do that?"_ My answer? If I have concerns about what is happening in our country, what am I going to do about it? I never planned to run for elected office, but my parents instilled in me a commitment to a life of service, and someone had to step up. I'm not going to assume someone else will fight my fights for me.**I believe that government can be a force for good in people's lives and, as one of my earliest mentors told me, that you can't have good government without good people in government.** Six years ago, we were halfway through Trump's presidency. Only 20% of Americans had trust in their government, according to Pew research. Today, Donald Trump is facing 37 felony charges and multiple ongoing investigations. And still, that trust number remains painfully stagnant. Stuck because of partisan knife fighting, corruption, weakened democratic institutions, and a sense that government isn't working for the people it ought to be serving. It's a sad day for our country. **Like you, I didn't need to see this indictment to know how dangerous unchecked ego, a culture of corruption, and a trust deficit are to our republic.** _But you know what?_ I'm still hopeful about America. We can pass strong ethics rules, ensure transparency, strengthen our democratic institutions, and restore people's trust in government. To do that, we have to support good people who are willing to work hard and fight for our democracy. I still believe, now more than ever that you truly can't have good government without good people in government. _Andy_ |
---|---|---

| | Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress.

clean_body: | | | | Six years ago, when I told friends and family that I was going to run for Congress, I'm sure most of them thought it was crazy and wondered, "Why would he ever want to do that?" My answer? If I have concerns about what is happening in our country, what am I going to do about it? I never planned to run for elected office, but my parents instilled in me a commitment to a life of service, and someone had to step up. I'm not going to assume someone else will fight my fights for me.I believe that government can be a force for good in people's lives and, as one of my earliest mentors told me, that you can't have good government without good people in government. Six years ago, we were halfway through Trump's presidency. Only 20% of Americans had trust in their government, according to Pew research. Today, Donald Trump is facing 37 felony charges and multiple ongoing investigations. And still, that trust number remains painfully stagnant. Stuck because of partisan knife fighting, corruption, weakened democratic institutions, and a sense that government isn't working for the people it ought to be serving. It's a sad day for our country. Like you, I didn't need to see this indictment to know how dangerous unchecked ego, a culture of corruption, and a trust deficit are to our republic. But you know what? I'm still hopeful about America. We can pass strong ethics rules, ensure transparency, strengthen our democratic institutions, and restore people's trust in government. To do that, we have to support good people who are willing to work hard and fight for our democracy. I still believe, now more than ever that you truly can't have good government without good people in government. Andy | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress. | This email was sent by Andy Kim for Congress P.O. Box 211 Marlton, NJ 08053 United States Email is an important way for Andy Kim to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? or . Questions or concerns? . |

**WATCH: Chris Christie Town Hall Highlights**
Last night, Governor Chris Christie joined Anderson Cooper for a CNN Town Hall and fielded questions on a variety of different topics from Republican primary voters.
The performance was vintage Chris Christie: authentic, unscripted, direct and to the point.
Here are some highlights:
**“I Know How To Make Things Happen”**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=6c23d45ed1&e=d0a9afa930)
**“Trump Doesn’t Give A Damn About The American People”**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=9a8670d660&e=d0a9afa930)
**“Loser. Loser. Loser.”**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=6d0e46943a&e=d0a9afa930)
**“[Biden And Trump] Need To Stop Worrying About Themselves And Worry About You”**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=784268e022&e=d0a9afa930)
That was just a preview of what Governor Christie has in store.
He will make a great president, but first he needs your help to get on the debate stage in August to make his case to even more Americans.
**Let Governor Christie put his debate chops to work. You can help by donating at least $1 below to ensure his spot in the debate – he will not disappoint you.**

subject: Throwing in the towel

body:
This isn’t the news I was hoping to deliver today, Friend.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8amvk8b6h2quo4i9rvknhsjd1cbrb1qlge9g9ko_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdie4pr2c3h2bs)
---

This isn't the news I was hoping to deliver today, Friend.

**FIRST** , Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Hakeem Jeffries all came to California to raise money to defeat me.

**THEN** , House Democrats named me one of their _**TOP 18 TARGETS**_.

**NEXT** , two Far Leftists jumped into my race and Dem attack groups pledged _**MILLIONS**_ to defeat me.

**NOW** , one of my Left-Wing opponents raised _**$100K in HER FIRST WEEK**_ after announcing her campaign.
---
| | | [RUSH DONATE HERE](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zibc5qjqgve6hr54i1kn7opm86r76tj8ivrdkaro_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdie4pr2c3h2bs "RUSH DONATE HERE")
---
I hate having to give you bad news like this, but I don't know where else to turn. My opponent will only continue to grow her coffers - _she has the backing of Hollywood elites and dark money donors. _

With our second quarterly deadline rapidly approaching, catching up to her has never been more important.

**[Today, I'm personally asking if you'll rush in a few dollars to help us close this gap and protect this seat from the woke Democrats.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zda3729oi6u7ac4607idev9978dl5pmevj9fv9do_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdie4pr2c3h2bs "Today, I’m personally asking if you’ll rush in a few dollars to help us close this gap and protect this seat from the woke Democrats. Will you please step up and help us?

Thank you for everything,

Young Kim

We are completely dependent on grassroots support to fuel our efforts against the Democrats.

This isn’t the news I was hoping to deliver today, Friend.

**FIRST** , Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Hakeem Jeffries all came to California to raise money to defeat me.

Will you please step up and help us?

Thank you for everything,

Young Kim

[Fallen DLA Logistician Honored With Army Memorialization](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhd61ktot1rv29gavsr85hr91jhlqpoc1eiksvlo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr2d9j6kprct9jmkrncst66uqrf8j0c9j6f833cui6cpt36gor3d9jmmgj3d1lk6rred5me5qbcd5k6eqq1dtjmup7ac9lktqb2s5lkgp7bd7lkmqjbdtieiq33d5iugon9dtjmuh238h1e8he4933c3hm6p76cdh60oh5u)
Future Defense Department civilian deployers will now receive vital equipment -- including boots and protective gear -- inside a new facility at Camp Atterbury, Indiana, dedicated to fallen Defense Logistics Agency Land and Maritime logistician Stephen Byus. The Army Expeditionary Civilian Workforce alongside DLA senior leaders and the Byus family officially opened the Stephen Byus Central Issue Facility Warehouse, June 8, during a memorialization ceremony at the southeast Indiana joint maneuver training center.
[See It Here](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrtlfbr0dmutf34tq5rbe85tvgpc0qief56dfjvg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr2d9j6kprct9jmkrncst66uqrf8j0c9j6f833cui6cpt36gor3d9jmmgj3d1lk6rred5me5qbcd5k6eqq1dtjmup7ac9lktqb2s5lkgp7bd7lkmqjbdtieiq33d5iugon9dtjmuh238h1e8he4933c3hm6p76cdh60oh5u)

| Peter,

We’re so excited! Every top Democrat is rallying around gun violence prevention legislation and passing an assault weapons ban → **✅ President Joe Biden
✅ Senator Chris Murphy
✅ Senator Amy Klobuchar
✅ Senator Raphael Warnock
✅ Congresswoman Lucy McBeth!** This is GREAT news! This is the support we need to pass gun safety legislation, Peter.

clean_body: | | | Friend, despite losing the 2020 election, inciting an insurrection and facing multiple criminal charges, Donald Trump is polling ahead of his competitors in the 2024 primary! Every day, it's looking more and more likely that Donald Trump will be the GOP nominee to take on President Biden — and the stakes couldn't be any higher. President Biden has spent the last two and a half years rebuilding our country and our democracy from the wreckage of the Trump administration. But now, Trump could be on track to retake power and destroy all the progress we've made! Grassroots people like you defeated Trump in 2020 — but we need to know that you'll stand against him again. That's why we've chosen you to represent 43614 in our exclusive online poll. So please, respond before 11:59 p.m. to tell us where you stand: Do you approve of Donald Trump? | | | | | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

# Larry Surges in the Polls!
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Friend, We wanted YOU to be the first to hear about our enormous momentum! [****](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=0de67bc47d&e=0be619cbaa)
---
On Saturday, Larry Elder received 7.7% of the vote in the Western Conservative Summit poll, earning him the third-place spot behind only former President Donald Trump and Ron DeSantis. [****](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=cb6b032b6c&e=0be619cbaa) And a new poll from CBS/YouGov shows Larry receiving 9% of the vote, beating out Chris Christie, Asa Hutchinson, and Doug Burgum. He is neck-and-neck with Mike Pence, Nikki Haley, and Vivek Ramaswamy. [**Will you help Larry continue his momentum to reach the debate stage later this summer?**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=3c3b039ef7&e=0be619cbaa) We’re being outspent by these career politicians and billionaires, yet our campaign continues to climb in the GOP primary polls. WE HAVE THE MOMENTUM!But in order to keep the momentum going and to reach the 40,000 vote threshold to debate later this summer, we need your help.[**Your donation of any size brings us one step closer to sharing Larry’s message with GOP voters and the entire country. Can you give today?**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=35ee335ffc&e=0be619cbaa) Thank you for your continued support,
**Elder for President**[**P.S. As one of the few candidates who isn’t a career politician, Larry is relying on the generosity of patriotic Americans like you to propel his campaign. A donation of any amount can tell the GOP that his base of support is real and growing. Will you help him?**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=1648b2d1ae&e=0be619cbaa)

clean_body: We need to keep the momentum going! | | | | | | | Larry Surges in the Polls! | | | | | Friend, We wanted YOU to be the first to hear about our enormous momentum! On Saturday, Larry Elder received 7.7% of the vote in the Western Conservative Summit poll, earning him the third-place spot behind only former President Donald Trump and Ron DeSantis. And a new poll from CBS/YouGov shows Larry receiving 9% of the vote, beating out Chris Christie, Asa Hutchinson, and Doug Burgum. He is neck-and-neck with Mike Pence, Nikki Haley, and Vivek Ramaswamy. We’re being outspent by these career politicians and billionaires, yet our campaign continues to climb in the GOP primary polls. WE HAVE THE MOMENTUM!But in order to keep the momentum going and to reach the 40,000 vote threshold to debate later this summer, we need your help. name: Lucas Kunce
subject: An update about Marilyn and baby Harvey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Hi Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce.
Since I sent you this note about the early arrival of our new son Harvey last week, thousands of people have reached out with well wishes and stories of their own NICU babies. **Marilyn and I are so grateful for each and every one of them.**
I wanted to send you another quick update today about Marilyn and Harvey.
Marilyn got to come home from the hospital at the end of last week and I continue to be in awe of her strength and resilience. Harvey has at least a few more weeks to spend in the NICU — and we’re taking every opportunity we can to be with him.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34094?refcode=em20230613-3257&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3257%2E614464%2Ey5tjyv)
**From the bottom of our hearts, thank you so much for sending your love and support to our family and my campaign last week.** People like you have always stepped up and had my back, and I’m so honored to have you on this team.
My campaign received a swell of grassroots donations after my last message to you about baby Harvey — but here’s why I still need your help:
Our big end-of-quarter deadline is June 30 and over the next few weeks, I need supporters like you to help my campaign continue to stay on track while I try to be the husband and father Marilyn and Harvey deserve AND the Democratic candidate for U.S. Senate who’s going to defeat Josh Hawley next year.
So I wanted to ask again: **[Will you help my campaign keep on pace for our big FEC deadline later this month by adding a donation of $10, $25, or whatever you can afford today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34094?refcode=em20230613-3257&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3257%2E614464%2Ey5tjyv)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34095?refcode=em20230613-3257&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=3257%2E614464%2Ey5tjyv) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34095?refcode=em20230613-3257&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=3257%2E614464%2Ey5tjyv) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34095?refcode=em20230613-3257&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=3257%2E614464%2Ey5tjyv) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34095?refcode=em20230613-3257&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=3257%2E614464%2Ey5tjyv) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34095?refcode=em20230613-3257&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=3257%2E614464%2Ey5tjyv) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34095?refcode=em20230613-3257&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=3257%2E614464%2Ey5tjyv) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34094?refcode=em20230613-3257&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=3257%2E614464%2Ey5tjyv)
---
I need to be there for my family when they need me — and we all need to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate next year. But with your help, we can do both.
Thanks for being on my team, Peter.
Lucas Kunce

\------Forwarded Message-----
Sent: Thursday, June 8, 2023, 1:46 p.m.
From: Lucas Kunce
Subject: An important personal update
Hi Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce reaching out with an important personal update.
**On Monday at 9:47AM, my wife Marilyn delivered our newborn son, Harvey.**
7 weeks early. 3.3 lbs. An emergency c-section. I didn’t think I could be more amazed by Marilyn’s resilience — she started working as a kid to help her family survive, came to a new country for opportunity with no money and no friends, and became a successful professional at an environmental non-profit — but witnessing her strength, love, and fortitude during Harvey’s first couple of days in the NICU and her recovery has been incredible.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34094?refcode=em20230613-3257&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=3257%2E614464%2Ey5tjyv)
Marilyn is recovering faster than expected and, for the most part, Harvey is doing well. He still has some time to spend in the NICU, but he is proving to be just as feisty as his mom and getting stronger every day.
Everything that happened this week has reminded me more than ever that the campaign we’re building here in Missouri isn’t about personal ambition or getting into office — it’s about making sure families like yours and mine are ok.
It’s about making sure we have a health care system where mothers — especially women of color like Marilyn — in Missouri, a state with one of the highest maternal mortality rates in the country, are safe in childbirth.
It’s about making sure people like me and you can have kids and afford to provide for our families afterwards without getting burdened by medical bills — like the ones that forced my own family into bankruptcy growing up.
And it’s about fighting for a Missouri where we can raise our children to live and thrive for generations with strong communities, opportunities, and good pay.
So yes, I’m running for U.S. Senate. But for my family, I still need to be the most attentive father and husband I can be — especially during this time.
That’s why I’m asking for your help, Peter.
Over the next few weeks, I won’t be able to make as many calls as I usually would to raise our campaign money during this end-of-quarter push — and there’s a real chance that if we don’t make up for it in online donations, our total fundraising number could take a serious hit.
I'm asking you to help me now so that I'm not in a position where I have to choose between spending time with Marilyn and Harvey when they need me and raising the resources to defeat Josh Hawley for all of us. With your help, we can do both.
**Supporters like you have always had my back — and now I’m counting on you to be there for me again.[So please, will you help my campaign stay on track while I take some time to be a father by chipping in $10, $25, or whatever you can afford today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34094?refcode=em20230613-3257&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=3257%2E614464%2Ey5tjyv)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34095?refcode=em20230613-3257&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=12&akid=3257%2E614464%2Ey5tjyv) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34095?refcode=em20230613-3257&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=13&akid=3257%2E614464%2Ey5tjyv) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34095?refcode=em20230613-3257&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=14&akid=3257%2E614464%2Ey5tjyv) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34095?refcode=em20230613-3257&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=15&akid=3257%2E614464%2Ey5tjyv) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34095?refcode=em20230613-3257&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=16&akid=3257%2E614464%2Ey5tjyv) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34095?refcode=em20230613-3257&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=17&akid=3257%2E614464%2Ey5tjyv) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34094?refcode=em20230613-3257&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=18&akid=3257%2E614464%2Ey5tjyv)
---
Josh Hawley hasn’t done a thing to make Missouri better for parents and our children — from refusing to raise wages so we can take care of our families to voting against health care to even using his own position and power to control the lives of everyday people all across our state.
These issues are personal to me, just like they are to you. And I’m proud to be fighting for all of us in this race for U.S. Senate.
Thank you so much for having my back, Peter.
Talk soon,
Lucas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230613-3257-footer&t=19&refcode2=3257_614464_y5tjyv&akid=3257%2E614464%2Ey5tjyv)**
---

But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=20&akid=3257%2E614464%2Ey5tjyv). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

This is serious.

Sharice fought hard to pass the Inflation Reduction Act into law, because it’s the most significant legislation to tackle the rising costs of prescription drugs we’ve seen yet.

But now this law, which gives Medicare the power to negotiate for lower prescription drug prices, is being challenged by a pharmaceutical company that wants prices to remain high— _and they’re willing to take it all the way to the Supreme Court._

It’s simple: In the richest country on earth, no one should have to choose between buying a life-saving medication and keeping a roof over their head.

**[We must fight back against this new lawsuit. Will you click here before the end of the week to sign our petition and take a stand? We are looking for 5,000 activists to rise up and defend lower prescription drug costs.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64772286/411205894/-137996912?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230613_PT_rxpricing.1.1_0_1MO_website_NA_NA_rxpricing&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzY5YmY4OS0xODBhLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0xc6HWmpQxKKq8fIv8lF-JVx_ms46T4paimnKxzZi_0=&emci=4e69bf89-180a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=5369bf89-180a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)** | | [Sign On](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64772287/411205895/-137996912?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230613_PT_rxpricing.1.1_0_1MO_website_NA_NA_rxpricing&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzY5YmY4OS0xODBhLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0xc6HWmpQxKKq8fIv8lF-JVx_ms46T4paimnKxzZi_0=&emci=4e69bf89-180a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=5369bf89-180a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)

name: Margaret Mary Dunn
subject: Thrown in jail by the woke mob?
body:
Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

_**But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.**_

[**Will you help my son?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=595209ec48ae478d8d53392cc28b49db&_e=roOKZoKCKSy1nHcrBY_kxparPLGp1qYKk4ockiTgXtpeUeY7VOiqdi8SFPkpDzuJkrnZi-Lh1ZfqeQpRkiWcmfWiCK8r74Ui_mXKyKts4z_j1wIpve9KfE4HLG4J05N4hjykBCD2NgfxzSbwTT7ZQTUZmCeJYd93MvLa3kKskkT7q6fTqWJ7nqm4hQ9vmdNOTxcH3jINeS3Ne6E56uNjX-r8OJtlqAz5AoRal6lAbSxJWAAKZKZrkNCIgZRQwHI28CABbvd0HoufNwGUpbJay33b9x2Khq7tDFEwiLX2ZeT9b6syo5ajaRMR_uQK__P1NjdTGwVjhHgAsGleh-a7jeKS2gsW9tXbjzuEmjBL29WLnXMg-O3v83IS4jyBBRB_)

That's Michael in the photo.

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=595209ec48ae478d8d53392cc28b49db&_e=roOKZoKCKSy1nHcrBY_kxparPLGp1qYKk4ockiTgXtpeUeY7VOiqdi8SFPkpDzuJkrnZi-Lh1ZfqeQpRkiWcmfWiCK8r74Ui_mXKyKts4z_j1wIpve9KfE4HLG4J05N4hjykBCD2NgfxzSbwTT7ZQTUZmCeJYd93MvLa3kKskkT7q6fTqWJ7nqm4hQ9vmdNOTxcH3jINeS3Ne6E56uNjX7Z2-eNkk80CPBj2QgCsPS6Wgp1CfVqPZ-50bqFkf44OS_J8hCTJuv8Oer9GLHn_Z-eYlN0dQpUhvEaGDHmDhouLwRdO-sT0B41IiHJYtU4NMYyxTL4fFVGNSARjXqOvhPHXPlpbfbrNN6G4kbIbPBCcqksmaEDOFz33pLKqPDlj) [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=595209ec48ae478d8d53392cc28b49db&_e=roOKZoKCKSy1nHcrBY_kxparPLGp1qYKk4ockiTgXtpeUeY7VOiqdi8SFPkpDzuJkrnZi-Lh1ZfqeQpRkiWcmfWiCK8r74Ui_mXKyKts4z_j1wIpve9KfE4HLG4J05N4hjykBCD2NgfxzSbwTT7ZQTUZmCeJYd93MvLa3kKskkT7q6fTqWJ7nqm4hQ9vmdNOTxcH3jINeS3Ne6E56uNjXwOkEetTNEpWgv4VNXUH0vYkadKU7vCnEG0BttB9URgi7e7xa8DlybuBWdDg18mUzbCuz35RcyA8qaNKV10jtH4kg57JI-aXWpMAnwNahMaZIEg2BgxT0qccl-AM4kZqQ9RJwUzmR-570ncCtFy7bivQyg4z9pWq5J4MPuiwUCJc)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael 's_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=595209ec48ae478d8d53392cc28b49db&_e=roOKZoKCKSy1nHcrBY_kxparPLGp1qYKk4ockiTgXtpeUeY7VOiqdi8SFPkpDzuJkrnZi-Lh1ZfqeQpRkiWcmfWiCK8r74Ui_mXKyKts4z_j1wIpve9KfE4HLG4J05N4hjykBCD2NgfxzSbwTT7ZQTUZmCeJYd93MvLa3kKskkT7q6fTqWJ7nqm4hQ9vmdNOTxcH3jINeS3Ne6E56uNjX4c7k_TQh6j5SflQBOeqlTg0K-6x8IVusmRNzwPYvMBspP-VbZINCaK_m-iW_8-aXVOXir9aQCdnqZnF3hmGUJ_h8nvLFGm6gvUXNRIpJaphMLtnBZS6ohzG5dr14vKrHDjI7Ie2O6hD4u8gKvvAqWnkYrKcJ1Y4u5qF95I2Cxrt)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=595209ec48ae478d8d53392cc28b49db&_e=roOKZoKCKSy1nHcrBY_kxparPLGp1qYKk4ockiTgXtpeUeY7VOiqdi8SFPkpDzuJkrnZi-Lh1ZfqeQpRkiWcmfWiCK8r74Ui_mXKyKts4z_j1wIpve9KfE4HLG4J05N4hjykBCD2NgfxzSbwTT7ZQTUZmCeJYd93MvLa3kKskkT7q6fTqWJ7nqm4hQ9vmdNOTxcH3jINeS3Ne6E56uNjXy6B2qjL2qq23N5mHegnwcImudWkZSrsutlQ4kMuke_l-Xw2guwbZqAbadnhySRG91HlnaXKOaFn55STrthLQzR70-_kK4DZIn0BsJ3UQMBxbMVCcGuoID3NGITyJ0fAhLY9eapGQXesL0jHSwDmdglLAqi8XWcHpPyZdcT9PWUL)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" - and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=595209ec48ae478d8d53392cc28b49db&_e=roOKZoKCKSy1nHcrBY_kxparPLGp1qYKk4ockiTgXtpeUeY7VOiqdi8SFPkpDzuJkrnZi-Lh1ZfqeQpRkiWcmfWiCK8r74Ui_mXKyKts4z_j1wIpve9KfE4HLG4J05N4hjykBCD2NgfxzSbwTT7ZQTUZmCeJYd93MvLa3kKskkT7q6fTqWJ7nqm4hQ9vmdNOTxcH3jINeS3Ne6E56uNjX30DGG3NR6A_1oH9bJsUKLgafuLqM3n-II9M4KV4iwuQqXrOMPdC1cTomwoCI8HaeZlfzqLhx4_qUP4NjaleC8Xn6BhDGDpP9WM1qg_YU6sP44hg8aidRvlk8wXzkUv_9KSFZ9dWhblh7nvKYmpSQyjJtUJDw9fcCgu6lA3H_I0m)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a **[gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=595209ec48ae478d8d53392cc28b49db&_e=roOKZoKCKSy1nHcrBY_kxparPLGp1qYKk4ockiTgXtpeUeY7VOiqdi8SFPkpDzuJkrnZi-Lh1ZfqeQpRkiWcmfWiCK8r74Ui_mXKyKts4z_j1wIpve9KfE4HLG4J05N4hjykBCD2NgfxzSbwTT7ZQTUZmCeJYd93MvLa3kKskkT7q6fTqWJ7nqm4hQ9vmdNOTxcH3jINeS3Ne6E56uNjX5XFe3Pkk43uYKFZeoon3QuQ4UGNNc7RyxNfTg7UBr1d8O7Yp7QbYzTlbwHVpahwBnHaCWedzHRi9b8kxUdL52OrA85H77A0Si20-Jsa7q_fEpQxwsfU37QdeCYpgk-8Qzt2i0OFpED0qpw27w9_hzWSiorYC5CM1aJZwbjnUCys)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=595209ec48ae478d8d53392cc28b49db&_e=roOKZoKCKSy1nHcrBY_kxparPLGp1qYKk4ockiTgXtpeUeY7VOiqdi8SFPkpDzuJkrnZi-Lh1ZfqeQpRkiWcmfWiCK8r74Ui_mXKyKts4z_j1wIpve9KfE4HLG4J05N4hjykBCD2NgfxzSbwTT7ZQTUZmCeJYd93MvLa3kKskkT7q6fTqWJ7nqm4hQ9vmdNOTxcH3jINeS3Ne6E56uNjX8r104gohWj_g_E_syw81vduhTNk4rX-I55wp8XE7aXDWCNKy1sq-n7srw48GAUNO_eNy9QYjMpsHah3QVAajOzLsBmsXo1g-zZAre8rqS-8Br7FKKhsUIt1nwB5wol_GMfRGCTj545bF1KmkhsDwMhcaSa9e7KLqcouuBli5ad2)
_That's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=595209ec48ae478d8d53392cc28b49db&_e=roOKZoKCKSy1nHcrBY_kxparPLGp1qYKk4ockiTgXtpeUeY7VOiqdi8SFPkpDzuJkrnZi-Lh1ZfqeQpRkiWcmfWiCK8r74Ui_mXKyKts4z_j1wIpve9KfE4HLG4J05N4hjykBCD2NgfxzSbwTT7ZQTUZmCeJYd93MvLa3kKskkT7q6fTqWJ7nqm4hQ9vmdNOTxcH3jINeS3Ne6E56uNjX7Fm-aH0pBRTy8EePPGAhliIBuMZZFfPYl0DEyNaCFxCQVYTLfjtNZymd_MTZrq52L7ihxIy3rV94S4TehjHVKgdfekDpx5B_h93OJDdy100tyN7-uza0XO5aEw92hxLo4sq-BZJFZCeFrod5HTMIo3MOvZ1QU-eRUjAQiFuYT_i)
_That's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William_

I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today.

Sincerely,

Margaret Mary Dunn

PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind **[donation today of $35, $50, or $100](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=595209ec48ae478d8d53392cc28b49db&_e=roOKZoKCKSy1nHcrBY_kxparPLGp1qYKk4ockiTgXtpeUeY7VOiqdi8SFPkpDzuJkrnZi-Lh1ZfqeQpRkiWcmfWiCK8r74Ui_mXKyKts4z_j1wIpve9KfE4HLG4J05N4hjykBCD2NgfxzSbwTT7ZQTUZmCeJYd93MvLa3kKskkT7q6fTqWJ7nqm4hQ9vmdNOTxcH3jINeS3Ne6E56uNjXw_N3-zRw6y-HQHGgn5UmPM3na9OuFDdq_F-Mwyr-hTAUFvcMH1VQcGzsSWhpXTOY6wdyfrCSKLIQgtXa0nH0XfyMpuue66EoeEsY4re_eM_t_7Q0m0j49SF2gZ-MnRdEpHXcoNq9nzRahf0JSJT4_heEUkwVCjspEfJPGKapiwP)** to help Michael will mean so much to my family.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
