name: Ro Khanna
subject: Childcare for $10 a day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

Childcare is one of the largest expenses facing millions of working families across the country. Half of new parents spend at least 20% of their income on childcare. Single parents earning an average wage spend about 35% of their income. And as childcare costs outpace even inflation [https://www.cnbc.com/2022/02/21/average-cost-of-child-care-is-now-more-than-10000-dollars-per-year.html] while wages remain stagnant, the problem is only going to get worse.

This is a solvable problem. The United States is one of the richest countries in the world, yet the average wealthy democracy spends 28 times more than we do to provide citizens with quality, affordable childcare. In Canada, exceptional childcare is available for just $10 a day.

We can and must do better. Tell Congress: We need $10 a day quality childcare. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/childcare-reform-petition?contactdata=EF1yWVq8/SPWyqOEk9oWJ+ht9jwoYphyRvAGzWebIYlEOQDyBcjDVUDA+8EPLqDEVWs7noHJTLZnTQU+TYDoHfv/aIWWGdfsz+vhjdI2dDFE8C5P+0kkA5coUuD54fASrgo5VaPF0G+Ntc20tosx6A==]

Providing families with affordable childcare would have significant benefits for our economy. Parents, particularly mothers who chose to stay home because childcare was too costly, could re-enter the workforce, putting that income back into their communities and boosting local economies. It would create good-paying jobs in childcare and education and more equitable access to resources our young children need to thrive.

It’s time for us to reexamine our priorities when it comes to childcare. By providing quality child care for $10 a day and investing in our children from the earliest stages of their lives, we are helping parents, boosting our economy, and creating a solid foundation for generations to come.

Sign if you agree: Congress must make quality childcare affordable and accessible to all. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/childcare-reform-petition?contactdata=EF1yWVq8/SPWyqOEk9oWJ+ht9jwoYphyRvAGzWebIYlEOQDyBcjDVUDA+8EPLqDEVWs7noHJTLZnTQU+TYDoHfv/aIWWGdfsz+vhjdI2dDFE8C5P+0kkA5coUuD54fASrgo5VaPF0G+Ntc20tosx6A==]

In solidarity,
Ro

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ngp-email-footer?refcode=20230613-childcare]

https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com] https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA [https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA] https://twitter.com/RoKhanna [https://twitter.com/RoKhanna] info@rokhanna.com [info@rokhanna.com]

Santa Clara, CA 95051

name: Tim Scott
subject: (picture included)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
body:
Did you see me taking on the hosts of The View last week?

| |
---
| | | Patriot, did you see me taking on the hosts of The View last week?

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62819273:J7zInYINc:m:1:3299561967:E72B49B56523DDCEBFFAB678E9FE8DE0:r "Speaking the truth on The View!")
---

This was me trying to explain to Whoopi and Sunny that I am the rule, not the exception. My life disproves the lies of the Left, no matter how much they lie and try to deny it.

I believe telling young African American kids that the only way to be successful in this country is to be the exception and not the rule is a **dangerous, offensive, disgusting message to send.**
_Anyone can succeed in America with the right education and opportunity and that 's why I fight._

---
| | | [HELP ME FIGHT FOR GOOD EDUCATION AND OPPORTUNITY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62819273:J7zInYINc:m:1:3299561967:E72B49B56523DDCEBFFAB678E9FE8DE0:r "HELP ME FIGHT FOR GOOD EDUCATION AND
OPPORTUNITY")
---

If you agree with my message of optimism and hope for a better future, then I humbly ask you to take a stand with me and support my campaign. This race isn't going to be easy but I know our future is worth fighting for. That's why I'm giving this campaign everything I've got.

**_[Are you with me?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62819273:J7zInYINc:m:1:3299561967:E72B49B56523DDCEBFFAB678E9FE8DE0:r "Are you with me?")_**

---

Tim

---

---

**P.S. -** If you missed my interview on The View, no worries! You can watch it **_[HERE.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62819273:J7zInYINc:m:1:3299561967:E72B49B56523DDCEBFFAB678E9FE8DE0:r "HERE.")_**

FOR PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES - TELL TIM HE'S GOT YOUR SUPPORT!")
---

I believe our country is hungry for positive, conservative leadership.

It is time for us to restore hope, create opportunities, and protect America. **It is time for us to be proud to be Americans and proud of our president.**

**_[That's why I announced I am running for President of the United States.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62819274:J7zInYINc:m:1:3299561967:E72B49B56523DDCEBFFAB678E9FE8DE0:r "That’s
why I announced I am running for President of the United States.")_**

---
| | [SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62819274:J7zInYINc:m:1:3299561967:E72B49B56523DDCEBFFAB678E9FE8DE0:r "SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE")
---

The Democrats have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness. Here's the thing though - I know the power of the American Dream _because I have lived it._ My family went from cotton to congress in a **single lifetime.**

**This isn 't going to be easy.** I'll need your help to win.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62819274:J7zInYINc:m:1:3299561967:E72B49B56523DDCEBFFAB678E9FE8DE0:r "I NEED YOUR HELP TO WIN!")
---

**_[Can you chip in to help me win?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62819274:J7zInYINc:m:1:3299561967:E72B49B56523DDCEBFFAB678E9FE8DE0:r "Can you chip in $5, $10 or even $15 to help me win?")_**

This campaign relies on very generous gifts from people just like you. Trust me, I know that times are tough in Joe Biden's America, so I would be so grateful for any contribution.

Thank you for your support!

-Tim

---
Friend,
Reports state that I could receive a maximum sentence of **400 YEARS IN PRISON** despite being a totally and completely innocent man.
I honestly cannot believe I just typed those words to you.
It sounds like something Stalin or Mao did to eliminate their opposition.
But instead, it’s happening here in America. Communism has finally come to our shores.
We are no longer living in the country of Washington and Lincoln.
For the first time in American history, the federal government has used its prosecutorial powers to charge the _leading_ opponent of the current regime.
_**While today is certainly grim and dark, do NOT lose faith!**_
As I said once before...
_“With a dark cloud over our beloved country, I have no doubt, nevertheless, that we will Make America Great Again.”_

clean_body: I never thought this could happen in America. I never thought this could happen in America. - | | | | | Friend, Reports state that I could receive a maximum sentence of 400 YEARS IN PRISON despite being a totally and completely innocent man. I honestly cannot believe I just typed those words to you. It sounds like something Stalin or Mao did to eliminate their opposition. But instead, it’s happening here in America. Communism has finally come to our shores. We are no longer living in the country of Washington and Lincoln. For the first time in American history, the federal government has used its prosecutorial powers to charge the leading opponent of the current regime. While today is certainly grim and dark, do NOT lose faith! As I said once before... “With a dark cloud over our beloved country, I have no doubt, nevertheless, that we will Make America Great Again.” | | Thank you and God bless you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: David Trone
subject: I’ve been on both sides of the wealth gap
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Maryland
body:
Hi there –

1,000 Poll Submissions Needed on Income Inequality >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/6FXfhwWyUkqarVPucRWMMw2

Here’s a staggering fact, everyone: The top 10% of earners in America hold 70% of the country’s wealth.

And even though worker output has increased, wages have barely budged since the 1980s.

The trend is clear: Those at the top keep expanding their wealth and hard working Americans are bearing the brunt of the wealth gap.

Look, I’ve been on both sides of this wealth gap.

Growing up, my family struggled to pay the bills. The bank took away our family farm and my father filed for bankruptcy. Thankfully, I was able to carve out a new path for my family and I through hard work and persistence.

As I opened my company, taking care of the people who decided to work with us – and making sure they were well-compensated – was a top priority. That’s why I offer partner benefits and free college to employees.

I believe Congress should continue to do more to fix income inequality but as always, I want to hear what you think:

Should Congress pass legislation to fix income inequality?

YES. >> Income Inequality is one of the most pressing issues in America. >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/6FXfhwWyUkqarVPucRWMMw2

NO. >> Congress should not do anything about income inequality. >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/6FXfhwWyUkqarVPucRWMMw2

Take the Poll >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/70tWyJs-MEO0PVtI_gUtgA2

Thank you for sharing your perspective!

– David Trone

body:

|

Fellow Conservative,

We thought the government was pressuring Big Tech to censor stories about Hunter Biden’s foreign business dealings and his laptop days before the 2020 presidential election...**then brave journalists exposed the Twitter Files.**

We thought that it was likely that COVID came from a lab. Then FBI Director Christopher Wray confirmed this spring that coronavirus likely stemmed from a lab leak in Wuhan.

We thought the Steele Dossier was fake. Then we found out the **Democrats knew the dossier was false but used it to spy on President Trump’s campaign in 2016.**

**With every new bit of infomation we find that the truth is always worse than we thought.**

Whether it is the CDC or the DOJ, the FBI and social media companies taking down posts and limiting speech, **federal agencies are targeting the American people who they are supposed to serve**. And the Democrats? **They always seem to turn a blind eye and move on.**

**I am in Washington to fight for YOU**. I don’t think the government should be targeting people on the Right OR the Left. But I must admit, **this fight has put a HUGE target on my back** , a target that will no doubt grow larger as the election approaches, **[which is why I am reaching out- I need your help today](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b4f6da23b2554f288c89376c76762885&_e=5IpuLBCZkFQTTfbhDGByiiFmiG23o_ZcDHxZP58tTBbMIZp2k9A_obrB_qqZOhvzc9be6fP8fTTCXjM4eJefe2iwfaC0xR-NhKl4tTEYQDdqkJfK1Tn0KxwLBUfNH6d1Ie7tpCtT6rGkqfDAD7ECui7Qeb4oT979BGlPPHDQCfP9M5MHCJn249YuA5W9QCPPy-8vz1X4dANtFGWFdVQpXlEpAdnn1dAZn2XDWQ2ZDvjKOdQ1NJDl-_yybjvBaRchMqXSNwgMP_SeREH05sCzDgfzcFq4cSwBblQ7U5fftvTRyltRCJuaT6PJLHYXaMRTrvJiPgBS9UzsT8YcgadK_5ln5MQ-YmTzBhidVIfpV6N46jjRcMF3DiRdsUY32KA_rCiPx2WWr6XrrW_lRwddKA4BskVFqdFubWRTgD0jum7QAmgLD2JAtumH-kTOf59H)**.

I’ll never stop standing on the frontlines in defense of our constitutionally enshrined liberties. That said, I need supporters like you ready to do battle along side me - because the Democrats will do whatever they can to boot me out of Washington.

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

clean_body: We thought the government was pressuring Big Tech to censor stories about Hunter Biden’s foreign business dealings and his laptop days before the 2020 presidential election...then brave journalists exposed the Twitter Files. | | Fellow Conservative, We thought the government was pressuring Big Tech to censor stories about Hunter Biden’s foreign business dealings and his laptop days before the 2020 presidential election...then brave journalists exposed the Twitter Files. We thought that it was likely that COVID came from a lab. Then FBI Director Christopher Wray confirmed this spring that coronavirus likely stemmed from a lab leak in Wuhan. We thought the Steele Dossier was fake. Then we found out the Democrats knew the dossier was false but used it to spy on President Trump’s campaign in 2016. With every new bit of infomation we find that the truth is always worse than we thought. Whether it is the CDC or the DOJ, the FBI and social media companies taking down posts and limiting speech, federal agencies are targeting the American people who they are supposed to serve. And the Democrats? They always seem to turn a blind eye and move on. I am in Washington to fight for YOU. I don’t think the government should be targeting people on the Right OR the Left. But I must admit, this fight has put a HUGE target on my back , a target that will no doubt grow larger as the election approaches, . I’ll never stop standing on the frontlines in defense of our constitutionally enshrined liberties. That said, I need supporters like you ready to do battle along side me - because the Democrats will do whatever they can to boot me out of Washington. As a personal favor to me, Make no mistake, Fellow Conservative - our way of life is under attack from the Left, and I need my team of top supporters willing to stand by my side to help push back against the assaults on limited government and individual liberty.I need your help to fight back against those who want to transform our great Republic into a socialist utopia. I'm proud to stand with you as we work to stop the far Left from making our country unrecognizeable. God Bless, Jim Jordan | About Jim Jordan: Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable. subject: BREAKING: Chairman Sanders leveraging power for drug price cuts

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/lower_drug_prices_pt/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230613_PT_DrugPrices_0_6MO_NA_NA_NA_DrugPrices&t=1009&akid=4367%2E5885482%2EFZb0ZA ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

BREAKING NEWS! Bernie Sanders goes to battle
for lower drug prices

Chairman Sanders is putting his foot down and using his power as head of
the HELP committee to block all Department of Health and Human Services
nominees until the Biden administration puts forward a clear strategy to
"lower the outrageously high cost of prescription drugs."

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/lower_drug_prices_pt/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230613_PT_DrugPrices_0_6MO_NA_NA_NA_DrugPrices&t=1010&akid=4367%2E5885482%2EFZb0ZA ]LOWER DRUG PRICES

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/lower_drug_prices_pt/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230613_PT_DrugPrices_0_6MO_NA_NA_NA_DrugPrices&t=1011&akid=4367%2E5885482%2EFZb0ZA ]Add your name here to stand with Bernie and demand President Biden stop
letting drug companies price-gouge our neighbors to death!

It’s time for us to take over the levers of power and break Big Pharma’s
grip on our government. There are more than 3 pharma lobbyists for every
member of Congress letting corporations price people out of life-saving
medicines that are developed using our tax dollars!

That’s why Bernie is fighting so hard. He introduced his drug pricing bill
in May and has been grilling Big Pharma execs under oath. Now, the White
House can’t confirm nominees without him, and he’s using this window of
opportunity to leverage his power and make the demand — and we need to
have his back!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/lower_drug_prices_pt/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230613_PT_DrugPrices_0_6MO_NA_NA_NA_DrugPrices&t=1012&akid=4367%2E5885482%2EFZb0ZA ]Join Our Revolution and Bernie Sanders in demanding President Biden
present a plan to drastically lower drug prices. We're up against Big
Pharma and need to stand up and be heard.

Here’s what Bernie told the Washington Post yesterday: “My goal is to
change government in general, policy in terms of the pharmaceutical
industry, and demand that the cost of prescription drugs in this country
are significantly lowered. Politicians for years have talked about the
high cost of prescription drugs, relatively little has been done, and it’s
time that we act decisively.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/lower_drug_prices_pt/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230613_PT_DrugPrices_0_6MO_NA_NA_NA_DrugPrices&t=1013&akid=4367%2E5885482%2EFZb0ZA ]Sign to stand with Bernie.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive

subject: What your front yard is missing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=a7a7f369e15078a48cd7845a6c3e3b71c2b1a93ef65334de45c74e335ad00595425b7f4ba95d615545f1331ea2da2981cc8549c3ae63722df9460c50836c450123d1c7432e9d8488146f352fc4141f54

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7b68d1c877f813c5e3fb20a185928731bdc7efcff36e110b0ae54414b2fca0c3a30c47ef177a85bb7c6f2e54a6659bcba3e2c62bb6b6c6639e51a9492c08d9e7

Friend,

THEY'RE IN! Official Ron DeSantis for President yard signs have hit our shop and we're ready to ship them to you TODAY.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7b68d1c877f813c5e3fb20a185928731bdc7efcff36e110b0ae54414b2fca0c3a30c47ef177a85bb7c6f2e54a6659bcba3e2c62bb6b6c6639e51a9492c08d9e7

We're so excited for you to show your Ron DeSantis for President support, friend. Plant your official yard sign on your front lawn today to show Gov. DeSantis the HUGE amount of support he has as he begins campaigning across the nation.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7b68d1c877f813c5e3fb20a185928731bdc7efcff36e110b0ae54414b2fca0c3a30c47ef177a85bb7c6f2e54a6659bcba3e2c62bb6b6c6639e51a9492c08d9e7
GET YOUR YARD SIGN TODAY

We'll see you on the trail,

Team DeSantis

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7b68d1c877f813c5c8596364e2968956e9347d2e34a6317b6811dec27b8c24f33acf4c6a8efdcd79bd91a3ac93cb6841649c42124cbad2f92c2c9b1bb9991b87
Sign up here!

Meet Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7b68d1c877f813c5e3fb20a185928731bdc7efcff36e110b0ae54414b2fca0c3a30c47ef177a85bb7c6f2e54a6659bcba3e2c62bb6b6c6639e51a9492c08d9e7

A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.

Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
-
Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,
-
Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,
-
Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,
-
Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,
-
Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,
-
Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,
-
Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,
-
Protecting the unborn,
-
Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,
-
Expanding education freedom,
-
Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,
-
Lowering prescription drug costs,
-
Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,
-
Creating a universal school choice program,
-
Delivering record-breaking tax relief,
-
Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,
-
Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,
-
Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,
-
Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,
-
...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
-
Record tax relief
-
ESG prohibitions
-
Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP
-
The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.
-
Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency
-
Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI
-
Improvements to our state’s infrastructure
-
Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists
-
The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis
-
Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions
-
Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida
No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

clean_body: To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window. Friend, THEY'RE IN! Official Ron DeSantis for President yard signs have hit our shop and we're ready to ship them to you TODAY. We're so excited for you to show your Ron DeSantis for President support, friend. Plant your official yard sign on your front lawn today to show Gov. DeSantis the HUGE amount of support he has as he begins campaigning across the nation. GET YOUR YARD SIGN TODAY We'll see you on the trail, Team DeSantis Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Meet Ron DeSantis A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: - Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, - Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, - Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, - Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, - Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, - Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, - Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, - Protecting the unborn, - Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, - Expanding education freedom, - Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, - Lowering prescription drug costs, - Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, - Creating a universal school choice program, - Delivering record-breaking tax relief, - Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, - Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, - Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, - Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, - ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn’t stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.” Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: - Record tax relief - ESG prohibitions - Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP - The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. - Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency - Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI - Improvements to our state’s infrastructure - Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists - The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis - Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions - Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. Preheader: We know we can beat them — because we’ve done it time and time again. | | | Peter, Donald Trump was just arraigned in a federal courtroom in Miami, where he plead not guilty to 37 criminal counts including providing false statements, conspiracy to obstruct, and willful retention of classified documents. He also faces likely additional indictments in the coming months over his violent plot to overturn the results of the 2020 presidential election. If you’ve been anywhere near a TV or phone, you’re probably aware of this already. It seems possible — finally — that a lifetime of corruption and a decade of demagoguery may be catching up to a man who has evaded accountability for his actions for so long. But here’s the thing: We didn’t defeat Trump in 2020 by counting on any external forces to intervene. And we won’t defeat him — or the authoritarianism that now pervades the entire Republican Party — by sitting on our hands and waiting for things outside our control to happen either. **We need to prepare now to win the same way we’ve won in _every single electoral cycle_ since Trump first stepped foot in the White House: By building a multiracial, working class movement across our differences — and supporting and electing amazing candidates for office at every level who live and breathe that movement.** **[If you are in, please chip in with a contribution today to help us win in 2023, 2024 and beyond.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUPexF1h1zfBjepYTdmwYmF3ICUwK7toy7MLis2M1y4Uik8o5iwxe8dx1JKzxBAxizY_8kkujCimPlAbYKJKpq1k1DD0_yw8lHAsQooV4VxUuL2GrIARnRBbVW6rjJ5Y8p_DYpfBPds5fEb1YUH-RsmEtNKCGx0HoMFLhkPrQU_M1lO_-d_regMKG9SNQJFIFrjpE4EGoiDdRYfSFYu-g-QlVn6VWs3-Trf8oHe2LwMUldYBYlLClyN2QXQqmIJCOVWjRo9xxfCUrPWgPoy4gtvOu4XY5-X6utRIQgDtppNabkxulOBOxjjg1Q1wVhGWkCvkRvz-VFZrKxnpO2MUdLItj6xaNvuqEWHUt7-h4D2cpktJrvdcHis8Fl4Py6bbt4KA76S7wzufSKP9452pSOLw/3x0/7pDvG4lYTc-dx_bRDtYMmQ/h0/UmHhyCLIR1fFcOWcTiTYhT6UrZEBNy8ujz2cmLSjgXI)** **[Contribute $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUPexF1h1zfBjepYTdmwYmF3ICUwK7toy7MLis2M1y4Uik8o5iwxe8dx1JKzxBAxizIkAVlXP3lmA6qqfEckEc2JYsM3ozZpIyYYPvPmiw53q3k_oKj9Czzebo24blZCwcdZe8FAforY7bdwmV2UNQbF4G58g0F-7lGr1xDngdQ_X6y1gH5Xq49-t8CKMmUKBM5-iQslG55Ee01ROV1xlfcNCSC6yn4dTVE-OtaM1dFIncB4lEzrlSb2g89BMYlEE0xxx8VYFIcDhP87IUuN6TPzd7e_ZKxqRGwA9Is_sFjMCWVG7ah8yLtqMgDVKIzjSQcaYuOfv7sQ4Va8z7OG4jotw5-HI7kemke4HRKiLUS11iPIJ6TE5scaqop8VGNLHcMnr8t3GpfXkvkLlUrMijxw/3x0/7pDvG4lYTc-dx_bRDtYMmQ/h1/Rx06rkvui7q2gY8Fu-q-NyQgnM8hc5uyeGUGnLYIwBY)** Trump will have his day in court. But whether he is found guilty or not, and whether he becomes the Republican nominee or not, we know the attacks from MAGA Republicans will continue. We see it almost every day, from attacks on the LGBTQ+ movement to banning books in schools to attempts to overrule the will of voters to the state-by-state rollback of reproductive rights. Once again, it’s going to take all of us to fight back and defend our freedoms. **But we know we can beat them — because we’ve done it time and time again.** It’s what we did in 2018, when we took back Congress from Republicans and helped elect the Squad. It’s what we did in 2020, when we came together to kick Trump out of the White House, gave Democrats a majority in the Senate, and made sure no one could overturn the will of the people. It’s what we did in 2022, when we defied all expectations for a midterm year and elected another slate of WFP champions to Congress and all the way down the ballot. And it’s what we need to do in 2023, 2024, and for as long as it takes if we’re going to build the type of country and world that we want to live in. **[We can’t count on anyone else to save us from Trump and Trumpism. We can only count on each other. Can you chip in to help us recruit, train, and elect more working people to office who share our vision of a country that works for the many, not the few?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUPexF1h1zfBjepYTdmwYmF3ICUwK7toy7MLis2M1y4Uik8o5iwxe8dx1JKzxBAxizpk5ZJT93CDDM962ZV7b0KbXSVAPPa-yXfmoJI4ZJDUDq28C4gOpWEdqZ-xrHuKj6uPHkQEBfWAwRzUMiBHlgQ4TspFh3swTvhgF6SPWpmEdfie96XNC1ocy0L7CoqWI4NGF83mirrJKmhLzBDdYVBehIKMyvXeeiZJfzfJcmWjd0XoXZzcTwcCSwqh-lkwSyhz8FxS1H625wTh1miwieL3rFs0eEat7CZEnEAdtoTUInIS5YAG8nFfoPMPokG_V10Apdme77khywfs4hQ_kjao5wfkbH9CpBu9FP9TKCBUu0dpB5GdqvRKZXgAFlKtiUIFZ1HM-4qlxUabV_FLrvuA/3x0/7pDvG4lYTc-dx_bRDtYMmQ/h2/e9kYwOC5-0idlzw8K89vaI7HcHRKBCzpEq4dxotq9TE)** clean_body: Preheader: We know we can beat them — because we’ve done it time and time again. | | | Peter, Donald Trump was just arraigned in a federal courtroom in Miami, where he plead not guilty to 37 criminal counts including providing false statements, conspiracy to obstruct, and willful retention of classified documents. He also faces likely additional indictments in the coming months over his violent plot to overturn the results of the 2020 presidential election. If you’ve been anywhere near a TV or phone, you’re probably aware of this already. It seems possible — finally — that a lifetime of corruption and a decade of demagoguery may be catching up to a man who has evaded accountability for his actions for so long. But here’s the thing: We didn’t defeat Trump in 2020 by counting on any external forces to intervene. And we won’t defeat him — or the authoritarianism that now pervades the entire Republican Party — by sitting on our hands and waiting for things outside our control to happen either. We need to prepare now to win the same way we’ve won in every single electoral cycle since Trump first stepped foot in the White House: By building a multiracial, working class movement across our differences — and supporting and electing amazing candidates for office at every level who live and breathe that movement. Trump will have his day in court. But whether he is found guilty or not, and whether he becomes the Republican nominee or not, we know the attacks from MAGA Republicans will continue. We see it almost every day, from attacks on the LGBTQ+ movement to banning books in schools to attempts to overrule the will of voters to the state-by-state rollback of reproductive rights. Once again, it’s going to take all of us to fight back and defend our freedoms. But we know we can beat them — because we’ve done it time and time again. It’s what we did in 2018, when we took back Congress from Republicans and helped elect the Squad. It’s what we did in 2020, when we came together to kick Trump out of the White House, gave Democrats a majority in the Senate, and made sure no one could overturn the will of the people. It’s what we did in 2022, when we defied all expectations for a midterm year and elected another slate of WFP champions to Congress and all the way down the ballot. And it’s what we need to do in 2023, 2024, and for as long as it takes if we’re going to build the type of country and world that we want to live in. In solidarity, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families, please .

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Wisconsin’s Senate race is statistically tied
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Friend, Tammy Baldwin here. I wanted you to hear this from me: **The first poll on Wisconsin’s Senate race shows me in a statistical tie with a potential GOP candidate.** The truth is, this is not the first time political pundits have shared how challenging our race will be — _CNN_ and _The Hill_ have already named my Senate seat one of the most vulnerable in the country. Since day one, we’ve known Republicans are ready to spend millions to try to unseat me. They know our state’s track record of close-margin elections and will try to use that to their advantage every step of the way. We can’t afford to let them take the lead. That’s why I am personally reaching out today asking for your support to make sure our team can come up with the resources we need to fight back. **[Please, will you split an urgent contribution between Tina Smith and our campaign? subject: [POLL] Do parents deserve a voice in the classroom?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Federation for Children
body:
Opponents of school choice say parents have no say in children's curriculum, but we want your thoughts.

| | Friend, **_In 2021,_** Randi Weingarten, President of the American Federation for Teachers, said this... **"****_Parents claim they have the right to shape their kids ' school curriculum. They don't."_** Since then, Weingarten has continued to signal that teachers unions should have the ultimate say on education decisions, **not parents.**
That's why we're reaching out to get your opinion on this issue. **Who should have the final say over children 's education: parents or teachers unions?**

subject: [POLL] Do parents deserve a voice in the classroom?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Federation for Children
body:
Opponents of school choice say parents have no say in children's curriculum, but we want your thoughts.

| | |

| | Friend, **_In 2021,_** Randi Weingarten, President of the American Federation for Teachers, said this... **"****_Parents claim they have the right to shape their kids ' school curriculum. They don't."_** Since then, Weingarten has continued to signal that teachers unions should have the ultimate say on education decisions, **not parents.**
That's why we're reaching out to get your opinion on this issue. **Who should have the final say over children 's education: parents or teachers unions?**

On Saturday, Larry Elder received 7.7% of the vote in the Western Conservative Summit poll, earning him the third-place spot behind only former President Donald Trump and Ron DeSantis. [****](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a29a4b84a09147d0b723e1d10d292aad&_e=4LM70XQ4zWhF3X8vM5uDyqQLi_Qn0MCABFG7-kM62WKGFgLoiQwb4OMqcSrFR57DssTN_xqAFWQz7R7eg6cOARcDXj9-caHZwtsHqnTVufqNylesYH-rWtJ36_WaLmuRy6BwZXCrFKcTh_lJ75M_QtOxt6O8yqsMevB5og4b_rZWCoNc41KjnRxwGzfHKXVLmqqMVA1cR96WUXbNrvDRDyuk1wE1JD_AXa_HuRHyA5laEtugVgBm537Z4ChrQHecL4yCNtctwRkfj94pcDGhEb4LQB0K4bOND-peeNCLaP8%3D) And a new poll from CBS/YouGov shows Larry receiving 9% of the vote, beating out Chris Christie, Asa Hutchinson, and Doug Burgum. He is neck-and-neck with Mike Pence, Nikki Haley, and Vivek Ramaswamy. [**Will you help Larry continue his momentum to reach the debate stage later this summer?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a29a4b84a09147d0b723e1d10d292aad&_e=4LM70XQ4zWhF3X8vM5uDyqQLi_Qn0MCABFG7-kM62WKGFgLoiQwb4OMqcSrFR57DssTN_xqAFWQz7R7eg6cOARcDXj9-caHZwtsHqnTVufqNylesYH-rWtJ36_WaLmuRy6BwZXCrFKcTh_lJ75M_QjjlznP7gOezAsLPD_kG3WL3WD7iF5K_Waep97PaR0YbdnlQuepheD9m2B4tfzBUkJQ_gFN5XZzY3wu9VagM4q5cnm34dnahMfwRjeB__KZ8FXHHn3D64pbRcaNQz080uP1s-j9-nB5LBiNf6LiOieM%3D) We're being outspent by these career politicians and billionaires, yet our campaign continues to climb in the GOP primary polls. WE HAVE THE MOMENTUM! But in order to keep the momentum going and to reach the 40,000 vote threshold to debate later this summer, we need your help. [**Your donation of any size brings us one step closer to sharing Larry 's message with GOP voters and the entire country. Can you give today?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a29a4b84a09147d0b723e1d10d292aad&_e=4LM70XQ4zWhF3X8vM5uDyqQLi_Qn0MCABFG7-kM62WKGFgLoiQwb4OMqcSrFR57DssTN_xqAFWQz7R7eg6cOARcDXj9-caHZwtsHqnTVufqNylesYH-rWtJ36_WaLmuRy6BwZXCrFKcTh_lJ75M_Qq_hxHoRmACC31Th8aezl7muuiXt-4FBsn395AQtv1deF_jn5CN5A_LvREbb38wAm_IRnq9MV8-EC1QhvRCfGLpKcFd93rPZAPF0civfXTg83bHBLEw6NqegJST2AcEsPBtlUCPEQeYJvtulbDG_Phk%3D) Thank you for your continued support,

clean_body: We need to keep the momentum going! | | | | | | | Larry Surges in the Polls! | | | | | Friend, We wanted YOU to be the first to hear about our enormous momentum! On Saturday, Larry Elder received 7.7% of the vote in the Western Conservative Summit poll, earning him the third-place spot behind only former President Donald Trump and Ron DeSantis. And a new poll from CBS/YouGov shows Larry receiving 9% of the vote, beating out Chris Christie, Asa Hutchinson, and Doug Burgum. He is neck-and-neck with Mike Pence, Nikki Haley, and Vivek Ramaswamy. We're being outspent by these career politicians and billionaires, yet our campaign continues to climb in the GOP primary polls. WE HAVE THE MOMENTUM! But in order to keep the momentum going and to reach the 40,000 vote threshold to debate later this summer, we need your help. Thank you for your continued support, Elder for President | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR PRESIDENT 24 | 650 Town Center Drive, Suite 1500 Costa Mesa, CA 92626 USA Copyright(C) 2023 , All rights reserved. name: Fight For Our Kids
subject: winning the election didn’t matter
body:
We’ve had enough of these woke judges who think their political activism matters more than the safety of our kids. | | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=54b19b34abf24e97b7c49efb284fac64&_e=GpPnaTEMcXMBBvFaN9wikqRHIA20P_-hFgH7QhWda8lU6dKxFO6yqI-htDf2ff0U6QGDScHCGVNxx0nBdDEza2gVzkqLj1ANUh8bNZAqIUZdXmRe0VrTIXQwnY07KtW1RjLMlXCy5SzGnN-l1bIuS-QmCXQRY9CditOoGqZGh1sCIOkcdOtFooA-JdAiJJ9u3g6k_p3NgFoixZ788-iDAKkj_j0fbUuyvud9qE3CKFPk034o_Bpa4x13R_NFX1z0No7sXnu92uWsXXGigEUfKYsoxGWNPx1Qia9up3O-qwXdEWLw3dVBjovdSk1SHJYNAUKk1YZZU0WZb4i5zqKJDoSSw1wapx1q-P-3X3GfOGRlK2t7obI8k659kKIXvCqnjcLtG8z-XabHgOw46otI2A%3D%3D)
---
Peter, _Did you see that an activist federal judge just struck down Florida’s ban on harmful puberty blockers for minors?_
---
| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=54b19b34abf24e97b7c49efb284fac64&_e=GpPnaTEMcXMBBvFaN9wikqRHIA20P_-hFgH7QhWda8lU6dKxFO6yqI-htDf2ff0U6QGDScHCGVNxx0nBdDEza2gVzkqLj1ANUh8bNZAqIUZdXmRe0VrTIXQwnY07KtW1RjLMlXCy5SzGnN-l1bIuS-QmCXQRY9CditOoGqZGh1sCIOkcdOtFooA-JdAiJJ9u3g6k_p3NgFoixZ788-iDAKkj_j0fbUuyvud9qE3CKFPx9YoS5bdimpb4cGMsVGtEwrLvDuwZ55xbjsEZLy9ifRe4yXaiVuJ-ZJ_uwBqMCN4-G-84KatCW71hFrPDdAMh6erh5Yh9mUbRxXB2t9TSUyhAm2gbLRs2joflzXV09dzF7H-R78Mcz2MbwND8_VotTBbfQW2YX8buWsOz84yVpA%3D%3D)
---
| |
* _**It didn’t matter**_ that the Republicans had significant majorities in both houses of the state legislature.
* **_It didn’t matter_ **that they had just re-elected their Republican governor by nearly 20 points.
* _**It didn’t even matter**_ that polling shows that nearly 70% of Americans agree that banning puberty blockers for young children is the right thing to do.

**All that mattered was that one woke judge didn’t like the law****.** And with a sweep of his pen, he declared that “gender identity is real” and threw the law out the window. **Peter, if we allow woke judicial activists to secure power in our judicial system, winning every other election will barely matter. ** As a well-informed conservative, you’ve heard of judicial activism before — but too many people think of it as something that happens only at the level of the Supreme Court. Peter, that’s simply not true. It happens at EVERY level of the judiciary. And that’s why [_**Fair Courts America**_](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=54b19b34abf24e97b7c49efb284fac64&_e=GpPnaTEMcXMBBvFaN9wikqRHIA20P_-hFgH7QhWda8lU6dKxFO6yqI-htDf2ff0U6QGDScHCGVNxx0nBdDEza2gVzkqLj1ANUh8bNZAqIUZdXmRe0VrTIXQwnY07KtW1RjLMlXCy5SzGnN-l1bIuS-QmCXQRY9CditOoGqZGh1sCIOkcdOtFooA-JdAiJJ9u3g6k_p3NgFoixZ788-iDAKkj_j0fbUuyvud9qE3CKFOi-sXfjd6aNRGyBgVR4HLd02niyMNen4Q7JQTP1s-x2nPj4lY1Ybj8HoPB4RACvLdDwf3mx2jrXWJCsw7S07rpZOjvs0LKVwrwU-5MHXgI1-FaE820snVbKN9FHXlzr40KlkADM5KybMjo7R1OhcaZzWjaz8xZ0HaqF43Lk1KfjQ%3D%3D) exists. Our mission is to fight back against the woke mob’s takeover of our judicial system, from the Supreme Court to your local prosecutor. Tracking these races across the country is a massive undertaking — but it is absolutely critical to protecting our republic. [_**Peter, we need your help. Any amount you can give will support our efforts to defend the rule of law in our country. The woke mob is advancing on our courts right now, and only one thing can stop them from total takeover: YOU.**_](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=54b19b34abf24e97b7c49efb284fac64&_e=GpPnaTEMcXMBBvFaN9wikqRHIA20P_-hFgH7QhWda8lU6dKxFO6yqI-htDf2ff0U6QGDScHCGVNxx0nBdDEza2gVzkqLj1ANUh8bNZAqIUZdXmRe0VrTIXQwnY07KtW1RjLMlXCy5SzGnN-l1bIuS-QmCXQRY9CditOoGqZGh1sCIOkcdOtFooA-JdAiJJ9u3g6k_p3NgFoixZ788-iDAKkj_j0fbUuyvud9qE3CKFPW6VrrBsXGuJ6xk6iCiTXmP-y7vH0titCeI7DFaBwsbuLoCq8FvlFW0y-XnbFqP98-FtWS4IjtG7lNjwdxuYy6uoPLyik1Riit_K1wrpEXGSLrSa3ks7vFPab1SJdEGY8GGNs3O5dXoQqFD_mdRcHvLHvMxXa6zKDcXjPKf-q7zg%3D%3D)

**Mar-a-Lago, FL—** Today, Ron DeSanctimonious bizarrely announced he does not support the three Trump-appointed Supreme Court justices, who overturned the Roe v. Wade decision.
Ron’s latest flip-flop has left many wondering if he tripped in his high-heel boots and hit his head or is simply hallucinating from his disastrous event in Oklahoma last weekend, as he seems to have forgotten countless statements he made in the past praising President Trump’s nominations of Justice Neil Gorsuch, Brett Kavanaugh, and Amy Coney Barrett.

name: Adam Frisch
subject: Lauren Boebert attacking me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado
body:
The same day I announced that I was running again in a rematch against Lauren Boebert, the smear campaign from her national Republican allies began.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64782261/411221257/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjA1ZmViNy0yNDBhLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BFNoCOR7lHvcwM4n_tNz0v8JyI7EmGLqajDgGBoS4vI=&emci=fcff2e78-230a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=9b05feb7-240a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64782262/411221258/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjA1ZmViNy0yNDBhLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BFNoCOR7lHvcwM4n_tNz0v8JyI7EmGLqajDgGBoS4vI=&emci=fcff2e78-230a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=9b05feb7-240a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
Well, it didn’t take long. **The same day I announced that I was running again in a rematch against Lauren Boebert, the smear campaign from Boebert and her national Republican allies began.**
It’s no mystery why: Last year, I lost to Boebert by only 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. And unless they lie about me and smear my name on every TV across the district, they know we’re going to win in 2024.
Here’s the thing, though. I’m not running to represent myself like Boebert. I’m not going to be a part of the circus in Washington. I’m running because the people of Western and Southern Colorado deserve someone in Congress who will wake up every day ready to work for them and their families – not corporate PAC donors.
I’m ready to put forward a positive vision for our district and our country, but I need your help to make sure we don’t get drowned out by Boebert’s lies.
**We’ve set a goal of raising another $250,000 before our mid-month deadline on Thursday so that we have the resources we need to win, but right now we’re still just $75,158 short. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so I’m counting on you to chip in now:**

clean_body: The same day I announced that I was running again in a rematch against Lauren Boebert, the smear campaign from her national Republican allies began. Hello, Well, it didn’t take long. The same day I announced that I was running again in a rematch against Lauren Boebert, the smear campaign from Boebert and her national Republican allies began. It’s no mystery why: Last year, I lost to Boebert by only 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. And unless they lie about me and smear my name on every TV across the district, they know we’re going to win in 2024. Here’s the thing, though. I’m not running to represent myself like Boebert. I’m not going to be a part of the circus in Washington. I’m running because the people of Western and Southern Colorado deserve someone in Congress who will wake up every day ready to work for them and their families – not corporate PAC donors. I’m ready to put forward a positive vision for our district and our country, but I need your help to make sure we don’t get drowned out by Boebert’s lies. We’ve set a goal of raising another $250,000 before our mid-month deadline on Thursday so that we have the resources we need to win, but right now we’re still just $75,158 short. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so I’m counting on you to chip in now: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Lauren Boebert may have the special interests behind her, but I have something even more powerful: You. Thank you for being a part of our grassroots campaign. With gratitude - Adam ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Adam=20Laxalt?=
subject: Secure your tickets
body:
Join thousands of Patriots at the Basque Fry on June 17th! | | | [ ](https://morninginnevadapac.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=047a240fc40ae6cc0e2ac8dec&id=612302ead4&e=b87806bd09)
---
| | Peter,
We’re just a few days away from our eighth annual Basque Fry. The Basque Fry is Nevada's largest annual political event and it’s taking place this June 17th at the picturesque Corley Ranch in Gardnerville. This year, we are honored to have Governor Ron DeSantis as our special guest, alongside thousands of conservative patriots like yourself.

[**_Secure your ticket now >>_**](https://morninginnevadapac.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=047a240fc40ae6cc0e2ac8dec&id=da34022899&e=b87806bd09)

Prepare for an incredible lineup of speakers at the Basque Fry, including Special Guest Governor Ron DeSantis, Dana Loesch, Dave Rubin, Congressman Mark Amodei, Nevada Governor Joe Lombardo, and Nevada Lt. Governor Stavros Anthony.
**_[PURCHASE YOUR TICKETS TODAY!](https://morninginnevadapac.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=047a240fc40ae6cc0e2ac8dec&id=07f1da9312&e=b87806bd09)_**
**_[SUPPORT RON DESANTIS](https://morninginnevadapac.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=047a240fc40ae6cc0e2ac8dec&id=9a5bd82c74&e=b87806bd09)_**
I recently wrote an [op-ed](https://morninginnevadapac.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=047a240fc40ae6cc0e2ac8dec&id=d2ba238bb7&e=b87806bd09) published in the Reno Gazette Journal about why I am endorsing Ron DeSantis for president, acknowledging his proven record in protecting American values.

DeSantis's accomplishments in Florida have transformed the state into a remarkable example of what he could achieve for our nation.

**Here are just a few reasons why Ron DeSantis should become our next president:**
* Ron DeSantis has consistently demonstrated his unwavering support for local law enforcement and fought back against Black Lives Matter in Florida.
* Governor DeSantis defends parental rights and works hard to fight back the Woke agenda.
* He fights for election integrity, stood against COVID-19 mandates, and takes on Big Tech, China and big corporations.

The stakes for the 2024 White House race are incredibly high. Just a few years of Joe Biden and the left's agenda has divided America, and our citizens are disheartened about their children's future. **_However, I firmly believe that Ron DeSantis, a dedicated conservative, can and will defeat Joe Biden._**

Join us on [**June 17th at the Basque Fry event**](https://morninginnevadapac.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=047a240fc40ae6cc0e2ac8dec&id=d040b22d70&e=b87806bd09), and hear from Governor DeSantis yourself!
[**_PURCHASE YOUR TICKETS TODAY!_**](https://morninginnevadapac.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=047a240fc40ae6cc0e2ac8dec&id=65cb04ca1e&e=b87806bd09)
I hope to see you there,
Adam Laxalt

---

name: Sen. Heidi Campbell
subject: Peter, we just released our full policy platform
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230613_em_fr_b1_HC_big.acq [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230613_em_fr_b1_HC_big.acq]
Peter,
In my time as Mayor of Oak Hill and a TN State Senator, I've been able to solve problems and bring people together by starting with one simple phrase: "What's broken and how can we fix it?"
Before I go point by point through my policy platform, I need to level with you. This race isn't going to be decided solely by who has the best ideas. Campaigns of any size—especially in "the most up-in-the-air race anyone can remember” need resources to communicate their message. That means money to buy TV ads, send mailers, and send canvassers to your door.
Peter, I'm not a millionaire. I can't write a blank check and self-fund this campaign. I'm relying on folks like you who make up our people-powered movement. Can you make a donation of any size today and help us communicate to Nashville voters what is broken and how we plan to fix it? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230613_em_fr_b1_HC_big.acq]
SPREAD HEIDI'S MESSAGE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230613_em_fr_b1_HC_big.acq]
Here's what this campaign is about.
What's Broken: Traffic is getting worse in Nashville, and it's too difficult to build new public transit.
How We Can Fix it : The state studied the problem and found that relocating Radnor Yards would free up space for more commuter rail. Even better, a recent estimate found this would cost SIX TIMES LESS than originally thought. We need to take action.
What's Broken: Our permitting process is painful. It helps no one and sets back affordable housing initiatives.
How We Can Fix it: Work with the planning, zoning, and permitting teams along with the Metro Housing Authority to streamline the process from end to end, invest in SCT, and get rid of the red tape that's preventing us from building homes people can actually afford.
What's Broken: Our landfills are about to be full. If we don't act, we'll have to drive hundreds of miles and waste money getting rid of our trash.
How We Can Fix it: Invest in innovative projects like our new Southern Services Construction Waste Sorter and plastic waste upcycling facilities to divert thousands of pounds of waste away from our almost-full landfills.
Peter, this is just the beginning of our solution-oriented platform. There's nobody else in this race who can execute this plan and make Nashville a quality place to live, not just visit. But I need your support in order to win this race. Can you make a donation of any size today and to help show voters our plan and win this race? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230613_em_fr_b1_HC_big.acq]
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230613_em_fr_b1_HC_big.acq]
It’s an honor to have you as part of our movement.
With gratitude,
Heidi
PS - want to read our whole policy book? Check it out at VoteHeidiCampbell.com/policy-book [http://voteheidicampbell.com/policy-book]
Heidi Campbell is a Nashville native, Mom, former music industry executive and the first female mayor of the city of Oak Hill.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230613_em_fr_b1_HC_big.acq [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230613_em_fr_b1_HC_big.acq]
As mayor, Heidi established a track record for fiscal discipline, balancing the budget every year of her Mayorship, eliminating my own salary, and returning $2M to my city’s reserves.
Heidi was elected in November of 2020 to represent District 20 in the Tennessee State Senate. Since then, she’s been an outspoken advocate for science, the LGBTQ community, public education, local control, women's and kids' issues, Medicaid expansion, and the environment.
Heidi sponsored or co-sponsored over 100 pieces of legislation in her first year in the senate, including legislation to allow cities to offer paid family leave, increase funding for school counselors and reading interventionists, and make it easier to cast a vote.
Heidi is focused on sustainable infrastructure, economic development and job creation, fully funding our public schools and supporting educators, expanding access to affordable healthcare, investing in suicide prevention, making certain that vulnerable children in state custody are not falling through the cracks, and ensuring that every Tennessean - regardless of ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age or ability - can achieve the American Dream.
Election Day is Thursday, August 3, 2023.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Campbell for Mayor
P.O. Box 330302
Nashville, Tennessee 37203
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230613_em_fr_b1_HC_big.acq]
Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
Chip Forrester, Treasurer
Paid for by Campbell for Mayor, Chip Forrester, Treasurer
Campbell for Mayor
PO Box 330302
Nashville, TN 37203
United States

Peter, our fight to transform politics means repowering the South to achieve fair representation at every level of public office. And this week, we’re celebrating a MAJOR victory!
**The Supreme Court just ruled AGAINST discriminatory redistricting maps in Alabama.** This is an incredible win for voting rights advocates and communities fighting to be heard and fairly counted in critical elections. Even better, this ruling could throw a wrench in the GOP’s ongoing voter suppression efforts across the South.
This is a huge opportunity for our movement to empower real community champions to step up, run for office, and flip states from red to blue! But we can’t wait until 2024 – we MUST seize the moment now.
**That’s why Emerge is already recruiting and training bold Democratic women to hit the campaign trail, inspire their communities, and fight back against the GOP’s attacks on our democracy itself.[Can we count on your support to keep this momentum and empower MORE Democratic women to run for office and win?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64782923/411225286/-1657939538?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1240-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY4MmNjMGE3LTI3MGEtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hPlmbNequHLe2UnKh1QKAskNsVbTw9imQX7RJlLaIG0=)**

We just graduated 27 fierce Democratic women from 11 states from our Emerge boot camp this past weekend – and this August, we’re building the ranks at our fall training focused on the south. The future of our country is at stake, and we need Democratic women ready to run, win, and be a real force for lasting change.
But here’s the problem: **We need to ramp up our recruitment and training programs to meet this critical moment, and we can’t do it without supporters like you with us.** We know you’re invested in turning our country around, and that means equipping rising leaders with the tools they need to succeed. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Sen. Jon Tester said recently, everywhere he looks he sees one of "the most vulnerable" or one of "the most likely to flip" when political pundits describe his seat. Democrats could lose the Senate in 2024 if a Republicans takes his place.
body:
Tester could lose
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T887f37c9-0a2e-45db-a205-f342d0385111/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Majority Leader Mitch McConnell.** _Imagine waking up Weds, November 6th, 2024, and reading that headline. **[You won't wanna do that right after eating. Or, EVER.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T31b5f418-8b84-40bd-aef5-b73799c6e1cc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**_** ** So, I'll keep this brief: **Senator Jon Tester reminded us in an email** , recently, everywhere he looks he sees one of **" the most vulnerable"** or one of **" the most likely to flip"** when political pundits describe his seat. _Tester represents a very red state. He's been able to hang on his past two re-elections because he's the real deal, from a multi-generational farming family in Montana and about as regular a guy as can be. _ From his recent email: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T96a65c93-154a-48fd-8a47-21858ba9c4d0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**This isn't just talk. It's who he is. But, that doesn't change what he's up against,** **that ****he's put his seat at risk for us,**** to vote for smart, progressive legislation Republicans will use to attack him.**_ **_Once more: Majority Leader McConnell._ **If we ever say that again it means our democracy is in danger and we've lost one of our best Senators, Jon Tester. [**_So can you join Blue Amp right now in sending Senator Tester $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta6e60fcd-d5ab-47e2-bbf8-a60776008595/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for helping us keep the Senate, keeping Jon Tester there and keeping Mitch McConnell as far away from leading it as possible._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. Friend,
---
Forget for a moment that President Biden opened up our border allowing a flood of illegal immigrants and deadly drugs into America.
---
Ignore that Biden declared a war on the US fossil fuel industry making us dependent on foreign sources, driving gasoline and energy prices through the roof, and hurting every American.
---
Overlook the fact that Biden’s massive deficit spending sparked forty-year high inflation making a dollar you held at the start of his administration worth only $.86 today.
---
Disregard the fact that the FBI and the Justice Department were caught red-handed abusing their powers to _manufacture evidence against Donald Trump_ , while _covering up actual crimes of the Clinton and Biden families_.
---
Do you want to know what _really_ has me worried?
---
Biden, the Democrats, and the radical left-wing radicals who have created this mess have a 50-50 chance to re-take control of our entire federal government less than two years from today.
---

[CONTRIBUTE TO STOP THE LEFT](https://links.wisconsinrepublicanparty.com/u/click?_t=d8e9586dc433414d81114a9282924d1e&_m=c5d7e14312984e70bc433c081907482b&_e=h163Nu6ciILT7eubn3JXNi4ZHabvKX8jOvSktnBAAfaeH1ea-nV5OnhpidnpPz4shtdQlroL5p1g7Sgbyg38icj5KH_k9hgFHgGZEBXFmVy0slqY_3jph8YfRiX4LUF0rmVLst345pERzPvvSG2YE0XwvQPbNuC9FRUksuOCk3Q4bh2v3TZvHTw7V9sKjmaAavUgZqrWG0CZqJSnzIQBx1zQ9nTSbvY3fF9caC4OFyeBRZFuJeP8qZefIjlLe3vJ1c9ZT5nu7-sWUuWY5zeh2otHzv_1lgqOrTcyHOT-QXTHGACYLDcbgGPKan7-w3uaO6hYawbhqizm5yhA9zNZtu7cCYpy7P3b857s_S1Tewk%3D)

It’s not only our desire to stop them.
It’s our duty to stop them.

On top of the work that Nikki’s doing in Congress, she’s also visited every part of our newly drawn district to meet with constituents firsthand about their concerns. After having conversations with communities across southern and central Illinois, she took that feedback back to Washington and doubled down on her efforts to make real change happen.

We’re already seeing the benefits of Nikki’s tireless efforts in Congress, and we need to keep her there to continue fighting for us. Can we count on you to help Nikki keep delivering results by becoming a monthly donor today?

At the end of this month, we’ll be facing the [**second end-of-quarter deadline of our re-election campaign**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64783422/411227169/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.13_b1_te_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODJlNjcyZC0yYTBhLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g8htuiSG6qK8V5Gkj4xq2cav0Kft-y3dAte882vH7o4=) – _and the stakes of producing a strong fundraising report couldn’t be higher._

[**We’ll explain more in a second, but first: Our June fundraising has gotten off to an incredibly slow start and we’re running out of time to get back on track. With a defining campaign moment nearly two weeks away, we have to ask: Can we count on you to chip in?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64783423/411227170/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.13_b1_te_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODJlNjcyZC0yYTBhLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g8htuiSG6qK8V5Gkj4xq2cav0Kft-y3dAte882vH7o4=)

Peter, when our internal fundraising numbers are published, _all eyes will be on us._

Everyone from Washington Republicans, to the media, to our opponents themselves will be scouring our fundraising numbers to search for signs of weakness and determine whether we have what it takes to win again.

**Put simply: The strength of our report will help determine the Republicans’ strategy for OH-13 , so it’s essential we show them how strong our campaign really is.**

But here’s the deal: We’re still **$6,000 short** of where we need to be at this point in the month to hit our end-of-quarter goal. And if we don’t get our June fundraising back on track before Thursday night, we’ll surely fall short on June 30th.

[**We only have about 48 hours to get back on track, so we have to ask: Will you rush $10 to help us close our fundraising gap? We can’t do this without you.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64783425/411227172/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.13_b1_te_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODJlNjcyZC0yYTBhLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g8htuiSG6qK8V5Gkj4xq2cav0Kft-y3dAte882vH7o4=)

I strongly believe the future of the climate movement is in great hands after seeing your unwavering support for climate champions firsthand. And with the Jane Fonda Climate PAC leading the climate movement to protect our planet, **_our future looks bright._**

Remember, every ounce of fossil fuels we burn contributes massively to the climate crisis, and it’s up to all of us to put an end to that pattern.

Thank you again for your support,

| | Hi D. P., Weekly Meetings (Friday) NOON \- 1:30PM - Goose Creek Library, located at [325 Old Moncks Corner Road](https://www.generationsforamerica.com/so/84OYmb0lQ/c?w=iPOtarfrDasJJJtrkLW8F6QtWiCaqsb0uv4BVuGqhnM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZ29vZ2xlLmNvbS9tYXBzL3NlYXJjaC8zMjUrT2xkK01vbmNrcytDb3JuZXIrUm9hZCwrR29vc2UrQ3JlZWs_ZW50cnk9Z21haWwmc291cmNlPWciLCJyIjoiNjJmMWIwNGEtNDVkZi00MzBkLTdhNGYtODE5ZDBjNDljMTgwIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMDM3MmIzMTktYzNhZi00ZTE1LWEyMTYtNDkwMWNhNWFkNTNkIn0). There has been an ongoing conversation among U.S. citizens in the last few years (decades really) about the perceived lack of unity and cohesiveness within American communities. Most of these conversations end with: “We need to come together”. It is time to bring action to those words. This email is to inform you that an organization modeled after provisions within U.S. Constitution is alive. You can be the initial citizens of Generations for America. It is time for residents to discuss what we, as citizens, can do to strengthen safety and unity of our communities. “We the People,” need to organize, participate, and share in the idea of our Constitutional Republic. We envision a structured and cohesive organization formed to lend support to the communities of Berkeley, Charleston County, Horry County and all of South Carolina. Citizens will be asked to both provide their ideas and to volunteer what time they can to support different community/civic programs, such as, assisting our law enforcement professionals (if requested), helping assistance programs, educating our fellow citizens etc. If you would like more information and would like to see South Carolina neighborhoods better prepared and more cohesive communities, please respond to the appropriate email below with your name, email, and zip code. We will be having an informational meeting soon to officially begin organizing. A head count is needed to prepare, so your expedient response is requested. You will be informed of the day, time, and location of the organizational meeting in a few weeks. Someone believes you will find merit with this email and forwarded it to you. Would you please do the same? The United States Constitution and our Bill of Rights will be the guide of this organization.
---
| |
---

* Penmanship Summer Camp, 19 - 23 June 2023, N Charleston Recreation Center, 1919 Bolton St., Charleston, SC 9AM to 4PM daily. Become a Sponsor.
* English First every Thursday night 7PM, Immaculate Conception Catholic Church, 510 St James Ave, Goose Creek, SC. Spanish class on Friday nights at 7PM.
* Parliamentarian Procedure/Robert's Rule of Order Training \- is giving leaders the skillsets they need to speak and voice their concerns at school board, city council, homeowners association and the state house legislative meetings. name: Congresswoman Shontel Brown
subject: Our priorities this month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Democrats need your help ending the GOP's culture war on LGBTQ+ rights.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64783620/411227974/746452426?refcode=EM_FR_230612Pulse_N_SB_90DO_5_G_TESTA_logo&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGVkNGE1My0yYjBhLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xSGK2pfc11hABPVfJTFWOrS5mCLB-ztNBzPTRBomdRQ=) Peter,

As we celebrate LGBTQ+ Pride Month, we hold those lost in the Pulse nightclub shooting close in our hearts and minds. Seven years after that tragic event, we remember those lost that night and so many more as we honor National Gun Violence Awareness Month.

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.
