clean_body: We thought the Steele Dossier was fake. Then we found out the Democrats knew the dossier was false but used it to spy on President Trump’s campaign in 2016. | | Fellow Conservative, We thought the government was pressuring Big Tech to censor stories about Hunter Biden’s foreign business dealings and his laptop days before the 2020 presidential election...then brave journalists exposed the Twitter Files. We thought that it was likely that COVID came from a lab. Then FBI Director Christopher Wray confirmed this spring that coronavirus likely stemmed from a lab leak in Wuhan. We thought the Steele Dossier was fake. Then we found out the Democrats knew the dossier was false but used it to spy on President Trump’s campaign in 2016. With every new bit of infomation we find that the truth is always worse than we thought. Whether it is the CDC or the DOJ, the FBI and social media companies taking down posts and limiting speech, federal agencies are targeting the American people who they are supposed to serve. And the Democrats? They always seem to turn a blind eye and move on. I am in Washington to fight for YOU. I don’t think the government should be targeting people on the Right OR the Left. But I must admit, this fight has put a HUGE target on my back , a target that will no doubt grow larger as the election approaches, . I’ll never stop standing on the frontlines in defense of our constitutionally enshrined liberties. That said, I need supporters like you ready to do battle along side me - because the Democrats will do whatever they can to boot me out of Washington. As a personal favor to me, Make no mistake, Fellow Conservative - our way of life is under attack from the Left, and I need my team of top supporters willing to stand by my side to help push back against the assaults on limited government and individual liberty.I need your help to fight back against those who want to transform our great Republic into a socialist utopia. name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: $25 vs. a blank check
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/88?t=1&akid=146%2E52803%2EnYLzXz)

| | Peter, the hard truth is that in Senate races like ours, whoever spends the most money usually — _but not always_ — wins. [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2158?t=12&amount=25&akid=146%2E52803%2EnYLzXz) **This won’t be the last time we see a headline like this, because unlike my opponent, I’m not a millionaire.** Instead, we’re building a grassroots campaign and asking supporters to chip in what they can, when they can. [**Will you help fuel our campaign by chipping in a grassroots donation of $25 (or whatever you can) to help counter campaign spending by my ultra-wealthy opponent? Any amount goes a long way when enough supporters step up.**](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2158?t=13&amount=25&akid=146%2E52803%2EnYLzXz) | | | [Chip in $25](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2158?t=14&amount=25&akid=146%2E52803%2EnYLzXz)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2158?t=15&amount=35&akid=146%2E52803%2EnYLzXz)
---
This is going to be a tough race, and there’s too much at stake to let money be the reason we come up short.
My opponent can write his campaign blank checks to flood the airwaves with TV commercials to spread his message far and wide.
Those are things we need to do to reach voters, too — _but the question on everyone’s mind is whether or not we can raise enough money through grassroots support to avoid getting drowned out._
**We have what it takes to win, but we need to make sure our Maryland-first message can break through to voters.[Can you please chip in $25 so we can cut through the noise and connect with the folks we need to win?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2158?t=16&amount=25&akid=146%2E52803%2EnYLzXz)**

clean_body: | | | | Or will you take action and defend our 25 Patriots? Peter, today is a National Day of Conservative Action to defend our House Patriots running in tough races in 2024, and we need you to take part. House Republicans are launching a special effort to help support the campaigns in the most competitive races across the country. PROTECT HOUSE PATRIOTS | The Democrats’ money machine and the mainstream media are attacking these Patriots daily. But these Patriots are still working for you with a target on their back every day, and now they need our help. Without these 25 important fighters, the Democrats could seize control of Congress. PROTECT HOUSE PATRIOTS | | | | | | So what do you say, Peter? PROTECT OUR HOUSE REPUBLICANS | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | House Republicans 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 == \-

name: DanKildee.com
subject: Social Security is under attack (again)→
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| **FIRST:** House Republicans created a manufactured crisis around the debt ceiling, bringing us nearly to the brink to try and extract extreme budget cuts.

**THEN:** Democrats stepped up and helped avoid a default because failing to pay America’s bills is not an option. We found a bipartisan compromise because defaulting would have increased costs for families, eliminated Michigan jobs and threatened the retirement security of millions of seniors.

**NOW:****House Speaker Kevin McCarthy and extreme House Republicans are escalating their threats to cut Social Security and Medicare!**

**_[We have to fight back. We’ve made a goal to get 7,500 signatures in the next 24 hours to prove the grassroots strength behind protecting Social Security for generations to come. Add your name now→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64785650/411235946/-700638059?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230613_FR_PT.1.1_0_6MO_campaign_NA_NA_socialsecurity&refcode2=e2d9180f-320a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmQ5MTgwZi0zMjBhLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=COZoG1V8JPo8lb47STQz88OFeGwKJiXYWQ5hiypT0vc=&emci=dcd9180f-320a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=e2d9180f-320a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)_**
**[Protect Social Security](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64785651/411235948/-700638059?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230613_FR_PT.1.1_0_6MO_campaign_NA_NA_socialsecurity&refcode2=e2d9180f-320a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmQ5MTgwZi0zMjBhLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=COZoG1V8JPo8lb47STQz88OFeGwKJiXYWQ5hiypT0vc=&emci=dcd9180f-320a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=e2d9180f-320a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)**
* * *

Hi there,

Kevin McCarthy just announced he plans to create a commission to “look at” Social Security and Medicare. He says he wants to “make people uncomfortable” while aiming for deep cuts to these critical programs. Republican Senator Rick Scott even introduced a plan to eliminate Social Security after five years.

_This proves yet again Republicans aren’t interested in responsible governing, they are interested in making deep cuts that will impact seniors and working families._

Millions of hardworking Michiganders rely on Social Security, the most successful social insurance program in our nation’s history. They work hard and pay into it all their lives and are entitled to use it to support themselves in old age.

It’s up to us: We must protect Social Security from privatization and cuts that would hurt so many families.

That’s why Dan recently introduced legislation to strengthen Social Security and increase benefits for so many Michigan families who have paid into this vital insurance program.

**_[Will you stand with Dan as he fights to protect Social Security? Make your voice heard and tell Congress to stop attacking this critical program.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64785652/411235950/-700638059?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230613_FR_PT.1.1_0_6MO_campaign_NA_NA_socialsecurity&refcode2=e2d9180f-320a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmQ5MTgwZi0zMjBhLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=COZoG1V8JPo8lb47STQz88OFeGwKJiXYWQ5hiypT0vc=&emci=dcd9180f-320a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=e2d9180f-320a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)_**
**[Sign On](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64785653/411235952/-700638059?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230613_FR_PT.1.1_0_6MO_campaign_NA_NA_socialsecurity&refcode2=e2d9180f-320a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmQ5MTgwZi0zMjBhLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=COZoG1V8JPo8lb47STQz88OFeGwKJiXYWQ5hiypT0vc=&emci=dcd9180f-320a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=e2d9180f-320a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)**
If you pay into Social Security, **then you and your family deserve to be able to rely on Social Security.** Democrats in the House are fighting to make sure this is true for every American.

**It is unacceptable that extreme Republicans are putting seniors and future generations at risk.**

As a member of the Social Security subcommittee, Dan will always fight to protect this critical insurance program that allows Americans to retire with dignity and the financial security they deserve.

**Stand with him and tell Congress to protect Social Security:**

clean_body: | FIRST: House Republicans created a manufactured crisis around the debt ceiling, bringing us nearly to the brink to try and extract extreme budget cuts. THEN: Democrats stepped up and helped avoid a default because failing to pay America’s bills is not an option. We found a bipartisan compromise because defaulting would have increased costs for families, eliminated Michigan jobs and threatened the retirement security of millions of seniors. NOW:House Speaker Kevin McCarthy and extreme House Republicans are escalating their threats to cut Social Security and Medicare! Hi there, Kevin McCarthy just announced he plans to create a commission to “look at” Social Security and Medicare. He says he wants to “make people uncomfortable” while aiming for deep cuts to these critical programs. Republican Senator Rick Scott even introduced a plan to eliminate Social Security after five years. This proves yet again Republicans aren’t interested in responsible governing, they are interested in making deep cuts that will impact seniors and working families. Millions of hardworking Michiganders rely on Social Security, the most successful social insurance program in our nation’s history. They work hard and pay into it all their lives and are entitled to use it to support themselves in old age. It’s up to us: We must protect Social Security from privatization and cuts that would hurt so many families. That’s why Dan recently introduced legislation to strengthen Social Security and increase benefits for so many Michigan families who have paid into this vital insurance program. If you pay into Social Security, then you and your family deserve to be able to rely on Social Security. Democrats in the House are fighting to make sure this is true for every American. It is unacceptable that extreme Republicans are putting seniors and future generations at risk. As a member of the Social Security subcommittee, Dan will always fight to protect this critical insurance program that allows Americans to retire with dignity and the financial security they deserve. Stand with him and tell Congress to protect Social Security: Thank you for standing with us, Team Kildee Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to take back the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! = | = | = Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee Friends of Dan Kildee P.O. Box 248 Flint, MI 48501 United States ** **

## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

clean_body: | | | | I was asked to share this with you. | The Official Super PAC Supporting Chris Christie for President Friend, Before I begin, did you see our latest TV AD? As the Executive Director of the Official Super PAC supporting Chris Christie for President, this is one of the most important things we can do to HELP GET CHRIS CHRISTIE ON THE DEBATE STAGE. We are setting a TV AD FUND goal of getting the AD on every TV channel in New Hampshire. While we focus on the TV AD FUND, can we count on your help and support, Friend, to get Chris Christie on the debate stage? | Remember he needs 40,000 donations to get on the debate stage | Thank you, Brian Executive Director Tell It Like It Is PAC | \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Exclusive Access via Tell It Like It Is PAC Subject: Our Latest ad To: dpwillis67@gmail.com The Official Super PAC Supporting Chris Christie for President We just released a brand new ad in support of Chris Christie – and we wanted you to be one of the first to see it, Friend. Please use this to access the TV AD. | Why Chris Christie: Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America. | [PAID FOR BY TELL IT LIKE IT IS PAC. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. TELLITLIKEITISPAC.COM]() Contributions to Chris Christie for President, Inc. are not tax deductible. Brian, Executive Director, Matt, Me (3) 3804 Wilson Blvd, Arlington, VA 22203 \- =

[Eva Longoria Brings Latino Life to the Screen](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=03f14860f9&e=5bd167f239) By: The New Yorker [Florida Politics: A State of Contrasts and Conflicts](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=ede231ff8b&e=5bd167f239) By: Orlando Politics [Why the Supreme Court Declined an Opportunity to Diminish the Voting Rights Act](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=0829bf93ef&e=5bd167f239) By: The New Yorker [Black and Latino voters are being erased from databases: Here’s how to fix it](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=24f43e9561&e=5bd167f239) By: The Hill [Latino legal rights group suing Texas applauds SCOTUS ruling in Alabama case](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=c3597589e9&e=5bd167f239) By: KSAT

name: CaucusRoom
subject: What Aren't They Tell Us About Taiwan?
body:
What you need to know today. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-alutdjy-trhiujldw-v/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alutdjy-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Tuesday!**
## **Check out these[ _poll results_](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alutdjy-trhiujldw-y/) from last week.**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alutdjy-trhiujldw-j/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alutdjy-trhiujldw-t/) **US Planning Taiwan Evacuation** The U.S. has **[intensified plans to evacuate Americans living in Taiwan](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alutdjy-trhiujldw-i/)** in recent months. **WOW. Even CNN is Saying it** Two CNN legal analysts said the **[Department of Justice should stop stalling with the investigation](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alutdjy-trhiujldw-d/)** into Hunter Biden's taxes. **Tucker Responds** [**Tucker Carlson 's legal team has responded to Fox News' cease-and-desist letter**](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alutdjy-trhiujldw-h/) after the former host started posting video commentary on current events on his Twitter account,

**Biden Fights Too Allow Porn Books in Schools** **[Joe Biden has sicced the U.S. Education Department on state and local school officials](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alutdjy-trhiujldw-k/)** who want to keep pornographic materials away from students. **Can They Do This?** It turns out the 14th Amendment can solve so many problems. **[You won't believe what the Democrats what to use it for now.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alutdjy-trhiujldw-u/)** **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alutdjy-trhiujldw-o/)!**
* Ain't that **[the truth](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alutdjy-trhiujldw-x/)**!
* That is a **[great idea](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alutdjy-trhiujldw-m/)**!
* How I **[sleep](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alutdjy-trhiujldw-c/).**

This is why we need to take back the House. The American public deserves better than leaders who refuse to even do the work they were elected to do. However, this return to normalcy may only be temporary, with these Republican rebels warning that they would tack control of the floor again if their demands are not met.
Throwing tantrums is not what the American people elected us to do – it is our duty to find common ground and keep moving forward for the people.

The most far-right part of the Republican delegation revolted against their own leadership and canceled votes last week and yesterday. This is why we need to take back the House. body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f389e49aa5d64f84865a939dbb77eb7f&_e=IPnfmj4Bdu-0Ymm1HNb3-YLhU-Lx0wNVyMLD5fnnXKMRKv0XFUAuYxUsNUB0TWRHy5NuYoG7bPLtGQIquuBnXGV63C0G-DCWjyxPo5F7-O15e9oKqZuK5h8SzHmS4KA_lxAbrSJdiIRdLM5_82LoUiPZPc3DzhcX0cgNlSffHEHzZZ5JbZE_YK6kMTWtDAutQWJAnDavPjTeqiyUPm3w8Y_DTGOQ-FwbAfBjAGckEh8BvKqm77pBPLB18rKT8t4282-XyT34FNR6OQYGr4fz-M6gIU3_3dzKeYRZPDPK9OqqFxrVqiZPM6LGNuTywiOupYSJjZrSHZ56YFTzIdYC3IFB4Zivb6FIZWa4FqxVqcnIM0ezLNZE5bk88kOYfgMThmbHw46HGhKgX4TG4vx5X9K1ZyjSORksRy_bP6Ti-5ivQyXxEQN62Uc-Znl_M4SS) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f389e49aa5d64f84865a939dbb77eb7f&_e=IPnfmj4Bdu-0Ymm1HNb3-YLhU-Lx0wNVyMLD5fnnXKMRKv0XFUAuYxUsNUB0TWRHy5NuYoG7bPLtGQIquuBnXGV63C0G-DCWjyxPo5F7-O15e9oKqZuK5h8SzHmS4KA_lxAbrSJdiIRdLM5_82LoUiPZPc3DzhcX0cgNlSffHEHzZZ5JbZE_YK6kMTWtDAutQWJAnDavPjTeqiyUPm3w8Y_DTGOQ-FwbAfBjAGckEh8BvKqm77pBPLB18rKT8t4282-XyT34FNR6OQYGr4fz-M6gIU3_3dzKeYRZPDPK9OoQg2sx_0DrQ9MWC-o6Dq0_rO6z8nb-H1d93l219t1x_aHM3e-_V0dwSxiDhy0Ovmyg7S9agrDyxnIq1l0jayu78PlAdwpcB6K3AN2PtM8NRv7_zr6wan6WPgjOTtdOSCnjfZnZup8jI_mVXGvXEt3l)" **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f389e49aa5d64f84865a939dbb77eb7f&_e=IPnfmj4Bdu-0Ymm1HNb3-YLhU-Lx0wNVyMLD5fnnXKMRKv0XFUAuYxUsNUB0TWRHy5NuYoG7bPLtGQIquuBnXGV63C0G-DCWjyxPo5F7-O15e9oKqZuK5h8SzHmS4KA_lxAbrSJdiIRdLM5_82LoUiPZPc3DzhcX0cgNlSffHEHzZZ5JbZE_YK6kMTWtDAutQWJAnDavPjTeqiyUPm3w8Y_DTGOQ-FwbAfBjAGckEh8BvKqm77pBPLB18rKT8t4282-XyT34FNR6OQYGr4fz-M6gIU3_3dzKeYRZPDPK9Orxg7L475XNV7oMTZ-1R4fe4NhkBAsTiHm12rEghZFUFglCL_XZi8kqErflPQawU1ieBWnXKapWMMkb32K3qmcYMGCvkRrLeD6SmGl0dkiol-JEXc8AlzFqoD9AhxS5kJwKULMPMj2sZ9_O7i4RC6pI)," **we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f389e49aa5d64f84865a939dbb77eb7f&_e=IPnfmj4Bdu-0Ymm1HNb3-YLhU-Lx0wNVyMLD5fnnXKMRKv0XFUAuYxUsNUB0TWRHy5NuYoG7bPLtGQIquuBnXGV63C0G-DCWjyxPo5F7-O15e9oKqZuK5h8SzHmS4KA_lxAbrSJdiIRdLM5_82LoUiPZPc3DzhcX0cgNlSffHEHzZZ5JbZE_YK6kMTWtDAutQWJAnDavPjTeqiyUPm3w8Y_DTGOQ-FwbAfBjAGckEh8BvKqm77pBPLB18rKT8t4282-XyT34FNR6OQYGr4fz-M6gIU3_3dzKeYRZPDPK9OqSIORjNJLeqi5wJMUP4qTd-n-ZrtiQMo9jUk1sk3UXfwesTf14yoMIy06WbCmqVj6mcW-OR_KtprJ_BC8xzeLIhvCg2IA3phhZR5N1TwT8Fps7vjp3QZeCz7QCRZ_-CnpAzwgtzAN2dvHkpHkg93vZ) We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f389e49aa5d64f84865a939dbb77eb7f&_e=IPnfmj4Bdu-0Ymm1HNb3-YLhU-Lx0wNVyMLD5fnnXKMRKv0XFUAuYxUsNUB0TWRHy5NuYoG7bPLtGQIquuBnXGV63C0G-DCWjyxPo5F7-O15e9oKqZuK5h8SzHmS4KA_lxAbrSJdiIRdLM5_82LoUiPZPc3DzhcX0cgNlSffHEHzZZ5JbZE_YK6kMTWtDAutQWJAnDavPjTeqiyUPm3w8Y_DTGOQ-FwbAfBjAGckEh8BvKqm77pBPLB18rKT8t4282-XyT34FNR6OQYGr4fz-M6gIU3_3dzKeYRZPDPK9OrbHVlwZBzCbzRQeayv8UDE6VTKb0YM5TRq_EwpHhE4Tdlh0c6WjQ5VQpKzHkUjZR6B6c23kYt28vqDcsDzJLHBKqf4e_VXWHNRU3cvIy8Oln6XQMpq_IQrA7iPuwGBrLQuoNJv2TElO7lid8jt3Q7g)"** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f389e49aa5d64f84865a939dbb77eb7f&_e=IPnfmj4Bdu-0Ymm1HNb3-YLhU-Lx0wNVyMLD5fnnXKMRKv0XFUAuYxUsNUB0TWRHy5NuYoG7bPLtGQIquuBnXGV63C0G-DCWjyxPo5F7-O15e9oKqZuK5h8SzHmS4KA_lxAbrSJdiIRdLM5_82LoUiPZPc3DzhcX0cgNlSffHEHzZZ5JbZE_YK6kMTWtDAutQWJAnDavPjTeqiyUPm3w8Y_DTGOQ-FwbAfBjAGckEh8BvKqm77pBPLB18rKT8t4282-XyT34FNR6OQYGr4fz-M6gIU3_3dzKeYRZPDPK9Oov2OWKN1_Rtd1IBNDDbn9b1Wa_g9Ti-EjDuBOcc44qpS8wJxJV4V2ID8OXaE3QsP6ztBMkIKpsjciWdETwXG0gfpnj-MulDkmBQae4JosZIRn48kWWYQjpaELZRH6NzSBkzJHZ9hSa_KIy-xiZc_b7) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

Friend,

name: Team Pramila
subject: Will you add your name in support of the We The People Amendment?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Pramila understands how vital preserving the integrity of our elections is to ensuring that our democracy accurately reflects our country.
#
**Peter, it’s time to get dark money out of our elections.**
Since the Supreme Court ruling in _Citizens United v. Federal Election Commission_ , we’ve seen the influence of political spending and dark money increase drastically in our elections.
**That’s why Pramila introduced the We The People Amendment to finally kneecap corporate political spending.** By stipulating that the First Amendment applies only to “natural persons” rather than corporations, this amendment would effectively reverse the U.S. Supreme Court’s final ruling in 2010.
**Peter, if we want to make sure our upcoming elections are free of dark money and accurately represent the voice of the people, we need to overturn _Citizens United_ and support the We The People Amendment. [Add your name today to build momentum and power for our fight to end the influence of dark money in our elections. ](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/support-the-we-the-people-amendment-petition/?source=em20230613-2596&t=1&akid=2596%2E420207%2EsA3Pjl)**
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/support-the-we-the-people-amendment-petition/?source=em20230613-2596&t=2&akid=2596%2E420207%2EsA3Pjl)**
**Corporations are not people, and money is not speech****, Peter.** And in every cycle since the disastrous _Citizens United_ decision, we’ve seen more and more special interests pour dark money into campaigns across the country. This has to stop.
Through television, radio, and digital ads, interest groups have been able to spend an unruly amount of money to influence our elections. An estimated $8.9 billion dollars was spent during the 2022 midterms making it the most expensive Congressional election cycle. And Super PACs have infiltrated our politics to disregard campaign finance laws and ethics.
We can no longer ignore the immense growth of corporate power and corrupt political influence from the endless sums of dark money in our elections. **And as a champion of the people, Pramila understands how vital preserving the integrity of our elections is to ensuring that our democracy accurately reflects our country.**
Pramila is committed to breaking down the pillars of injustice that have upheld our government for far too long. And the We The People Amendment is the systemic and tangible solution that matches the urgency of this moment.
[**Sign on to our petition today to support Pramila as she fights for us in Congress and finally end the predatory influence of dark money in our elections.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/support-the-we-the-people-amendment-petition/?source=em20230613-2596&t=3&akid=2596%2E420207%2EsA3Pjl)
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/support-the-we-the-people-amendment-petition/?source=em20230613-2596&t=4&akid=2596%2E420207%2EsA3Pjl)**
In solidarity,
Team Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230613-2596-footer&t=5&refcode2=2596_420207_sA3Pjl&akid=2596%2E420207%2EsA3Pjl)**

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

clean_body: Pramila understands how vital preserving the integrity of our elections is to ensuring that our democracy accurately reflects our country. Peter, it’s time to get dark money out of our elections. Since the Supreme Court ruling in Citizens United v. Federal Election Commission , we’ve seen the influence of political spending and dark money increase drastically in our elections. That’s why Pramila introduced the We The People Amendment to finally kneecap corporate political spending. By stipulating that the First Amendment applies only to “natural persons” rather than corporations, this amendment would effectively reverse the U.S. Supreme Court’s final ruling in 2010. Peter, if we want to make sure our upcoming elections are free of dark money and accurately represent the voice of the people, we need to overturn Citizens United and support the We The People Amendment. Corporations are not people, and money is not speech, Peter. And in every cycle since the disastrous Citizens United decision, we’ve seen more and more special interests pour dark money into campaigns across the country. This has to stop. Through television, radio, and digital ads, interest groups have been able to spend an unruly amount of money to influence our elections. An estimated $8.9 billion dollars was spent during the 2022 midterms making it the most expensive Congressional election cycle. And Super PACs have infiltrated our politics to disregard campaign finance laws and ethics. We can no longer ignore the immense growth of corporate power and corrupt political influence from the endless sums of dark money in our elections. And as a champion of the people, Pramila understands how vital preserving the integrity of our elections is to ensuring that our democracy accurately reflects our country. Pramila is committed to breaking down the pillars of injustice that have upheld our government for far too long. And the We The People Amendment is the systemic and tangible solution that matches the urgency of this moment. In solidarity, Team Pramila | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Trump's busy day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
No handcuffs, just candlelit dinners.
#
Today, Donald Trump was arraigned on 37 felony charges in federal court in Miami — the first time a US president has ever faced criminal charges.
And what is he doing tonight? Hosting his first 2024 campaign fundraiser: a candlelit dinner at one of his golf clubs in New Jersey, where **his campaign expects to raise $2 million.**
Trump did the same thing in March after being indicted for sexual abuse. His base donated over $4 million in less than 24 hours.
[We need to be ready to fight back. Will you chip in $3 today to help power our grassroots campaign for progress against the bigotry of the MAGA movement? ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230613.pNZn5I&refcode=em20230613-4470-P_FND_RES_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4470%2E2526796%2EWdsyD-)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230613.pNZn5I&refcode=em20230613-4470-P_FND_RES_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4470%2E2526796%2EWdsyD-)**
Trump faces 37 federal charges.1 The main issue is that the former President refused to hand over classified documents relating to U.S. nuclear programs and other weapons capabilities after he left office.
The indictment alleges that **Trump showed these classified documents to others on at least 2 different occasions — at the golf club where he’s hosting tonight’s fundraiser.**
In another charge, Trump allegedly hid the documents from his own lawyer.2
**The twice-indicted former president has promised to stay in the race even if he’s convicted.**
[Trump is gearing up for a fight. Will you make a contribution of $3 today to power our movement against Trump's extremism?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230613.pNZn5I&refcode=em20230613-4470-P_FND_RES_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4470%2E2526796%2EWdsyD-)
From all of us here on the campaign, we thank you for your support.
Team AOC

1 - [**NPR:** These are the charges Trump was indicted on and what they mean](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/19166?t=22&akid=4470%2E2526796%2EWdsyD-)
2 - [**CBS:** 10 key takeaways from the Trump indictment: What the federal charges allegedly reveal](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/19167?t=23&akid=4470%2E2526796%2EWdsyD-)

subject: the real impacts of climate change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
This is a stark reminder that climate change is real and we’re seeing the effects of it on a daily basis.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64786397/411238880/428766023?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230613-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTI3ZWM3ZS0zNTBhLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TbhEIssf-awmouzyNOqSpNNdNAa-Sa7AVlUoyjl1MCc=)

| Peter,

**Last week, the Lehigh Valley had the worst air quality in the country. **Many areas were under a “Hazardous” rating on the Air Quality Index _for over 24 hours._

Across the Northeast and Mid-Atlantic regions, hundreds of people were suffering from the effects of the Canadian wildfires that brought in dangerous levels of smoke and debris.

**This is a stark reminder that climate change is real and we’re seeing the effects of it on a daily basis. If we don’t act soon, we’ll cause irreversible damage for generations to come.**

But Republicans refuse to take action. _They’ll do anything to protect their wealthy corporate donors._

**I know how important it is to protect our children and grandchildren from the harmful effects of our changing climate.[_That’s why I need your help to continue this important work in Congress. name: Tom Malinowski
subject: I need your help fighting book bans and censorship in NJ
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Districts for Democracy
body:
| | Friend,

As you know, Districts for Democracy is fighting against extremism across New Jersey's school boards and libraries. My friend Senator Andrew Zwicker (D-NJ-LD16), is at the forefront of this fight in his top-targeted re-election campaign for New Jersey State Senate.

Recently, he was on CNN This Morning discussing his new legislation to combat Republican book bans across his district, the state, and across the country. He's running against Republican Mike Pappas who, if elected this fall, will fall in lock step with the extremist views of Republican elected officials across this country.

_These extremist efforts to ban books aren’t just happening in states like Florida and Texas._ We’re seeing them led by well-organized groups everywhere, including New Jersey. That’s why Senator Zwicker's bill to prevent censorship of any book in a public library is so impactful. The right to read is sacred, and Senator Zwicker refuses to let extremism and partisan politics infringe on our basic rights as parents.
[Andrew spoke about the impact of his bill on CNN This Morning. In case you missed it, click here to watch this important conversation. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64786646/411239777/-718702714?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230613_FR_Zwicker_0_3MO_TomMalinowski_Zwicker_NA_Campaign&refcode2=c6e9d555-360a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmU5ZDU1NS0zNjBhLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BE7VjcMp_6vdRJOP3l8te8BihvUI_7tVA8LOgi6N1zc=&emci=22e29a4f-360a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c6e9d555-360a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294)

name: Exclusive Letter for Top Democrats (VPP)
subject: SIGN: Thank Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
She’s a HERO!
| **BREAKING: Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson’s Passionate Defense Sways Conservative Justices to Protect Voting Rights Act** Folks, thanks to Supreme Court Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson, the Supreme Court shot down Alabama’s attempt to heavily gerrymander the state and silence Black voters.

[**We’re hand-delivering an urgent thank you card to her office at 9 AM tomorrow – so we only have 108 more signature spots available! SIGN NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47465?t=6&akid=8432%2E878179%2E_DvQA5) [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47465?t=7&akid=8432%2E878179%2E_DvQA5) | [DONATE $3 TO SIGN THE CARD! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47465?t=8&akid=8432%2E878179%2E_DvQA5)
---
TO: Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: You're a hero! **_Dear Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson — THANK YOU._**

Your impassioned defense of voting rights convinced even the most conservative Justices to uphold the Voting Rights Act and stand up to Alabama’s blatant discrimination.

I know going up against Donald Trump’s far-right majority on the Court isn’t easy, so I applaud your outstanding resilience to defend our democracy.

**I couldn’t be happier that President Biden nominated you!**

[**So I’m signing this card to thank you for all your courage and hard work over the last year, and will chip in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to elect incredible Democrats who will save our right to vote from corrupt Republican gerrymandering! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47465?t=9&akid=8432%2E878179%2E_DvQA5) [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47465?t=10&akid=8432%2E878179%2E_DvQA5) | [DONATE $3 TO SIGN NOW! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47465?t=11&akid=8432%2E878179%2E_DvQA5)
---
**_X A proud Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=8432%2E878179%2E_DvQA5). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=8432%2E878179%2E_DvQA5).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=8432%2E878179%2E_DvQA5) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=8432%2E878179%2E_DvQA5). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=8432%2E878179%2E_DvQA5)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=8432%2E878179%2E_DvQA5)

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I’ll be honest with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The Ohio I live in now looks a lot different than the one I grew up in.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64786791/411240577/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGNmZGJiZC0zNzBhLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NmUsHOUqUkOyA8yOEiG26hHxtEqHWxhSwzYJ_tKClUE=) | Hi team – before I ask you to chip in to help me win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue, I need to take a moment to explain why I'm in this fight and what your grassroots contribution would mean today.

I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. I spent summers working on my family's farm. Today, I live in Cleveland with my wife, Connie, and our two rescue dogs, Franklin and Walter.

**I’ll be honest with you, team:** The Ohio I live in now looks a lot different than the one I grew up in. Over the years, we've seen manufacturing jobs shipped overseas because of bad trade deals, prices skyrocketing as wages failed to keep up, and hopes for a comfortable retirement dashed. That's why I've devoted my life to fighting for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do.

**Every day in the Senate, I’m fighting for you. But I’m facing my toughest race yet, and I need your help to win.[Will you chip in $5 or more now – split between my campaign and the Ohio Democratic Party – so I can keep up the fight in Ohio and defend the Senate for Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64786792/411240578/1718788746?refcode=em23_230613_surrog_fndt_gq_act___SB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230613_surrog_fndt_gq_act___SB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=d0cfdbbd-370a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&noskip=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGNmZGJiZC0zNzBhLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NmUsHOUqUkOyA8yOEiG26hHxtEqHWxhSwzYJ_tKClUE=)**

Right now, Mitch McConnell and the GOP need to flip only two seats to retake Senate control – and experts at _Politico_ say it could all come down to Ohio. Last year’s Senate race here was one of the most costly in the nation, and _NBC News_ reports this one could be “even nastier and more expensive.”

**That's why I simply cannot win this race – and Democrats simply cannot hold on to our narrow Senate majority – without grassroots support from folks like you. As one of the most vulnerable senators in the country, I'm personally asking:**

**[Will you please split $5 between my campaign and the Ohio Dems to help us hit our midnight fundraising goal, power our reelection campaign to victory, and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64786793/411240579/1718788746?refcode=em23_230613_surrog_fndt_gq_act___SB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230613_surrog_fndt_gq_act___SB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=d0cfdbbd-370a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&noskip=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGNmZGJiZC0zNzBhLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NmUsHOUqUkOyA8yOEiG26hHxtEqHWxhSwzYJ_tKClUE=)**

This is gonna be a heck of a fight, but with you by my side, I know we can beat the odds and continue making much-needed progress for workers and families. Thanks for being on our team.

clean_body: The Ohio I live in now looks a lot different than the one I grew up in. = | Hi team – before I ask you to chip in to help me win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue, I need to take a moment to explain why I'm in this fight and what your grassroots contribution would mean today. I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. I spent summers working on my family's farm. Today, I live in Cleveland with my wife, Connie, and our two rescue dogs, Franklin and Walter. I’ll be honest with you, team: The Ohio I live in now looks a lot different than the one I grew up in. Over the years, we've seen manufacturing jobs shipped overseas because of bad trade deals, prices skyrocketing as wages failed to keep up, and hopes for a comfortable retirement dashed. That's why I've devoted my life to fighting for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Every day in the Senate, I’m fighting for you. But I’m facing my toughest race yet, and I need your help to win.= Right now, Mitch McConnell and the GOP need to flip only two seats to retake Senate control – and experts at Politico say it could all come down to Ohio. Last year’s Senate race here was one of the most costly in the nation, and NBC News reports this one could be “even nastier and more expensive.” That's why I simply cannot win this race – and Democrats simply cannot hold on to our narrow Senate majority – without grassroots support from folks like you. As one of the most vulnerable senators in the country, I'm personally asking: = This is gonna be a heck of a fight, but with you by my side, I know we can beat the odds and continue making much-needed progress for workers and families. Thanks for being on our team. With gratitude, Sherrod The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. Will you pitch in $10 or more right away? Every dollar you give helps build a blue Ohio. | = = | 697 East Broad Street Suite 101 Columbus, Ohio 43215 | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Click here to from the Ohio Democratic Party's email list.

The NDRC has been working for years to combat GOP tactics like gerrymandering and voter suppression. _And we’ve had great success._

**Now, Speaker Pelosi’s call to action comes at a critical time for our work.** Ahead of the midterm elections, our grassroots movement has helped secure the fairest congressional maps in a generation. But now, Republicans are _already_ scrambling to draw new, manipulated districts and restrict voting rights before next November – and that means our fight is far from over.
[**_Please: Will you take a few moments to watch Speaker Pelosi’s full message about the importance of joining our fight to strengthen our democracy?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64786807/411240624/378494269?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230613_FR_6K_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQzY2ZkYmJkLTM3MGEtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LPfWGsOYlTx3rEtOnf0aoK1WsyqsP1dpf8efRUw5Tck=)

Yes,_clean energy_.** What do trans kids have to do with a committee hearing on energy? _Nothing_. But whether it’s on the Oversight Committee, Budget Committee, or any other subcommittee, Republicans continue to _obsess_ over trans children in every single conversation – using them as a political boogeyman to mobilize far-right extremists behind their hateful agenda. _**This Pride Month, me and Eric Swalwell are going toe-to-toe with MAGA extremists hellbent on eradicating queer youth and the LGBTQ+ community.**_ **In the face of increasingly personal and violent attacks, we will not back down – but we need your support.[_Please watch my latest exchange on the House Oversight Committee, and then pitch in a split donation to support me and Eric Swalwell as we fight to defend trans kids in Congress._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64786866/411240749/916816838?refcode=E21714-20230613-BalintSplit-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjliODYwMi0zODBhLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N23uPivuTiatTqL8yJH0SDwdkWSMcuaOiPxTULdHFVA=)** | [WATCH + DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64786867/411240750/916816838?refcode=E21714-20230613-BalintSplit-SB-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjliODYwMi0zODBhLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N23uPivuTiatTqL8yJH0SDwdkWSMcuaOiPxTULdHFVA=)

clean_body: | | | We need Democratic pro-choice women in every level of elected office → Peter, After anti-choice Republican efforts to pass bans in both Carolinas last month, Virginia has become the last southern state with access to abortion beyond 12 weeks — and in seven days, that could all change. The outcome of next Tuesday's primary will determine reproductive access for millions of Americans, which is why EMILYs List has endorsed 22 Democratic pro-choice women who can make the difference. Democrats in Virginia are fighting hard to keep anti-choice legislators out of power. If we flip just three seats in the House of Delegates, we take back the chamber and can stop Gov. Youngkin's anti-choice agenda in its tracks. In the state Senate, Democrats are defending a two-seat majority — but that majority includes anti-choice Democrat Joe Morrissey. We can REPLACE Morrissey with Democratic pro-choice champion Lashrecse Aird on the 20th, if we act now. Control of the Virginia state legislature is key to protecting abortion access for millions of people across the South, so this is an all-hands-on-deck moment. **This fight is bigger than just Virginia, Peter, and we're just one week away from Election Day. Donate now to help pro-choice women WIN: Thank you, the EMILYs List Campaigns team ****** | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. subject: A pardon for President Trump

body:
I am doing something no other candidate is doing. My pledge to restore law and order and end political retribution from this administration.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=b8acd9efa29f4f649a2622a799186428&_t=UA1DJr_ljY6jg-JnPaV7HQGA6XDP0G2xXuRDWrOm5hk3eOnRGsO-S7XWfHT4GsxuJhmW8kzai2DxP6CMFGRnD-HeCDxbUJCUpe5_dPmxu_8%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=b8acd9efa29f4f649a2622a799186428&_t=UA1DJr_ljY6jg-JnPaV7HQGA6XDP0G2xXuRDWrOm5hk3eOnRGsO-S7XWfHT4GsxuJhmW8kzai2DxP6CMFGRnD-HeCDxbUJCUpe5_dPmxu_8%3D)

|
Fellow American,

Joe Biden. Merrick Garland. Jack Smith. The Department of Justice. The prosecutorial witch hunt that this administration will go through to eliminate their political opponents is egregious and dangerous for our country.

**Let me be clear, I don't care whether you root for Trump or whether you don't. This is less about partisan politics and more about preserving our Constitutional republic.**

Under the current law and Presidential Records Act, the president has the sole ability to declassify records and retain them. Period. It was the law in 2012 for Bill Clinton hiding cassette tapes in his sock drawer and it is true for President Trump today.

Fellow American, today I am calling on all Republican and Democrat presidential candidates to stand against the political witch hunt that is the Biden DOJ. I am asking every declared presidential candidate to pledge to pardon President Donald Trump on day one.

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=b8acd9efa29f4f649a2622a799186428&_e=rEByj9v1V_qJQIEgJK1DiGJCyJ4icglnIr1qnV03R6LC8ApZIxAYBmxV_LALiQrV_y5i7i3rpkcCHNS46KrK_ynY8Otiz8G1yG4oPGnud6wpTdlisjQl48HEqXGf73_SpJRKR4b_cLi6cQOwMVxzNtmvxKsVVL1uSbChnGBTaoMjh5_n2z34gHDXyPzmKDVExvwL82HZi50ZUQ8dKUiF1c_Sn7R2FhQntsryG1XCrJfT83Lrce_doM6PFG8RVUQWIcdf8_kf3kTuTLDUtm6hEjT5yM8NbhlKn_EqDxdrRa6KvSp-PZx_QAo5jA3g14Vr8PqzuPhpsUE635ORnckr-crpqP2OBeUMHUfnZs_hiy88gMai-AErGFIpeIwN4Y3BffCT8i2hiTSmXQKJ7BpgeBgT9ZgimbKEFdH05dJAXi0xp49o9o32xBW8e5ISL3RATSGbuwqpyOmr8jE4qJq9WxtdW5vqxXhREl8F4BAS7SAmKblx1dA_sagXM3yb1-X4rBBDbg7vcsj3WyobNU83PoPUUpxJcM8QmneeiBvUkpo%3D)
| [** ADD YOUR NAME IF YOU WOULD PARDON DONALD TRUMP **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=b8acd9efa29f4f649a2622a799186428&_e=rEByj9v1V_qJQIEgJK1DiGJCyJ4icglnIr1qnV03R6LC8ApZIxAYBmxV_LALiQrV_y5i7i3rpkcCHNS46KrK_ynY8Otiz8G1yG4oPGnud6wpTdlisjQl48HEqXGf73_SpJRKR4b_cLi6cQOwMVxzNtmvxKsVVL1uSbChnGBTaoMjh5_n2z34gHDXyPzmKDVExvwL82HZi50ZUQ8dKUiF1c_Sn7R2FhQntsryG1XCrJfT83Lrce_doM6PFG8RVUQWIcdf8_kf3kTuTLDUtm6hEjT5yM8NbhlKn_EqDxdrRa6KvSp-PZx_QAo5jA3g14Vr8PqzuPhpsUE635ORnckr-crpqP2OBeUMHUfnZs_hiy88gMai-AErGFIpeIwN4Y3BffCT8i2hiTSmXQKJ7BpgeDWbsYpq8wS33OzIa6tXd-PNwGM_cOk1oxx42Mx2GuevNqAt_rLur3kcYPGzzy0wO4oAMI07ASfFGPRf7HNd_La0LVWFgmR28k37SvoaP_l4kxpj4PBAKvRbcy9cyCcXPjp_kGfU54nSa4pSEfqu8Zw%3D)
---

This Trump indictment is a national disaster. It is un-American for the ruling party to use police power to arrest its political rivals. That is why today, I am going a step beyond my fellow Republican candidates - **[I commit to pardon Trump promptly on January 20, 2025 and to restore the rule of law in our country.](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=b8acd9efa29f4f649a2622a799186428&_e=rEByj9v1V_qJQIEgJK1DiGJCyJ4icglnIr1qnV03R6LC8ApZIxAYBmxV_LALiQrV_y5i7i3rpkcCHNS46KrK_ynY8Otiz8G1yG4oPGnud6wpTdlisjQl48HEqXGf73_SpJRKR4b_cLi6cQOwMVxzNtmvxKsVVL1uSbChnGBTaoMjh5_n2z34gHDXyPzmKDVExvwL82HZi50ZUQ8dKUiF1c_Sn7R2FhQntsryG1XCrJfT83Lrce_doM6PFG8RVUQWIcdf8_kf3kTuTLDUtm6hEjT5yM8NbhlKn_EqDxdrRa6KvSp-PZx_QAo5jA3g14Vr8PqzuPhpsUE635ORnckr-crpqP2OBeUMHUfnZs_hiy88gMai-AErGFIpeIwN4Y3BffCT8i2hiTSmXQKJ7BpgeGQxHwfQs7EVu66YMNk0TbhWVmKASHe9S-NMxjIvPXyYL8u40hxVJA-2DSQGK6oYHkXIWRidzcsWc68-JNe_sHBgQEVB3CFXL8ZHFEbNnQsdod8vHj8MgAiK6lWKnaPyB0w5gkTZZs7lzGGDL84mG30%3D)**

_**_I hope my Republican and Democrat counterparts will do the same._**_

[** PLEDGE TO RESTORE DEMOCRACY **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=b8acd9efa29f4f649a2622a799186428&_e=rEByj9v1V_qJQIEgJK1DiGJCyJ4icglnIr1qnV03R6LC8ApZIxAYBmxV_LALiQrV_y5i7i3rpkcCHNS46KrK_ynY8Otiz8G1yG4oPGnud6wpTdlisjQl48HEqXGf73_SpJRKR4b_cLi6cQOwMVxzNtmvxKsVVL1uSbChnGBTaoMjh5_n2z34gHDXyPzmKDVExvwL82HZi50ZUQ8dKUiF1c_Sn7R2FhQntsryG1XCrJfT83Lrce_doM6PFG8RVUQWIcdf8_kf3kTuTLDUtm6hEjT5yM8NbhlKn_EqDxdrRa6KvSp-PZx_QAo5jA3g14Vr8PqzuPhpsUE635ORnckr-crpqP2OBeUMHUfnZs_hiy88gMai-AErGFIpeIwN4Y3BffCT8i2hiTSmXQKJ7BpgeEZZvgRuul7eHO3asNNOAvOgaHXwnmyy6J7Y9kLxsTGiy5dGLWKyC3cRX_u9Yqtu86Bx5kRf3Kqnj7C7Ge_0MDtQFKpOqLw9rlc6cKYAyssWmrIasQpRzZB_vfwCt5dmognQ4Bchn7KG26J_oAnMvqg%3D)
---

We need leaders for this country, not idle silence.

We need **_TRUTH_** for this country, not a dishonest media.

We need to stand by the rule of law, not turn into a banana republic where the party in power uses police force to arrest its political opponents.

It is time to put aside partisan politics in service of preserving our Constitutional republic, **[and I hope you'll join me today and add your name to the pledge.](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=b8acd9efa29f4f649a2622a799186428&_e=rEByj9v1V_qJQIEgJK1DiGJCyJ4icglnIr1qnV03R6LC8ApZIxAYBmxV_LALiQrV_y5i7i3rpkcCHNS46KrK_ynY8Otiz8G1yG4oPGnud6wpTdlisjQl48HEqXGf73_SpJRKR4b_cLi6cQOwMVxzNtmvxKsVVL1uSbChnGBTaoMjh5_n2z34gHDXyPzmKDVExvwL82HZi50ZUQ8dKUiF1c_Sn7R2FhQntsryG1XCrJfT83Lrce_doM6PFG8RVUQWIcdf8_kf3kTuTLDUtm6hEjT5yM8NbhlKn_EqDxdrRa6KvSp-PZx_QAo5jA3g14Vr8PqzuPhpsUE635ORnckr-crpqP2OBeUMHUfnZs_hiy88gMai-AErGFIpeIwN4Y3BffCT8i2hiTSmXQKJ7BpgeDTceRz5r9K8OuT0bRnJbL_FvI9RZicaPwPoqoGTfsNdSqwDiEduTdURZaoQxpvvhnQyCKVVCZeaiTILxsv9MG1blZKDOnVvhaHh_gxR0jnfiwXYAvwpRTCGqZjdwT-qiMMlOsSMCMX8HwYLgeEa3cI%3D)**

Thanks for standing on the side of principle over politics,

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=b8acd9efa29f4f649a2622a799186428&_e=rEByj9v1V_qJQIEgJK1DiGJCyJ4icglnIr1qnV03R6LC8ApZIxAYBmxV_LALiQrV_y5i7i3rpkcCHNS46KrK_ynY8Otiz8G1yG4oPGnud6wpTdlisjQl48HEqXGf73_SpJRKR4b_cLi6cQOwMVxzNtmvxKsVVL1uSbChnGBTaoMjh5_n2z34gHDXyPzmKDVExvwL82HZi50ZUQ8dKUiF1c_Sn7R2FhQntsryG1XCrJfT83Lrce_doM6PFG8RVUQWIcdf8_kf3kTuTLDUtm6hEjT5yM8NbhlKn_EqDxdrRa6KvSp-PZx_QAo5jA3g14Vr8PqzuPhpsUE635ORnckr-crpqP2OBeUMHUfnZs_hiy88gMai-AErGFIpeIwN4Y3BffCT8i2hiTSmXQKJ7BpgeJRmbL7dDV--NIZsp6xho_f3ufJh6dgY6R1egbzmWK-kqcyo9XN97zjv_IGhotZIMQ1ktBxN5KXwFSxz-dfs8-aEle_ZQyCjdBMmj1sLxeUTPwtYK_BEpLsT629EwuJ41Ujn1ukV4WZYKQJ_urGKNPI%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. I am calling on Ron DeSantis, Nikki Haley, Tim Scott, Mike Pence, and any other declared candidate (Republican OR Democrat) to join me in signing this pledge. I don't know if we can count on them to stand for principle over politics, **[but I hope YOU will stand with me today.](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=b8acd9efa29f4f649a2622a799186428&_e=rEByj9v1V_qJQIEgJK1DiGJCyJ4icglnIr1qnV03R6LC8ApZIxAYBmxV_LALiQrV_y5i7i3rpkcCHNS46KrK_ynY8Otiz8G1yG4oPGnud6wpTdlisjQl48HEqXGf73_SpJRKR4b_cLi6cQOwMVxzNtmvxKsVVL1uSbChnGBTaoMjh5_n2z34gHDXyPzmKDVExvwL82HZi50ZUQ8dKUiF1c_Sn7R2FhQntsryG1XCrJfT83Lrce_doM6PFG8RVUQWIcdf8_kf3kTuTLDUtm6hEjT5yM8NbhlKn_EqDxdrRa6KvSp-PZx_QAo5jA3g14Vr8PqzuPhpsUE635ORnckr-crpqP2OBeUMHUfnZs_hiy88gMai-AErGFIpeIwN4Y3BffCT8i2hiTSmXQKJ7BpgeIUSR-oLlLxMYqE0DhEjzbI2jeShfXkT5r_KCG_Gt7LR9tK_VedYLgvx2KZ31wmQb_bQxUdZe_02LHILBAXPhGi2nIFcw6WZCzj3QqAVbLX7Tov8b8QPMN5Tn7tJqkzpd3RI5BoCVMxc2aYAXaqo6Ow%3D)**

---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: I am doing something no other candidate is doing. My pledge to restore law and order and end political retribution from this administration. | | Fellow American, Joe Biden. Merrick Garland. Jack Smith. The Department of Justice. The prosecutorial witch hunt that this administration will go through to eliminate their political opponents is egregious and dangerous for our country. Let me be clear, I don't care whether you root for Trump or whether you don't. This is less about partisan politics and more about preserving our Constitutional republic. Under the current law and Presidential Records Act, the president has the sole ability to declassify records and retain them. Period. It was the law in 2012 for Bill Clinton hiding cassette tapes in his sock drawer and it is true for President Trump today. Fellow American, today I am calling on all Republican and Democrat presidential candidates to stand against the political witch hunt that is the Biden DOJ. I am asking every declared presidential candidate to pledge to pardon President Donald Trump on day one. | This Trump indictment is a national disaster. It is un-American for the ruling party to use police power to arrest its political rivals. That is why today, I am going a step beyond my fellow Republican candidates - I hope my Republican and Democrat counterparts will do the same. We need leaders for this country, not idle silence. We need TRUTH for this country, not a dishonest media. We need to stand by the rule of law, not turn into a banana republic where the party in power uses police force to arrest its political opponents. It is time to put aside partisan politics in service of preserving our Constitutional republic, Thanks for standing on the side of principle over politics, Vivek Ramaswamy P.S. I am calling on Ron DeSantis, Nikki Haley, Tim Scott, Mike Pence, and any other declared candidate (Republican OR Democrat) to join me in signing this pledge. I don't know if we can count on them to stand for principle over politics, GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

name: Jill Biden
subject: Your chance to meet Joe and me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I’m so excited about our campaign’s new contest, where Joe and I will get the chance to meet one supporter (and a guest!) in Washington, D.C. | | |
---
Peter, It’s been a little over a month since Joe and Kamala announced their reelection campaign, and I’ve spent a lot of time over these past few weeks reflecting on how this all started in the first place -- remembering all the people who came up to me in grocery stores and cafes and airports, saying: "Tell Joe he has to run." From the very beginning, that's what this campaign has been about. It's been about _you_ , about your hopes for our country, about your belief in our ability to move forward together and build a better future for all Americans. So I can tell you for a fact, Peter, that the conversations Joe has with supporters like you truly power his work. [That’s why I’m so excited about our campaign’s new contest, where Joe and I will get the chance to meet one supporter (and a guest!) in Washington D.C. clean_body: I’m so excited about our campaign’s new contest, where Joe and I will get the chance to meet one supporter (and a guest!) in Washington, D.C. | | | Peter, It’s been a little over a month since Joe and Kamala announced their reelection campaign, and I’ve spent a lot of time over these past few weeks reflecting on how this all started in the first place -- remembering all the people who came up to me in grocery stores and cafes and airports, saying: "Tell Joe he has to run." From the very beginning, that's what this campaign has been about. It's been about you , about your hopes for our country, about your belief in our ability to move forward together and build a better future for all Americans. So I can tell you for a fact, Peter, that the conversations Joe has with supporters like you truly power his work. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | I know Joe is so incredibly grateful to be able to count you as part of this grassroots team. Hopefully, we’ll get the opportunity to tell you that in person! Thank you for everything, Jill Jill Biden

Fellow conservative,

I’m the conservative running against Adam Schiff in California for US Senate.

Since 2016, the Democrats have been weaponizing the federal government to go after their political opponent, President Donald Trump.

Adam Schiff led the charge in what has now been revealed as a bogus and corrupt witch hunt, and now Biden is carrying on the effort with his Justice Department.

[** Defeat Adam Schiff » **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1b6027b629174c99913f78b7093fd1d5&_e=NAXTuffx_zHSZ8QCgILcOMI-6NFtjhd3WbTWdx3eewbFPsG54Oc2aVG_9nGJsMCtFtHy-ZRgRZ8PIQmr3vfUgcZm5L9WghGKINJ4pN5u9HNvUGLOtKBh61LY9iPHThuU_i3NnDx4NTMLL-dVqwHiSPbiel1Zk36ydqUnA69pniS8RT4fUnj9vxcwhJd9Kc2wpvjvMuiIykSb9zpZt2Slox4TobalE2x28OcRFgEZy1FdfIC2GXCTC0FjIEcq_jgCyn7qHGO3r0i7qDkND8CbVWuNzT_31N6JQrzo1fyuHLtUMwbk68mJ9zrOv5f_ulh9xMsLdH7xcd_gJ-pEahgi59MwMNTXSooK1lTcUGJj10d0O605XQIPH1n1S1OESoVTVWD-h8gLad0_5W2MOwDzrw%3D%3D)
Biden’s son took bribes from Ukrainians, Schiff knew the Russian collusion allegations against Pres. Trump were fake, and Biden has been found guilty himself of mishandling classified documents...

_**Clearly, there’s TWO standards for Democrats like Schiff and Biden**_ – one for them, and one for their political opponents.

Schiff and Biden are making the United States of America look more like a banana republic than the constitutional republic our Founders fought to give us.

**Their use of the government and YOUR tax dollars to try to imprison their political opponent is an unprecedented abuse of power and a complete betrayal of Americans’ trust.**

Adam Schiff and Joe Biden are two of the most corrupt politicians who have ever infested Washington and **defeating them is essential to the survival of our constitutional republic.**

[**Join me in standing up to this shameful indictment of President Trump and help me defeat the original ringleader – Adam Schiff – by rushing your support.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1b6027b629174c99913f78b7093fd1d5&_e=NAXTuffx_zHSZ8QCgILcOMI-6NFtjhd3WbTWdx3eewbFPsG54Oc2aVG_9nGJsMCtFtHy-ZRgRZ8PIQmr3vfUgcZm5L9WghGKINJ4pN5u9HNvUGLOtKBh61LY9iPHThuU_i3NnDx4NTMLL-dVqwHiSPbiel1Zk36ydqUnA69pniS8RT4fUnj9vxcwhJd9Kc2wpvjvMuiIykSb9zpZt2Slox4TobalE2x28OcRFgEZy1H1gstsw6UIWm2vMza0aiK_FvSFCa90sgA2ePLrr-FNIIt-zvNc8UMD2bLhzL2xQl3bNgcQCmJQblWsuyDnZTJkyWcT0Jum-FO1G7IyvcUZK7iWRtcfUz70GFviAvj63yS1RIpcycXZp3LhWZCar3RhoWA2ww0JPi56h_tPunH4vA%3D%3D)

Thank you,

Eric Early
Candidate for U.S. Senate

[** Defeat Adam Schiff » **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1b6027b629174c99913f78b7093fd1d5&_e=NAXTuffx_zHSZ8QCgILcOMI-6NFtjhd3WbTWdx3eewbFPsG54Oc2aVG_9nGJsMCtFtHy-ZRgRZ8PIQmr3vfUgcZm5L9WghGKINJ4pN5u9HNvUGLOtKBh61LY9iPHThuU_i3NnDx4NTMLL-dVqwHiSPbiel1Zk36ydqUnA69pniS8RT4fUnj9vxcwhJd9Kc2wpvjvMuiIykSb9zpZt2Slox4TobalE2x28OcRFgEZy1Gtl9vVkxfX2cN-sbM4mq_duvJ7tFo8nhTN45XHULti-S4RQwUqBKsA78py5nf6L_7EcQd7yDd0zsgFBKuIsgJafeNYgELKYFigFOpuAYkllSd9b2RcwjwNq4nYP-pNE_OBKt6loAhWsauGYtNBK7lHK-ZanYhUUnSz0FV3PEINiA%3D%3D)

# ABOUT ERIC EARLY
---
Eric Early is a husband, father, attorney, businessman and son of a Marine. **Not a career politician.** Eric was raised to believe in America’s founding principles of limited government and free markets. He believes that every American should be given the opportunity to fulfill their American Dream, and his parents inspired Eric to achieve his personal goals. As the co-owner and Managing Partner of a nationally recognized law firm, Eric understands how difficult it is to start and run a successful business. As your next US Senator, Eric will work to cut overly-burdensome regulations that get in the way of entrepreneurship and job creation. Eric will stand-up to the Socialist woke interests that control Washington, DC, fight to preserve and protect our Democracy, and fight for ordinary Californians who are being left behind. body:
Child care, groceries, gas — it adds up quickly!
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64786994/411241854/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzg4NjNkMy0zOTBhLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UIGhWyN2pzZ2_cywpqadj3dXMeKBsPCXY3OvJLOYGds=&emci=93aafd87-2c0a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=b78863d3-390a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9494239)
---

| | We have an opportunity to help tackle childhood poverty in the United States. **Before the COVID-19 pandemic, upwards of 10 million children were living in poverty,** with about half of those families living in extreme poverty. What does that look like? It looks like a family of four living on just $13,086, or less, for a year. It is not just poverty, it is unimaginable poverty. But as part of our COVID-19 response, in the American Rescue Plan, Congress increased the Child Tax Credit (CTC) from $2,000 to as much as $3,600 depending on the age of the child. The plan also adjusted the credit payment to ensure this resource was available to the families most in need — families earning so little that they did not owe any taxes in 2021. **Now, Congress is hearing legislation that would make this expanded tax credit permanent to help families in need. I am supporting this bill because no child should have to grow up in poverty.[Will you sign my petition to support this bill and tell Congress to lift children and families out of poverty?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64786996/411241856/2046104001?utm_source=pet-2023-06-american-family-act-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzg4NjNkMy0zOTBhLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UIGhWyN2pzZ2_cywpqadj3dXMeKBsPCXY3OvJLOYGds=&emci=93aafd87-2c0a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=b78863d3-390a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9494239)** [Sign now!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64786998/411241858/610987261?utm_source=pet-2023-06-american-family-act-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzg4NjNkMy0zOTBhLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UIGhWyN2pzZ2_cywpqadj3dXMeKBsPCXY3OvJLOYGds=&emci=93aafd87-2c0a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=b78863d3-390a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9494239) **The expanded Child Tax Credit of 2021 reached more than 61 million kids — 76,000 of whom live in Washington's Second Congressional District alone.** The CTC made an enormous difference in the lives of families. It helped families pay for essentials like child care, groceries, transportation, household utilities, and so much else. The impact the CTC made was significant. The American Medical Association found that the CTC increased rates of child wellness, improved the ability of households to cover expenses, and decreased food insecurity for children. **But those improvements vanished when Congress failed to reauthorize the expanded Child Tax Credit.** **It is clear: we need to restore the expanded Child Tax Credit. Not just for a year, or two, but**** _permanently_****.**[**Will you sign my petition and tell Congress to permanently lift American families out of extreme poverty?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64786999/411241860/2046104001?utm_source=pet-2023-06-american-family-act-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzg4NjNkMy0zOTBhLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UIGhWyN2pzZ2_cywpqadj3dXMeKBsPCXY3OvJLOYGds=&emci=93aafd87-2c0a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=b78863d3-390a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9494239) **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64787001/411241861/2046104001?utm_source=pet-2023-06-american-family-act-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzg4NjNkMy0zOTBhLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UIGhWyN2pzZ2_cywpqadj3dXMeKBsPCXY3OvJLOYGds=&emci=93aafd87-2c0a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=b78863d3-390a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9494239)****The 2021 Child Tax Credit was the largest tax cut for the middle class in a generation** , **and its outcome for families was striking. clean_body: Child care, groceries, gas — it adds up quickly! | | | | We have an opportunity to help tackle childhood poverty in the United States. Before the COVID-19 pandemic, upwards of 10 million children were living in poverty, with about half of those families living in extreme poverty. What does that look like? It looks like a family of four living on just $13,086, or less, for a year. It is not just poverty, it is unimaginable poverty. But as part of our COVID-19 response, in the American Rescue Plan, Congress increased the Child Tax Credit (CTC) from $2,000 to as much as $3,600 depending on the age of the child. The plan also adjusted the credit payment to ensure this resource was available to the families most in need — families earning so little that they did not owe any taxes in 2021. Now, Congress is hearing legislation that would make this expanded tax credit permanent to help families in need. I am supporting this bill because no child should have to grow up in poverty. The expanded Child Tax Credit of 2021 reached more than 61 million kids — 76,000 of whom live in Washington's Second Congressional District alone. The CTC made an enormous difference in the lives of families. It helped families pay for essentials like child care, groceries, transportation, household utilities, and so much else. The impact the CTC made was significant. The American Medical Association found that the CTC increased rates of child wellness, improved the ability of households to cover expenses, and decreased food insecurity for children. But those improvements vanished when Congress failed to reauthorize the expanded Child Tax Credit. It is clear: we need to restore the expanded Child Tax Credit. Not just for a year, or two, but permanently. 2021 Child Tax Credit was the largest tax cut for the middle class in a generation , and its outcome for families was striking. We cannot let this opportunity slip away.
