name: Adam Schiff
subject: re: my Censure vote in the House
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2512%2E5257348%2EAYYNFL ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek —

MAGA Republican Anna Paulina Luna of Florida just announced on the House
floor that the vote to censure and fine me $16 million will happen within
the next two days with GOP Speaker Kevin McCarthy’s personal support.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230613_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2512%2E5257348%2EAYYNFL ]Axios headline: House to vote on measure censuring Adam Schiff

While the national media and political pundits focus their attention today
on disgraced, twice-impeached ex-president Donald Trump’s arraignment in
downtown Miami on 37 federal counts returned by the grand jury, MAGA
Republicans are out for revenge against me personally.

Derek, this
vote to censure me — and even fine me $16 MILLION — could actually pass
with a GOP majority.

The authors of the Big Lie are attacking me for telling the truth, and
it’s blatant political retaliation for my efforts to hold Trump
accountable for his abuses of power. For leading his first impeachment and
Senate trial. For serving on the January 6th Committee to investigate the
insurrection he incited on our Capitol. They believe I am effective — too
effective — and so they’re trying to silence me.

We have to send Trump’s enablers in Congress a message loud and clear — no
matter what attacks they throw at us, we will always fight back to uphold
the rule of law and defend our democracy.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jun2023_abs_em.FUvtzW&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230613_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2512%2E5257348%2EAYYNFL ]If you’re with me, I’m urgently asking you to rush a contribution of
$10 or whatever you can spare before midnight to help my campaign fight
back against these attacks.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=jun2023_abs_em.9HINAX&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230613_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=2512%2E5257348%2EAYYNFL ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=jun2023_abs_em.5j4Bsc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230613_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2512%2E5257348%2EAYYNFL ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=jun2023_abs_em.RWa6IA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230613_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=2512%2E5257348%2EAYYNFL ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=jun2023_abs_em.9Bj7kB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230613_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=2512%2E5257348%2EAYYNFL ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=jun2023_abs_em.wTG104&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230613_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=2512%2E5257348%2EAYYNFL ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230613_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=2512%2E5257348%2EAYYNFL ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

This isn’t just an attack on me. It’s an attack on the very premise of
constitutional oversight and accountability. And we have to fight back
with everything we’ve got.

Thanks for standing with me at this critical moment.

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230613_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=2512%2E5257348%2EAYYNFL ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

Fellow Democrats, no one is above the law.

Earlier this afternoon, President Donald Trump pled not-guilty to 37 criminal charges related to the classified documents he kept at Mar-a-Lago. These are serious charges that have potentially put American lives at risk.

The traitorous MAGA GOP wasted no time deciding whether the charges had any merit. They **rushed** to defend Trump and slander the investigation as a political “weaponization” of the Dept of Justice. Many, like Illinois’ own Mary Miller, released their statements before the indictment was even public.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64787489/411243218/-1153878952?refcode=EM_FR_230613Espionage_TEAM_90DO_4_G_B_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGViMTFiZTktM2MwYS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7ox-OGc2wXKeNEUiWeMJhzuV0oiVIOqDIEBzPqIV8q0=)
Top-secret documents — **_allegedly including nuclear secrets_** — are not anyone’s personal property. No amount of MAGA traitors’ lies can hide that.

**[There is no defense for risking our national security like this. In trying, the GOP has again shown the danger they pose to our nation. Will you donate $10 right now to help us defeat Mary Miller and the rest of these MAGA traitors? name: Ruben Gallego for Senate
subject: Trump, Kari Lake + Political Violence
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
No matter what you feel about the former president, it's not a day for celebration. This is a sad day for our country.
#

Peter -
Earlier today, Trump pled not guilty to charges he illegally kept classified documents from his presidency including ones about United States vulnerabilities to attacks and potential responses.
No matter what you feel about the former president, it's not a day for celebration. This is a sad day for our country.
And unfortunately, it's been made worse by far-right leaders who are threatening political violence in the aftermath of these charges -- echoes and escalations of the kind of talk we heard before January 6.
Donald Trump Jr's fiancée said "RETRIBUTION IS COMING."
Arizona Republican Congressman Andy Biggs said "We have now reached a war phase."
And Kari Lake threatened armed violence at an event in Georgia.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june23.4TsbMb&refcode=em230613-2-f&t=1&akid=705%2E734936%2EG7IBwS)
It's a perilous time for our country. And one thing is for sure: for the sake of our democracy, we have to keep people like Kari Lake out of the Senate. Our ability to heal as a nation is at stake.
Ruben needs your help to get it done:
[**Can you please use this link to contribute $3, or whatever you can afford today, to Ruben Gallego's campaign for United States Senate in Arizona? We will put every donation to work making sure we beat Kari Lake.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june23.4TsbMb&refcode=em230613-2-f&t=2&akid=705%2E734936%2EG7IBwS)

No matter what you feel about the former president, it's not a day for celebration. This is a sad day for our country. And unfortunately, it's been made worse by far-right leaders who are threatening political violence in the aftermath of these charges -- echoes and escalations of the kind of talk we heard before January 6. Donald Trump Jr's fiancée said "RETRIBUTION IS COMING." Arizona Republican Congressman Andy Biggs said "We have now reached a war phase." And Kari Lake threatened armed violence at an event in Georgia. It's a perilous time for our country. And one thing is for sure: for the sake of our democracy, we have to keep people like Kari Lake out of the Senate. Our ability to heal as a nation is at stake. There are three numbers you need to know right now:
| | | |
---
Friend – Ohio's battleground race could decide Senate control, so there are three numbers you need to know right now:
**8 million.**
That's how many registered voters are in Ohio. We need to reach as many of them as possible to drive record turnout and protect Sherrod's seat.
**$80 million.**
That's how much GOP special interest groups spent in last year's Ohio Senate race. _NBC News_ reports that our race could be even more expensive.
**$26.
That's our average donation – and what we're asking _you_ to chip in today to help reach our critical midnight fundraising goal.**
That's how we compete with the GOP's massive war chest and win this race. It might not seem like much, but if everyone reading this email donated $26, we'd reach our goal in no time at all. **But not everyone will, which is why we're counting on you, friend.**

Hi Peter, it’s Tiernan!
As the campaign manager for Bob’s re-election campaign, my job is to look at the big picture and set the strategy for our campaign.
One thing that has been clear to me from the jump is that we can’t afford to fall short of ANY of our fundraising goals. In a race this competitive, even a few slow days of fundraising could affect our ability to run a powerful campaign.
**[Our June 15 deadline is only two days away — Peter, will you make a contribution of any size today to help us reach our mid-month goal?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230613-2?refcode=em20230613-2&refcode2=152_552475_5X5h0C&akid=152%2E552475%2E5X5h0C)**

Running a Senate campaign is expensive. Running a campaign in a state targeted by Mitch McConnell and national Republicans is _even more_ expensive.
But with your support, I know that we can have what we need to get ready for all the attacks that are coming our way.
**[That’s why I’m asking you: Will you donate today to help re-elect Bob Casey to the Senate? body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_061323_NoCorporateMoney&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_061323_NoCorporateMoney&amount=25]
Hi friend,
We launched our campaign pledging to never accept money from corporate PACs – and we are keeping it that way.
Our commitment to you is that we will always be centered with our communities in mind. We are running to represent immigrants, women, LGBTQ folks and working families – not corporate interests.
But that means we have to rely entirely on small-dollar donations to fund our campaign. Can we count on you to help? Any amount you contribute no matter how small makes an impact. Donate $5, $10 or $25 today >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_061323_NoCorporateMoney&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

EXPRESS DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
EXPRESS DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
We’ve got a long primary ahead of us, and this field is getting crowded. Others in this race might happily accept from corporate PACs and big-time donors, but not me. To win as a progressive grassroots campaign, it’s going to take all of us.
So, friend, can you donate a few dollars today to support our corporate-free grassroots campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_061323_NoCorporateMoney&amount=25]
A ganar,
Raquel Terán

PO Box 1041

United States

| How much do you value your freedom? Most candidates are bought for and paid for by political action committees and lobbyists. Not me. I rely on the generous donations from you. So please answer this call for help. Anyone can donate and you don't have to live in the district to give. You may not be able to vote for me but I can still vote for you.

| We need volunteers willing to work inside the polls as poll watchers and outside the polls handing our our election day flyer. You may bring a tent for shade or a chair to sit during slow times. It's very important to dress comfortably and come prepared for the weather.
---
| Amanda, Where Do You Need Me?
---
| (You don't have to live in the district to help)
---
| Senate District 12 is below and in Purple. This is where we need the help. If you can help out on Election Day we have needs for:
1. Volunteers to put up signs before the polls open at 6am.
2. Volunteers to work a 3 hour shift between 6am and 7pm.
3. Volunteers to take down the signs when the polls close at 7pm
4. Volunteers willing to stay after the polls close at 7pm to watch the count take place inside the precinct.
5. Volunteers to work in our office on Lucks Lane which will be open from 6am to 7pm.

---

clean_body: We need volunteers | | | | == | CAN YOU VOLUNTEER ON ELECTION DAY? Tuesday, June 20 6 DAYS AWAY HOW CAN YOU HELP? | | | How can I help Amanda? | Is there anything you can do today to help us win this June 20 Primary? | | == | How much do you value your freedom? Most candidates are bought for and paid for by political action committees and lobbyists. Not me. I rely on the generous donations from you. So please answer this call for help. Anyone can donate and you don't have to live in the district to give. You may not be able to vote for me but I can still vote for you. | | == | We need volunteers willing to work inside the polls as poll watchers and outside the polls handing our our election day flyer. You may bring a tent for shade or a chair to sit during slow times. It's very important to dress comfortably and come prepared for the weather. | Amanda, Where Do You Need Me? | (You don't have to live in the district to help) | Senate District 12 is below and in Purple. This is where we need the help. If you can help out on Election Day we have needs for: 1. Volunteers to put up signs before the polls open at 6am. 2. Volunteers to work a 3 hour shift between 6am and 7pm. 3. Volunteers to take down the signs when the polls close at 7pm 4. Volunteers willing to stay after the polls close at 7pm to watch the count take place inside the precinct. 5. Volunteers to work in our office on Lucks Lane which will be open from 6am to 7pm. | | | == | WHERE IS THE 12th SENATE DISTRICT? | | == | List of 51 Chesterfield Precincts in SD12 (Where we need help manning the polls) | BERMUDA DISTRICT == at Carver College and Career Academy at 12400 Branders Bridge Rd DALE DISTRICT == at Gates Elementary at 10001 Courthouse Road == at Ironbridge Baptist Church at 10900 Iron Bridge Rd MATOACA DISTRICT VSU Multipurpose Center at 20809 Second Ave == at Cloverhill Library Matoaca Middle School == at Chesdin Landing Golf == at Second Branch Baptist Church == at Bethia United Methodist Church == at Cosby High School == at Manchester High School == at Mt Herman Baptist Church == at Cosby High School == at Matoaca High School == at Bailey Bridge Middle School == at Alberta Smith Elementary == at Spring Run Elementary == at Second Branch Baptist == at Chesterfield Baptist Church == at Swift Creek Baptist Church CLOVERHILL DISTRICT == at Brandermill Church Swift Creek Elementary Gordon Elementary == at Monacan High School == at Reams Elementary School == at Central Chesterfield Ruritan Swift Creek Middle == at Cloverhill High School == at Shenandoah Community Evergreen Elementary == at Tomahawk Middle School == at Tomahawk Middle School Woolridge Elementary School == == at Cloverhill Elementary MIDLOTHIAN DISTRICT == at Brighton Green Pool Crestwood Elementary School == at Midlothian High School == at Robious Elementary School St Michael's School == at Greenfield Elementary School Church of the Redeemer == at Robious Middle School == at Community of Grace == at Midlothian Middle School == at Salisbury Presbyterian Watkins Elementary School == == the Islamic Center == | List of Colonial Heights Precincts in SD12 | Colonial Heights Precinct 1 at Community Building 157 Roanoke Ave. Colonial Heights Precinct 2 at Colonial Heights Middle School 500 Conduit Rd. Colonial Heights Precinct 3 at Lakeview Elementary School 401 Taswell Ave. Colonial Heights Precinct 4 at Colonial Heights High School Technical Center 3451 Conduit Rd. Team,
Last month, I was so proud to join the National Advisory Committee for the Biden-Harris re-election campaign.
Here’s what I’ve learned so far from my work on the committee - and what I need you to know, too:
1.
Our
Democratic
leaders
are
fired
up
for
this
race.
No
matter
what
the
GOP
throws
at
them,
Joe
and
Kamala
are
ready
to
win
.
2.
The
time
to
fight
for
this
campaign
is
today
-
not
next
June,
and
certainly
not
next
October
or
November.
3.
This
campaign
is
going
to
be
big,
it’s
going
to
be
inclusive,
and
it’s
going
to
need
all
hands
on
deck.
One thing I admire so much about President Biden is just how much he truly cares. Got a baby crying in the room during a press conference? He switches into grandparent mode immediately, with buckets of compassion for the family. Have a sick family member? He will talk to you for hours about navigating illness and hospital rooms. Lost a loved one? He sees your grief, and he understands.
That care and compassion extends directly to the kind of re-election campaign he’s running. I’ve been amazed to see firsthand how much he cares about winning in 2024 - to continue his work to restore the soul of our nation, and also to ensure he does as much as he can for the many other Democrats who will be on the ballot all across the country.
So, I’m all in for 2024. How about you - are you with Joe, with Kamala, and with me?
Add your name to my 2024 petition now to say you’re ready to fight together - and win. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/7XWdJbILFUixNwIv9b2HwQ2]
Thanks a lot for letting me know that I can count on you in this effort.
We have a lot of work ahead of us, and the only way to get it all done is by sticking together.
Have a great day.
-Sara

To be frank, folks, **[I’m about to ask you to pitch in before my re-election campaign's mid-month deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64788675/411248035/-358405457?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20230613_PM1_T2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjdhODVkNS00NDBhLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r0FFTzElHBmnS_NhXhTFbmIC1STfa2FSHWkyftSWH9c=)** But first, I hope you’ll give me just a few minutes to explain something. **In just a few weeks, we will report our fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission for the first time since I announced my re-election campaign to the U.S. Senate.** Shortly after, the total amount we raised and the number of folks who chipped in will go public for all to see — including everyone from Mitch McConnell to potential Republican challengers. Now, fundraising numbers cannot fully measure the strength of our grassroots team. There are no numbers _or_ words that can capture the compassion and commitment that supporters in New Mexico and across the country have shown for our shared Democratic values. But a strong showing in our first quarter out of the gate will be a signal to everyone that our grassroots campaign is prepared to keep the Land of Enchantment and the Senate blue. Yet Republicans would see a lackluster report as a sign of weakness and an invitation to start spending big against us. **We can't afford to lose this seat or our majority to Republicans — not when everything from a clean energy future to reproductive rights is at stake.** **[That’s why I’m asking: Can you chip in any amount before our upcoming mid-month deadline? name: Fair Fight Action
subject: Voter ID laws are another page in the extremist playbook
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
Voter ID laws are a relic of the Jim Crow era, and another mechanism extremists are using to silence marginalized communities. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64788685/411248049/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230613_e_voterid_v1s2_f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmI2ZjFlNC00NDBhLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KJSPSHK1Rve96A4JhI0jYj-hLyFU5EAzLfVbGAlabPU=&emci=2e110587-440a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=36b6f1e4-440a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

| | We’re here to talk about voter ID laws. Burdensome and restrictive voter ID mandates are tactics pulled straight from the voter suppression playbook, and it’s our duty to speak out as anti-voter extremists continue to push them. [_**If you agree that voter ID laws are discriminatory, and if you support Fair Fight Action’s efforts to stop voter suppression tactics like this, add your name right away.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64788686/411248050/-1411616972?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230613_e_voterid_v1s2_f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmI2ZjFlNC00NDBhLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KJSPSHK1Rve96A4JhI0jYj-hLyFU5EAzLfVbGAlabPU=&emci=2e110587-440a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=36b6f1e4-440a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64788687/411248051/-1411616972?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230613_e_voterid_v1s2_f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmI2ZjFlNC00NDBhLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KJSPSHK1Rve96A4JhI0jYj-hLyFU5EAzLfVbGAlabPU=&emci=2e110587-440a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=36b6f1e4-440a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)
---
Here’s what you need to know about voter ID laws:
**The history: **Voter ID laws only started appearing in the past 20 years, as extremists have schemed to devise new ways to block access to the ballot box.
* In **2002** , Congress passed the Help America Vote Act, opening up the opportunity for states to impose strict voter ID requirements.
* Shortly after, Indiana became one of the first states to pass a strict voter ID law in**2005,** which was ultimately upheld by the Supreme Court, and served as an impetus for several other states to pass strict voter ID laws in the years following.
* The **2013** U.S. Supreme Court ruling in _Shelby County v. Holder_ effectively gutted the protections of the Voting Rights Act by eliminating the federal preclearance requirement so that states with a history of voting discrimination were no longer required to get approval from the Justice Department before enacting changes to voting laws. Following the _Shelby_ ruling, at least four states were quick to enact new voter ID laws or strengthen existing ones.
* **Today, there are 36 states with voter ID laws, and nine of those are strict — opening the door for voter disenfranchisement. **

**The impact: **Restrictive voter ID laws disproportionately target and burden Black, brown, elderly, student, rural, and low-income voters. While extremists often attempt to justify these laws with the claim that everyone has the necessary IDs, the fact is, a significant portion of eligible voters lack the IDs required — including 18% of voters over the age of 65, 16% of Latino voters, 25% of Black voters, and 15% of low-income voters. **The racial turnout gap has grown in states that have passed strict voter ID laws.**
They also fail to address the so-called “voter fraud” that extremists claim is rampant — though time and again these claims have been proven blatantly false. Studies have shown that voter impersonation, which strict voter ID laws allegedly aim to stop, is rare and typically attributable to clerical errors or bad data matching. The incidence rate is extremely low — between 0.0003% and 0.0025%.
The reality is this: Voter ID laws are a relic of the Jim Crow era, serving as a modern-day iteration of poll taxes or literacy tests. **They’re yet another mechanism extremists are using to silence already marginalized communities.**
Just this year, Ohio enacted what has been referred to as the strictest voter ID law in the U.S. The law requires the use of photo IDs, such as passports or driver’s licenses, to vote and prohibits the use of student IDs or county-issued veterans’ IDs. Governor Mike DeWine signed this law under the guise of “election integrity” and preventing “voter fraud” — backing up baseless claims pushed by extremists in Ohio. **We can expect that anti-voter attacks will continue to ramp up ahead of the 2024 election cycle.**
**The actions we can take right now:** Fair Fight Action is advocating against suppressive practices like discriminatory voter ID laws, and we need to know if you’re with us in this fight. [_**Will you add your name today to show that you strongly oppose extremists’ voter ID laws?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64788688/411248052/-1411616972?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230613_e_voterid_v1s2_f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmI2ZjFlNC00NDBhLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KJSPSHK1Rve96A4JhI0jYj-hLyFU5EAzLfVbGAlabPU=&emci=2e110587-440a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=36b6f1e4-440a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

clean_body: Voter ID laws are a relic of the Jim Crow era, and another mechanism extremists are using to silence marginalized communities. | | | We’re here to talk about voter ID laws. Burdensome and restrictive voter ID mandates are tactics pulled straight from the voter suppression playbook, and it’s our duty to speak out as anti-voter extremists continue to push them. | Here’s what you need to know about voter ID laws: The history: Voter ID laws only started appearing in the past 20 years, as extremists have schemed to devise new ways to block access to the ballot box. In 2002 , Congress passed the Help America Vote Act, opening up the opportunity for states to impose strict voter ID requirements. Shortly after, Indiana became one of the first states to pass a strict voter ID law in2005, which was ultimately upheld by the Supreme Court, and served as an impetus for several other states to pass strict voter ID laws in the years following. The 2013 U.S. Supreme Court ruling in Shelby County v. Holder effectively gutted the protections of the Voting Rights Act by eliminating the federal preclearance requirement so that states with a history of voting discrimination were no longer required to get approval from the Justice Department before enacting changes to voting laws. Following the Shelby ruling, at least four states were quick to enact new voter ID laws or strengthen existing ones. Today, there are 36 states with voter ID laws, and nine of those are strict — opening the door for voter disenfranchisement. The impact: Restrictive voter ID laws disproportionately target and burden Black, brown, elderly, student, rural, and low-income voters. While extremists often attempt to justify these laws with the claim that everyone has the necessary IDs, the fact is, a significant portion of eligible voters lack the IDs required — including 18% of voters over the age of 65, 16% of Latino voters, 25% of Black voters, and 15% of low-income voters. The racial turnout gap has grown in states that have passed strict voter ID laws. They also fail to address the so-called “voter fraud” that extremists claim is rampant — though time and again these claims have been proven blatantly false. Studies have shown that voter impersonation, which strict voter ID laws allegedly aim to stop, is rare and typically attributable to clerical errors or bad data matching. The incidence rate is extremely low — between 0.0003% and 0.0025%. The reality is this: Voter ID laws are a relic of the Jim Crow era, serving as a modern-day iteration of poll taxes or literacy tests. They’re yet another mechanism extremists are using to silence already marginalized communities. Just this year, Ohio enacted what has been referred to as the strictest voter ID law in the U.S. The law requires the use of photo IDs, such as passports or driver’s licenses, to vote and prohibits the use of student IDs or county-issued veterans’ IDs. Governor Mike DeWine signed this law under the guise of “election integrity” and preventing “voter fraud” — backing up baseless claims pushed by extremists in Ohio. We can expect that anti-voter attacks will continue to ramp up ahead of the 2024 election cycle. The actions we can take right now: Fair Fight Action is advocating against suppressive practices like discriminatory voter ID laws, and we need to know if you’re with us in this fight. Together, The Fair Fight Action Team | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2023 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved.
